studyModeDescription: Yan boya ifilelẹ ẹkọ rẹ jẹ iṣapeye fun ile-iwe tabi yunifasiti.
chatNoRooms: Ko si awọn ibaraẹnisọrọ to wa.
learnBookmarkTitle: Tẹsiwaju ni ibiti o ti lọ kuro
learnBookmarkEmpty: Ko si bukumaaki sibẹsibẹ. Samisi koko-ọrọ kan lati bẹrẹ pada nigbamii.
learnInAppSubtitle: Ohun gbogbo ti o wa ni isalẹ jẹ lilo taara ninu ohun elo laisi ṣiṣi awọn ọna asopọ ita.
learnExplainPrefix: Ni awọn ọrọ ti o rọrun
learnExplainSchool: tumọ si kikọ ẹkọ ọkan pataki ni akoko kan, lẹhinna lilo awọn apẹẹrẹ rọrun lati ṣe adaṣe rẹ.
learnExplainUni: tumọ si agbọye imọran akọkọ, idi ti o ṣe pataki, ati ibi ti o ti lo ni ikẹkọ tabi adaṣe.
learnStep2: Kọ imọran bọtini ni awọn ọrọ tirẹ.
learnStep3: Yanju iṣẹ-ṣiṣe kekere kan ati ṣayẹwo awọn aṣiṣe.
learnMiniTaskAndWhy: ki o si se alaye idi ti o jije.
learnHintSimple: Imọran: Ti o ba kanra lile, pin koko-ọrọ si awọn ẹya kekere ki o tun ṣe pẹlu apẹẹrẹ kan kọọkan.
learnExamBasicsHint: Ipo idojukọ: awọn ipilẹ ti o lagbara ni akọkọ, lẹhinna adaṣe adaṣe kekere kan.
learnExamBalancedHint: Ipo idojukọ: oye iwọntunwọnsi, adaṣe, ati atunyẹwo.
learnExamHardHint: Ipo idojukọ: awọn iṣẹ-ṣiṣe ara idanwo pẹlu titẹ akoko ati awọn esi iyara.

dashNoHomeschool: Ṣeto iṣẹ ṣiṣe ni Kọ ẹkọ lati gba itọsọna nibi.

emptyFilesDesc: Ṣe igbasilẹ awọn ohun elo ikẹkọ, awọn akọsilẹ, tabi awọn orisun.
emptyGradesDesc: Awọn giredi rẹ yoo han nibi ni kete ti o ti ṣafikun.
emptyCourses: Ko si awọn iṣẹ ikẹkọ sibẹsibẹ
emptyCoursesDesc: Darapọ mọ ẹkọ ti o wa tẹlẹ pẹlu koodu kan tabi ṣẹda tirẹ.
emptyMessagesDesc: Bẹrẹ ibaraẹnisọrọ titun lati sopọ pẹlu awọn omiiran.
calNoEventsMonth: Ko si awọn iṣẹlẹ ni oṣu yii.
joinCourseDesc: Tẹ koodu iṣẹ ohun kikọ 6 sii lati ọdọ olukọ tabi ẹlẹgbẹ rẹ.
joinCourseInvalidCode: Jọwọ tẹ koodu ẹkọ ti o wulo.
joinCourseAlreadyJoined: O ti darapọ mọ iṣẹ-ẹkọ yii tẹlẹ.
courseCreatedShareHint: Pin koodu yii pẹlu awọn ọmọ ile-iwe:
courseNoDesc: Ko si apejuwe ti o wa fun iṣẹ-ẹkọ yii.
courseSearchNoMatch: Ko si awọn iṣẹ ikẹkọ ti o baamu.
tasksNothingInFilter: Ko si nkankan ninu àlẹmọ yii
tasksAddHint: Ṣafikun awọn iṣẹ ṣiṣe lati tọpa awọn iṣẹ iyansilẹ ati awọn akoko ipari.
tasksTryFilter: Gbiyanju àlẹmọ ti o yatọ loke.
filesNone: Ko si awọn faili ti o gbejade sibẹsibẹ
settingsAppearanceSub: Akori dudu n ṣiṣẹ ati iṣapeye fun idojukọ.
plannerEntryRequired: Ọjọ, akoko ati koko-ọrọ ni a nilo.
plannerNoEntries: Ko si awọn titẹ sii iṣeto sibẹsibẹ.
settingsNotifSub: Ṣakoso awọn titaniji ati awọn olurannileti.
settingsStudyRemindersSub: Gba leti nigbati o to akoko lati kawe
settingsTaskDeadlinesSub: Awọn itaniji ṣaaju awọn ọjọ ipari iṣẹ-ṣiṣe
settingsDeadlineSaved: Awọn itaniji akoko ipari ti a fipamọ.
settingsDataLocal: Gbogbo data ti o ti fipamọ ni agbegbe
teacherToolsSubtitle: Ṣakoso iraye si kilasi, tiipa awọn ipo ọmọ ile-iwe ati pinpin akoonu ikẹkọ laisi fifun awọn ọmọ ile-iwe awọn ẹtọ olukọ.
teacherClassControlDesc: Tii iyipada ọmọ ile-iwe laarin ile-iwe ati ipo yunifasiti ki o jẹ ki kilasi dojukọ eto-ẹkọ lọwọlọwọ.
teacherLockSuccess: Ipo Kilasi titii pa fun awọn akẹkọ.
teacherShareMaterialDesc: Ṣe atẹjade awọn iṣẹ iyansilẹ tabi awọn akọsilẹ atunyẹwo iyara fun kilasi rẹ.
teacherShareSuccess: Awọn ohun elo ikẹkọ ti o pin pẹlu kilasi.
invitesNone: Ko si awọn koodu ifiwepe sibẹsibẹ.
settingsCountrySub: Ṣe deede awọn irẹjẹ ite, awọn ipele ile-iwe, ati awọn ọna kika nọmba si eto eto-ẹkọ rẹ.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_name: Algebra nlo awọn lẹta ati awọn aami lati soju awọn nọmba ati ṣe apejuwe awọn ibatan. O jẹ ẹhin ti gbogbo awọn mathimatiki ilọsiwaju. O kọ ẹkọ lati yanju awọn idogba, ṣiṣẹ pẹlu awọn oniyipada, ati wa awọn iye aimọ nipasẹ awọn igbesẹ ọgbọn.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_desc: Yanju: 3x - 5 = 10. Kọ igbesẹ kọọkan. Lẹhinna ṣayẹwo idahun rẹ nipa fidipo x pada.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_task: Ayipada (bii x tabi y) duro fun nọmba aimọ.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_kp0: Idogba fihan pe awọn ọrọ meji jẹ dogba (fun apẹẹrẹ 2x + 3 = 7).
learnSch_mathematics_f0_kp1: Lati yanju idogba, ṣe iṣẹ kanna ni ẹgbẹ mejeeji lati ya oniyipada naa sọtọ.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_kp2: Awọn iṣẹ ṣe maapu gbogbo igbewọle si iṣẹjade kan pato: f(x) = 2x tumọ si ilọpo meji titẹ sii.
learnSch_mathematics_f0_kp3: Polynomials jẹ awọn ikosile pẹlu ọpọ awọn ọrọ: 3x² + 2x - 1.
learnSch_mathematics_f1_name: Awọn iwadii geometry ni awọn apẹrẹ, awọn igun, ati awọn ibatan aye. O kọ ọ lati ronu ni ọgbọn ati ṣafihan awọn alaye nipa lilo awọn asọye ati awọn imọ-jinlẹ. Geometry farahan ni faaji, aworan, imọ-ẹrọ, ati igbesi aye ojoojumọ.
learnSch_mathematics_f1_desc: Geometry studies shapes, angles, and spatial relationships. It teaches you to reason logically and prove statements using definitions and theorems. Geometry appears in architecture, art, engineering, and everyday life.
learnSch_mathematics_f1_task: Onigun mẹta ọtun ni awọn ẹsẹ ti 3 cm ati 4 cm. Ṣe iṣiro hypotenuse nipa lilo a² + b² = c².
learnSch_mathematics_f1_kp0: Aaye kan ko ni iwọn; ila kan fa ailopin ni awọn itọnisọna mejeeji.
learnSch_mathematics_f1_kp1: Awọn igun jẹ iwọn ni awọn iwọn: igun ọtun = 90 °, igun ti o taara = 180°.
learnSch_mathematics_f1_kp2: Apapọ awọn igun ni eyikeyi onigun mẹta nigbagbogbo jẹ 180°.
learnSch_mathematics_f1_kp3: Ilana Pythagorean: ni igun onigun ọtun, a² + b² = c² (c jẹ hypotenuse).
learnSch_mathematics_f1_kp4: Awọn apẹrẹ ibaramu jẹ aami kanna ni iwọn ati apẹrẹ; iru awọn apẹrẹ ni awọn igun kanna ṣugbọn awọn titobi oriṣiriṣi.
learnSch_mathematics_f1_tp0: Awọn igun ati awọn onigun mẹta
learnSch_mathematics_f2_desc: Awọn iṣiro ṣe iranlọwọ fun ọ lati gba, ṣeto, ati tumọ data lati fa awọn ipinnu. Iṣeeṣe ṣe iwọn bi o ṣe ṣee ṣe iṣẹlẹ kan. Papọ wọn ṣe pataki ni imọ-jinlẹ, eto-ọrọ, ati ṣiṣe ipinnu lojoojumọ.
learnSch_mathematics_f2_task: Eerun kan kú: kini iṣeeṣe ti gbigba nọmba paapaa? Ṣe afihan iṣiro naa.
learnSch_mathematics_f2_kp0: Itumo = apao gbogbo iye ÷ nọmba ti iye.
learnSch_mathematics_f2_kp1: Agbedemeji = iye aarin nigbati data ti wa ni lẹsẹsẹ.
learnSch_mathematics_f2_kp2: Iṣeeṣe iṣẹlẹ = (awọn abajade ti o dara) ÷ (awọn abajade lapapọ).
learnSch_mathematics_f2_kp3: A histogram fihan awọn igbohunsafẹfẹ pinpin data.
learnSch_mathematics_f2_kp4: Ibaṣepọ fihan boya awọn oniyipada meji ṣọ lati gbe papọ - ṣugbọn kii ṣe idi.
learnSch_mathematics_f3_name: Trigonometry || Trigonometry ṣe iwadii awọn ibatan laarin awọn igun ati awọn ipari ẹgbẹ ni awọn igun mẹta. O ti wa ni lo ninu fisiksi, ina-, lilọ, ati orin. Awọn iṣẹ akọkọ mẹta - sine, cosine, ati tangent - so awọn igun pọ si awọn ipin ti awọn ẹgbẹ.
learnSch_mathematics_f3_desc: Akaba kan ti o gun mita 5 ni gigun si ogiri ni 60°. Bawo ni giga ti o de? Lo ese(60°) = √3/2.
learnSch_mathematics_f3_task: Ni igun onigun ọtun: ẹṣẹ (θ) = idakeji/hypotenuse, cos (θ) = nitosi/hypotenuse, tan (θ) = idakeji/apata.
learnSch_mathematics_f3_kp1: Circle ẹyọ naa fa trig si gbogbo awọn igun ti o kọja 90°.
learnSch_mathematics_f3_kp2: Sine ati cosine jẹ igbakọọkan: wọn tun ṣe ni gbogbo 360° (2π radians).
learnSch_mathematics_f3_kp4: Sine cosine tangent || Awọn iṣoro onigun mẹta ọtun
learnSch_mathematics_f3_tp2: Imọ ẹkọ nọmba ṣe iwadii awọn ohun-ini ti awọn odidi - paapaa awọn nọmba akọkọ, pipin, ati isọdi. O jẹ ọkan ninu awọn ẹka ti mathimatiki atijọ julọ ati labẹ cryptography ode oni.
learnSch_mathematics_f4_name: Wa GCD(48, 18) ni lilo algorithm Euclidean. Lẹhinna wa LCM(48, 18).
learnSch_mathematics_f4_desc: Nọmba akọkọ ni awọn ifosiwewe meji gangan: 1 ati funrararẹ (fun apẹẹrẹ 2, 3, 5, 7, 11).
learnSch_mathematics_f4_task: Gbogbo odidi> 1 ni a le kọ bi ọja alailẹgbẹ ti awọn alakoko (ero ipilẹ ti iṣiro).
learnSch_mathematics_f4_kp0: Awọn ofin pipin: nọmba kan jẹ pipin nipasẹ 3 ti apapọ awọn nọmba rẹ ba jẹ pipin nipasẹ 3.
learnSch_mathematics_f4_kp1: GCD (olupin ti o wọpọ julọ): nọmba ti o tobi julọ ti n pin awọn mejeeji. Lo algorithm Euclidean: GCD(a, b) = GCD(b, mod b).
learnSch_mathematics_f4_kp2: LCM (ọpọlọpọ ti o wọpọ julọ): LCM(a, b) = (a × b) ÷ GCD(a, b).
learnSch_mathematics_f4_kp4: LCM (least common multiple): LCM(a, b) = (a × b) ÷ GCD(a, b).
learnSch_mathematics_f5_name: Fekito kan ni titobi mejeeji (iwọn) ati itọsọna. Vectors jẹ pataki ni fisiksi (awọn ipa, iyara) ati mathimatiki giga. Wọn le ṣe afikun, yọkuro, ati iwọn, ati pe wọn ṣe gbogbogbo nipa ti ara si aaye 3D.
learnSch_mathematics_f5_desc: Fun u = (2, 3) ati v = (4, -1), wa: (a) u + v, (b) |u|, (c) u · v. Ṣe u ati v ni papẹndikula bi?
learnSch_mathematics_f5_task: A kọ fekito bi itọka tabi bi awọn ipoidojuko: v = (3, 4) tumọ si awọn ẹya 3 ọtun, awọn ẹya mẹrin si oke.
learnSch_mathematics_f5_kp1: Àfikún fekito: (a, b) + (c, d) = (a+c, b+d). Iyokuro jẹ kanna pẹlu iyokuro.
learnSch_mathematics_f5_kp3: Ọja aami: (a, b) · (c, d) = ac + bd. Ti ọja aami ba = 0, awọn apanirun jẹ papẹndikula.
learnSch_mathematics_f5_tp1: Awọn ilana ati jara || Ọkọọkan jẹ atokọ ti a paṣẹ ti awọn nọmba ti o tẹle ilana kan. A jara ni apao awọn ofin ti a ọkọọkan. Awọn mejeeji han jakejado mathimatiki ati awoṣe gidi-aye (idagbasoke, iṣuna, fisiksi).
learnSch_mathematics_f5_tp2: Ọkọọkan kan bẹrẹ 2, 6, 18, 54, … (a) Ṣe iṣiro tabi jiometirika? (b) Wa igba keje. (c) Wa apao awọn ofin 5 akọkọ.
learnSch_mathematics_f6_name: Ilana iṣiro: ọrọ kọọkan yatọ nipasẹ iye ti o wa titi d (iyatọ ti o wọpọ). aₙ = a₁ + (n-1) d.
learnSch_mathematics_f6_desc: Àpapọ̀ ọ̀sẹ̀ ìṣirò: Sₙ = n/2 · (a₁ + aₙ).
learnSch_mathematics_f6_task: Jiometirika ọkọọkan: kọọkan igba ti wa ni isodipupo nipasẹ kan ti o wa titi ratio r. aₙ = a₁ · rⁿ¹.
learnSch_mathematics_f6_kp0: Àpapọ̀ ìtòsẹ́sẹẹsẹ jiometirika: Sₙ = a₁ · (1 - rⁿ) / (1 - r) fun r ≠ 1.
learnSch_mathematics_f6_kp1: Sum of arithmetic sequence: Sₙ = n/2 · (a₁ + aₙ).
learnSch_mathematics_f6_kp2: Geometric sequence: each term is multiplied by a fixed ratio r. aₙ = a₁ · rⁿ⁻¹.
learnSch_mathematics_f6_kp3: Sum of geometric sequence: Sₙ = a₁ · (1 − rⁿ) / (1 − r) for r ≠ 1.
learnSch_mathematics_f6_kp4: Ẹya-ara jiometirika ailopin kan ṣajọpọ si S = a₁ / (1 − r) nigbati |r| <1.
learnSch_mathematics_f7_desc: Awọn iṣiro iṣiro iyatọ iyatọ awọn oṣuwọn iyipada ati awọn oke ti awọn igun. Itọsẹ naa sọ fun ọ bi o ṣe yarayara iṣẹ kan n yipada ni aaye eyikeyi. O jẹ ipilẹ si fisiksi, imọ-ẹrọ, eto-ọrọ, ati gbogbo awọn imọ-jinlẹ pipo.
learnSch_mathematics_f7_task: Wa itọsẹ f(x) = 4x³ - 2x² + 5. Lẹhinna wa ibi ti ite naa jẹ odo.
learnSch_mathematics_f7_kp0: F'(x) itọsẹ naa funni ni ite ti laini tangent si f(x) ni aaye x.
learnSch_mathematics_f7_kp1: Ofin agbara: ti f(x) = xⁿ, lẹhinna f'(x) = nxⁿ⁻¹. Apeere: (x³)′ = 3x².
learnSch_mathematics_f7_kp2: Ofin apapọ: (f + g)' = f'+ g'. Ofin ọja: (fg)' = f'g + fg'.
learnSch_mathematics_f7_kp3: Ofin ẹwọn: itọsẹ f(g(x)) jẹ f'(g(x)) · g'(x).
learnSch_mathematics_f7_kp4: Iṣẹ kan ni o pọju agbegbe tabi o kere ju nibiti f'(x) = 0 (ojuami pataki).
learnSch_mathematics_f7_tp0: Awọn ifilelẹ lọ ati awọn itọsẹ
learnSch_mathematics_f8_desc: Iṣiro apapọ ṣe iṣiro awọn agbegbe labẹ awọn ifọwọ ati awọn iwọn ti a kojọpọ. O jẹ iṣẹ iyipada ti iyatọ. Awọn akojọpọ jẹ lilo ni fisiksi (iṣẹ, ijinna), awọn iṣiro (iṣeeṣe), ati imọ-ẹrọ.
learnSch_mathematics_f8_task: Ṣe iṣiro ∫₀² (3x² + 2) dx. Ṣe afihan gbogbo awọn igbesẹ ni lilo ilana ipilẹ ti iṣiro.
learnSch_mathematics_f8_kp0: Ibaṣepọ ailopin ∫f(x)dx n fun idile awọn iṣẹ ti itọsẹ rẹ jẹ f.
learnSch_mathematics_f8_kp1: Ofin agbara fun awọn akojọpọ: ∫xⁿ dx = xⁿ⁺¹/(n+1) + C (fun n ≠ -1).
learnSch_mathematics_f8_kp2: Ipilẹṣẹ pato ∫ₐᵇ f(x)dx n funni ni agbegbe gangan laarin ohun ti tẹ ati ipo-x lati a si b.
learnSch_mathematics_f8_kp3: Ilana ipilẹ ti iṣiro: ∫ₐᵇ f(x)dx = F(b) - F(a), nibiti F' = f.
learnSch_mathematics_f8_kp4: Agbegbe laarin awọn igun meji: ∫ₐᵇ [f(x) - g(x)] dx, nibiti f(x) ≥ g(x).
learnSch_physics_f0_desc: Mechanics jẹ iwadi ti išipopada ati awọn ipa ti o fa. Awọn ofin mẹta ti Newton ti išipopada jẹ ipilẹ. Agbọye awọn ẹrọ ṣe iranlọwọ lati ṣalaye ohun gbogbo lati awọn nkan ti o ṣubu si awọn ifilọlẹ rọkẹti.
learnSch_physics_f0_task: Bọọlu kilo 2 kan yara ni 3 m/s². Ipa wo ló ń ṣiṣẹ́ lórí rẹ̀? Lo F = ma.
learnSch_physics_f0_kp0: Ofin 1st Newton: ohun ti o wa ni isinmi duro ni isinmi ayafi ti o ba ṣiṣẹ nipasẹ agbara kan.
learnSch_physics_f0_kp1: Ofin keji ti Newton: Agbara = isare × isare (F = ma).
learnSch_physics_f0_kp2: Ofin 3rd Newton: gbogbo iṣe ni o ni idasi dogba ati idakeji.
learnSch_physics_f0_kp3: Agbara kinetik = ½ × ọpọ eniyan × iyara² (KE = ½mv²).
learnSch_physics_f0_kp4: Iṣẹ = Ipa × ijinna ni itọsọna ti agbara (W = Fd).
learnSch_physics_f0_tp1: Awọn ologun || Agbara ati iṣẹ || Ina ati Oofa
learnSch_physics_f0_tp2: Ina ni sisan ti ina idiyele nipasẹ conductors. Iṣoofa dide lati awọn idiyele gbigbe ati awọn ohun elo oofa. Mejeji ti wa ni isokan ni electromagnetism, eyi ti agbara igbalode ọna ẹrọ.
learnSch_physics_f1_desc: Electricity is the flow of electric charge through conductors. Magnetism arises from moving charges and magnetic materials. Both are unified in electromagnetism, which powers modern technology.
learnSch_physics_f1_task: Circuit kan ni batiri 12 V ati resistor 4 Ω. Kini lọwọlọwọ? Lo V = IR.
learnSch_physics_f1_kp0: Ofin Ohm: Foliteji = Lọwọlọwọ × Resistance (V = IR).
learnSch_physics_f1_kp1: Circuit jara: lọwọlọwọ kanna nipasẹ gbogbo awọn paati; awọn foliteji ṣe afikun.
learnSch_physics_f1_kp2: Parallel Circuit: kanna foliteji kọja gbogbo irinše; awọn sisanwo ṣe afikun.
learnSch_physics_f1_kp4: Awọn aaye oofa n ṣe ipa lori awọn idiyele gbigbe: F = qvB.
learnSch_physics_f2_desc: Awọn igbi gbigbe agbara laisi gbigbe ọrọ. Ohun ati ina jẹ awọn igbi mejeeji. Optics ṣe iwadii bawo ni ina ṣe huwa - ti n ṣe afihan awọn digi, atunse nipasẹ awọn lẹnsi, ati ṣiṣẹda awọn aworan.
learnSch_physics_f2_task: Igbi ohun kan ni igbohunsafẹfẹ 440 Hz ati iyara 340 m/s. Kini gigun igbi rẹ? Lo v = fλ.
learnSch_physics_f2_kp1: Ohun rin nipasẹ ọrọ; ko le rin irin ajo nipasẹ igbale.
learnSch_physics_f2_kp2: Imọlẹ n rin ni 300,000 km/s ni igbale (c).
learnSch_physics_f2_kp3: Iṣiro: igun isẹlẹ = igun ti iṣaro.
learnSch_physics_f2_kp4: Refraction: awọn itọsi ina nigbati o ba kọja laarin awọn ohun elo ti awọn iwuwo oriṣiriṣi (ofin Snell).
learnSch_chemistry_f0_desc: Ohun gbogbo ti wa ni ṣe ti awọn ọta. Atọmu kọọkan ni arin (protons + neutroni) ti awọn elekitironi yika. Tabili igbakọọkan ṣeto awọn eroja nipasẹ nọmba atomiki wọn ati awọn ohun-ini kemikali.
learnSch_chemistry_f0_task: Erogba ni nọmba atomiki 6. Awọn proton, elekitironi, ati neutroni melo ni ¹²C ni?
learnSch_chemistry_f0_kp0: Nọmba atomiki = nọmba awọn protons; ipinnu eyi ti ano ti o jẹ.
learnSch_chemistry_f0_kp2: Awọn elekitironi gba awọn ipele agbara (awọn ikarahun); outermost elekitironi ipinnu reactivity.
learnSch_chemistry_f0_kp3: Isotopes jẹ awọn atomu ti eroja kanna pẹlu awọn nọmba oriṣiriṣi ti neutroni.
learnSch_chemistry_f0_kp4: Ionic bonds: elekitironi gbigbe. Covalent ìde: elekitironi ti wa ni pín.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_name: Awọn aati kemika ṣe atunto awọn ọta lati dagba awọn nkan titun. Reactants ti wa ni yipada si awọn ọja. Loye awọn aati ṣe iranlọwọ ninu oogun, imọ-jinlẹ ohun elo, sise, ati ile-iṣẹ.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_desc: Ṣe iwọntunwọnsi idogba yii: H₂ + O₂ → H₂O. Awọn moleku H₂ ati O₂ melo ni o nilo?
learnSch_chemistry_f1_task: Ofin ti itoju ti ibi-: awọn ọta ti wa ni ko da tabi run ni a lenu.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_kp0: Awọn idogba iwọntunwọnsi: nọmba ti atomu kọọkan gbọdọ jẹ dogba ni ẹgbẹ mejeeji.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_kp1: Oṣuwọn ifaseyin pọ si pẹlu iwọn otutu ti o ga, ifọkansi, tabi agbegbe dada.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_kp2: Awọn ayase ṣe iyara awọn aati laisi jijẹ.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_kp3: Stoichiometry nlo awọn ipin moolu lati ṣe iṣiro awọn iwọn ni awọn aati.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_kp4: Stoichiometry uses mole ratios to calculate quantities in reactions.
learnSch_chemistry_f1_tp2: Stoichiometry || Acids ati Awọn ipilẹ || Awọn acids ṣetọrẹ awọn ions hydrogen (H⁺); awọn ipilẹ gba wọn. Iwọn pH ṣe iwọn acidity lati 0 ( ekikan pupọ) si 14 (ipilẹ pupọ), pẹlu 7 jẹ didoju. Awọn aati didoju dapọ awọn acids ati awọn ipilẹ lati dagba omi ati iyọ kan.
learnSch_chemistry_f2_name: Ti o ba dapọ hydrochloric acid (HCl) pẹlu sodium hydroxide (NaOH), awọn ọja wo ni o ṣe? Kọ idogba naa.
learnSch_chemistry_f2_desc: pH <7 = ekikan (fun apẹẹrẹ pH kikan ≈ 3). pH> 7 = ipilẹ (fun apẹẹrẹ pH omi onisuga ≈ 9).
learnSch_chemistry_f2_kp0: Awọn itọkasi (bii litmus) yipada awọ ni awọn acids ati awọn ipilẹ.
learnSch_chemistry_f2_kp1: Awọn acids ti o lagbara ni kikun dissociate (HCl); awọn acids ti ko lagbara ti yapa ni apakan (CH₃COOH).
learnSch_chemistry_f2_kp2: Titration ṣe ipinnu ifọkansi aimọ nipa ifasilẹ pẹlu ojutu ti a mọ.
learnSch_biology_title: Sẹ́ẹ̀lì jẹ́ ẹ̀ka ìpìlẹ̀ gbogbo ohun alààyè. Awọn sẹẹli ṣe gbogbo awọn iṣẹ igbesi aye: gbigba agbara, idahun si agbegbe, dagba, ati ẹda. Oye awọn sẹẹli jẹ ipilẹ fun gbogbo isedale.
learnSch_biology_f0_name: Darukọ awọn iyatọ mẹta laarin sẹẹli ọgbin ati sẹẹli ẹranko pẹlu iṣẹ kan fun iyatọ kọọkan.
learnSch_biology_f0_desc: Prokaryotes (bacteria) ko ni arin; eukaryotes (eranko, eweko, elu) ni arin.
learnSch_biology_f0_task: Nucleus ni DNA ninu, apẹrẹ jiini ti sẹẹli naa.
learnSch_biology_f0_kp0: Prokaryotes (bacteria) have no nucleus; eukaryotes (animals, plants, fungi) have a nucleus.
learnSch_biology_f0_kp1: The nucleus contains DNA, the genetic blueprint of the cell.
learnSch_biology_f0_kp2: Mitochondria gbe agbara nipasẹ cellular respiration (ATP).
learnSch_biology_f0_kp3: Mitosis ṣe agbejade awọn sẹẹli ọmọbinrin kanna fun idagbasoke ati atunṣe.
learnSch_biology_f0_kp4: Meiosis ṣe agbejade awọn sẹẹli ibalopo mẹrin (gametes) pẹlu idaji nọmba chromosome.
learnSch_biology_f1_name: Ara eniyan jẹ eto ti o nipọn ti awọn eto ara ti o ṣiṣẹ papọ lati ṣetọju igbesi aye. Loye bi awọn ọna ṣiṣe wọnyi ṣe n ṣe iranlọwọ ni ilera, oogun, ati alafia ti ara ẹni.
learnSch_biology_f1_desc: Wa ipa ọna ẹmi ti atẹgun lati imu si sẹẹli iṣan. Darukọ eto eto ara ti o kan.
learnSch_biology_f1_task: Eto iṣan-ẹjẹ ti nmu ẹjẹ lọ nipasẹ ara, fifun atẹgun ati awọn ounjẹ.
learnSch_biology_f1_kp0: Eto ti ngbe ounjẹ n fọ ounjẹ sinu awọn ounjẹ ti ara le fa.
learnSch_biology_f1_kp1: Eto aifọkanbalẹ ṣe ilana alaye ati ipoidojuko awọn idahun.
learnSch_biology_f1_kp2: Homeostasis jẹ ki awọn ipo inu jẹ iduroṣinṣin (fun apẹẹrẹ iwọn otutu ara ni 37°C).
learnSch_biology_f1_kp3: Ounjẹ: awọn carbohydrates fun agbara; awọn ọlọjẹ kọ; awọn ọra tọju agbara ati daabobo awọn ara.
learnSch_biology_f1_kp4: Awọn ọna ṣiṣe ti ara || Ounjẹ
learnSch_biology_f1_tp2: Ekoloji ṣe iwadii bii awọn ohun-ara laaye ṣe nlo pẹlu ara wọn ati agbegbe wọn. Loye awọn eto ilolupo ṣe iranlọwọ fun wa lati daabobo ipinsiyeleyele, ṣakoso awọn orisun, ati koju iyipada oju-ọjọ.
learnSch_biology_f2_name: Fa oju opo wẹẹbu ounje ti o rọrun pẹlu awọn oganisimu 5. Awọn olupilẹṣẹ aami, awọn onibara akọkọ, ati awọn onibara Atẹle.
learnSch_biology_f2_desc: Ecology studies how living organisms interact with each other and their environment. Understanding ecosystems helps us protect biodiversity, manage resources, and address climate change.
learnSch_biology_f2_task: Draw a simple food web with 5 organisms. Label producers, primary consumers, and secondary consumers.
learnSch_biology_f2_kp0: Awọn olupilẹṣẹ (awọn ohun ọgbin) ṣe ounjẹ nipasẹ photosynthesis; awọn onibara jẹ wọn.
learnSch_biology_f2_kp1: Ẹwọn ounjẹ kan fihan sisan agbara: Oorun → ọgbin → herbivore → carnivore.
learnSch_biology_f2_kp2: Nikan nipa 10% ti awọn gbigbe agbara si ipele trophic atẹle.
learnSch_biology_f2_kp3: Oniruuru ẹda jẹ ki awọn ilolupo eda abemi jẹ diẹ resilient lati yipada.
learnSch_biology_f2_kp4: Iyipada oju-ọjọ ṣe iyipada awọn ibugbe, yi awọn sakani eya pada, o si da awọn oju opo wẹẹbu ru.
learnSch_biology_f2_tp1: Awọn oju opo wẹẹbu ounjẹ || Ipa oju-ọjọ
learnSch_computer_science_f0_name: Iṣiro-iṣiro jẹ ọna-iṣoro-iṣoro ti a lo ninu siseto ati ni ikọja. O fọ awọn iṣoro idiju sinu awọn ẹya ti o le ṣakoso ati rii awọn ojutu ni igbese-nipasẹ-igbesẹ ti kọnputa (tabi eniyan) le tẹle.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_desc: Kọ alugoridimu igbese-nipasẹ-igbesẹ (ni ede itele) fun tito lẹsẹsẹ deki ti o dapọ ti awọn kaadi 5 nipasẹ nọmba.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_task: Ibajẹ: fọ iṣoro nla kan si kere, awọn iṣoro iha ti o yanju.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_kp0: Idanimọ apẹẹrẹ: ṣe idanimọ awọn ibajọra ati awọn deede ni awọn iṣoro.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_kp1: Abstraction: idojukọ lori awọn pataki awọn ẹya ara ati foju awọn alaye ti ko ṣe pataki.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_kp2: Alugoridimu: lẹsẹsẹ awọn igbesẹ kan pato lati yanju iṣoro kan.
learnSch_computer_science_f0_kp3: Pseudocode ṣe iranlọwọ lati gbero algoridimu ni ede mimọ ṣaaju ifaminsi.
learnSch_computer_science_f1_desc: Siseto tumọ awọn imọran ọgbọn sinu awọn ilana ti kọnputa le ṣiṣẹ. Gbogbo eto nlo awọn oniyipada, awọn ipo, awọn lupu, ati awọn iṣẹ. N ṣatunṣe aṣiṣe - wiwa ati atunse awọn aṣiṣe - jẹ ọgbọn pataki.
learnSch_computer_science_f1_task: Kọ pseudocode tabi koodu gidi ti o beere lọwọ olumulo fun nọmba kan ki o tẹ jade boya o jẹ ajeji tabi paapaa.
learnSch_computer_science_f1_kp0: Oniyipada tọju iye kan ti o le yipada: x = 5.
learnSch_computer_science_f1_kp1: A lupu tun koodu: fun i ni ibiti (5) nṣiṣẹ ara 5 igba.
learnSch_computer_science_f1_kp2: Ọrọ-ọrọ ba ṣe ipinnu: ti x> 0: titẹ ("rere").
learnSch_computer_science_f1_kp3: A iṣẹ awọn ẹgbẹ reusable koodu: def kí(orukọ): pada "Hello" + orukọ.
learnSch_computer_science_f1_kp4: Awọn oriṣi aṣiṣe ti o wọpọ: awọn aṣiṣe sintasi (akọsilẹ ti ko tọ), awọn aṣiṣe asiko asiko (jamba), awọn aṣiṣe ọgbọn (esi ti ko tọ).
learnSch_computer_science_f2_desc: Awọn ọna oni nọmba ṣe agbekalẹ awọn amayederun ti intanẹẹti ati iširo ode oni. Loye awọn nẹtiwọọki, aṣoju data, ati cybersecurity jẹ pataki fun ẹnikẹni ti o nlo tabi imọ-ẹrọ ile.
learnSch_computer_science_f2_task: Yipada nọmba eleemewa 13 si alakomeji. Ṣe afihan iṣẹ rẹ (pin nipasẹ 2 leralera).
learnSch_computer_science_f2_kp0: Data ti wa ni ipamọ ni alakomeji (0s ati 1s): 8 die-die = 1 baiti.
learnSch_computer_science_f2_kp1: ASCII ati awọn nọmba maapu Unicode si awọn kikọ (fun apẹẹrẹ A = 65 ni ASCII).
learnSch_computer_science_f2_kp2: Intanẹẹti jẹ nẹtiwọọki agbaye ti awọn nẹtiwọọki nipa lilo awọn ilana TCP/IP.
learnSch_computer_science_f2_kp3: HTTP lo fun awọn oju-iwe wẹẹbu; HTTPS ṣe afikun fifi ẹnọ kọ nkan fun aabo.
learnSch_computer_science_f2_kp4: Ìsekóòdù sọ dátà dànù nítorí náà ẹni tí a pinnu nìkan ni ó lè kà á.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_name: Kika ati Onínọmbà || Kika ati itupalẹ kọ ọ lati loye ati ṣe iṣiro awọn ọrọ ni itara. O kọ ẹkọ lati ṣe idanimọ idi ti onkọwe, awọn ariyanjiyan igbekalẹ, ati ṣe iṣiro didara ẹri ti a lo.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_desc: Ka ìpínrọ kan lati eyikeyi nkan. Ṣe idanimọ: (1) ẹtọ akọkọ, (2) ẹri kan, (3) ojuṣaaju ti o pọju.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_task: Awọn oriṣi eto ọrọ: isọtẹlẹ, ojutu-iṣoro, ipa-fa, afiwe-itansan.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_kp0: Awọn ariyanjiyan akọkọ ni ẹtọ agbedemeji ti onkọwe fẹ ki o gba.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_kp1: Ẹri ṣe atilẹyin awọn ẹtọ: wa awọn ododo, awọn iṣiro, awọn agbasọ ọrọ amoye, ati awọn apẹẹrẹ.
learnSch_language_arts_f0_kp2: Ṣe ayẹwo orisun: ṣe onkọwe jẹ igbẹkẹle bi? Njẹ ẹri naa laipẹ ati pe o wulo?
learnSch_language_arts_f0_kp3: Iyatọ waye nigbati ọrọ kan ṣafihan ẹgbẹ kan ti ariyanjiyan.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_name: Kikọ ti o dara ṣe ibaraẹnisọrọ awọn imọran ni kedere ati ni idaniloju. Ilana naa pẹlu igbero, kikọ, atunwo, ati ṣiṣatunṣe. Igbekale ati ẹri jẹ pataki bi awọn fokabulari.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_desc: Kọ PEEL paragirafi kan (awọn gbolohun ọrọ 5-7) jiyàn pe iṣẹ amurele jẹ anfani tabi ipalara. Lo ẹ̀rí kan ṣoṣo.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_task: Ìpínrọ PEEL: Ojuami → Ẹri → Ṣe alaye → Ọna asopọ sẹhin.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_kp0: Iṣafihan arosọ kan sọ ariyanjiyan naa; Ipari naa tun sọ ọ pẹlu oye.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_kp1: Kikọ ni deede yago fun awọn ihamọ, slang, ati eniyan akọkọ ayafi ti pato.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_kp2: Formal writing avoids contractions, slang, and first-person unless specified.
learnSch_language_arts_f1_kp3: Ohun ti nṣiṣe lọwọ jẹ alaye diẹ sii: "Akeko ti yanju iṣoro naa" (kii ṣe "ti a yanju nipasẹ").
learnSch_language_arts_f1_kp4: Ṣe atunwo nigbagbogbo: ṣayẹwo ọgbọn, ẹri, girama, ati oniruuru gbolohun ọrọ.
learnSch_language_arts_f2_name: Awọn ofin girama ṣe nṣakoso bi awọn ọrọ ṣe darapọ sinu awọn gbolohun ọrọ to tọ. Awọn fokabulari ti o lagbara jẹ ki kikọ kongẹ ati idaniloju. Awọn mejeeji nilo adaṣe ti nṣiṣe lọwọ - kii ṣe kika palolo nikan.
learnSch_language_arts_f2_desc: Tun gbolohun yii kọ ni awọn akoko oriṣiriṣi mẹta: "Ẹgbẹ naa ni o ṣẹgun baramu." (ti o ti kọja, ojo iwaju, pipe bayi)
learnSch_language_arts_f2_task: Gbolohun kan nilo koko-ọrọ ati ọrọ-ọrọ kan: "O nṣiṣẹ."
learnSch_language_arts_f2_kp0: Awọn akoko fihan akoko: o rọrun bayi (ṣiṣe), ti o ti kọja (ran), ojo iwaju (yoo ṣiṣe), pipe bayi (ti ṣiṣẹ).
learnSch_language_arts_f2_kp1: Awọn gbolohun ọrọ: gbolohun akọkọ kan duro nikan; gbolohun ọrọ abẹlẹ nilo gbolohun akọkọ kan.
learnSch_language_arts_f2_kp2: Awọn aami ifamisi ṣe itọsọna fun oluka: koma = idaduro kukuru, semicolon = darapọ mọ awọn imọran ti o jọmọ.
learnSch_language_arts_f2_kp3: Awọn itọka ọrọ-ọrọ ṣe iranlọwọ iyipada awọn ọrọ ti ko mọ: wo awọn ọrọ agbegbe.
learnSch_history_title: Itan Agbaye || Itan agbaye tọpasẹ bi awọn awujọ eniyan ṣe dagbasoke ni ẹgbẹẹgbẹrun ọdun, lati awọn ọlaju atijọ nipasẹ awọn ijọba, awọn iyipada, ati awọn ogun agbaye si ilana agbaye ode oni. Itan ṣe iranlọwọ fun wa ni oye idi ti agbaye jẹ ọna ti o jẹ.
learnSch_history_f0_name: Yan iṣẹlẹ pataki kan ki o ṣalaye: (1) idi rẹ, (2) ohun ti o ṣẹlẹ, (3) ipa ti igba pipẹ.
learnSch_history_f0_desc: World history traces how human societies developed over thousands of years, from ancient civilisations through empires, revolutions, and world wars to the modern global order. History helps us understand why the world is the way it is.
learnSch_history_f0_task: Choose one major historical event and explain: (1) its cause, (2) what happened, (3) its long-term effect.
learnSch_history_f0_kp0: Mesopotamia (Iraki) ati Egipti wa laarin awọn ọlaju akọkọ ti a mọ.
learnSch_history_f0_kp1: Iyika Iṣẹ (18th-19th c.) yipada awọn ọrọ-aje lati ogbin si iṣelọpọ.
learnSch_history_f0_kp2: Ogun Àgbáyé Kìíní (1914–1918) àti Ogun Àgbáyé Kejì (1939–1945) ṣe àtúnṣe ètò ìgbékalẹ̀ àgbáyé.
learnSch_history_f0_kp3: Ogun Tutu (1947–1991) pin agbaye laarin AMẸRIKA ati Soviet Union.
learnSch_history_f0_kp4: Ijọpọ agbaye lati awọn ọdun 1990 ṣẹda awọn ọrọ-aje ati awọn aṣa ti o ni asopọ.
learnSch_history_f0_tp1: Awọn ija agbaye || Awọn orisun akọkọ
learnSch_history_f0_tp2: Awọn orisun akọkọ jẹ awọn iwe aṣẹ atilẹba tabi awọn ohun-ọṣọ lati akoko ikẹkọ - awọn lẹta, awọn ọrọ-ọrọ, awọn fọto, awọn ofin, awọn iwe akọọlẹ. Àwọn òpìtàn máa ń lò wọ́n láti tún ohun tí ó ti kọjá ṣe lọ́nà pípéye bí ó bá ti ṣeé ṣe tó.
learnSch_history_f1_name: Wa agbasọ itan kukuru kan (lati ọrọ tabi lẹta). Ṣe idanimọ onkọwe, ọjọ, ati ojuṣaaju ti o pọju kan.
learnSch_history_f1_desc: Awọn orisun akọkọ pẹlu awọn iwe-akọọlẹ, awọn ofin, awọn fọto, awọn ọrọ, ati awọn adehun.
learnSch_history_f1_task: Awọn orisun keji tumọ awọn orisun akọkọ: awọn iwe-ẹkọ, awọn itan-akọọlẹ, awọn iwe-ipamọ.
learnSch_history_f1_kp0: Beere: Tani kọ eyi? Nigbawo? Fun awọn olugbo wo? Kini irisi wọn?
learnSch_history_f1_kp1: Irẹjẹ ko jẹ ki orisun kan jẹ asan - o ṣe afihan wiwo agbaye ti onkọwe.
learnSch_history_f1_kp2: Ijẹrisi: ṣayẹwo orisun lodi si ẹri miiran lati ṣe ayẹwo igbẹkẹle.
learnSch_geography_f0_desc: Ẹkọ nipa ilẹ-aye ti ara ṣe iwadii awọn ẹya adayeba ti Earth - awọn fọọmu ilẹ, awọn odo, oju-ọjọ, ati awọn eto ilolupo. Lílóye ẹ̀ka ilẹ̀-ayé ti ara ṣàlàyé ìdí tí àwọn ìlú-ńlá, àwọn ipa-ọ̀nà oníṣòwò, àti àwọn ọ̀làjú ṣe wáyé níbi tí wọ́n ti ṣe.
learnSch_geography_f0_task: Ṣe alaye idi ti awọn iwariri-ilẹ ṣe n ṣẹlẹ pẹlu “Oruka ti Ina” ni lilo awọn tectonics awo.
learnSch_geography_f0_kp0: Awọn tectonics Plate: A pin erupẹ ilẹ si awọn awo ti o nrin, ti nfa awọn iwariri-ilẹ ati awọn onina.
learnSch_geography_f0_kp1: Iwọn omi: evaporation → condensation → ojoriro → apanirun → tun ṣe.
learnSch_geography_f0_kp2: Awọn agbegbe oju-ọjọ: Tropical, ogbele, iwọn otutu, continental, pola.
learnSch_geography_f0_kp3: Ètò odò kan ní orísun (ilẹ̀ gíga), àwọn odò, àti ẹnu (níbi tí ó ti pàdé òkun).
learnSch_geography_f0_kp4: Awọn ewu adayeba (awọn iwariri-ilẹ, awọn iṣan omi, awọn iji lile) jẹ apẹrẹ nipasẹ ilẹ-aye.
learnSch_geography_f1_name: Geography eda eniyan || Ẹkọ ilẹ-aye eniyan ṣe iwadii bii awọn eniyan ṣe nlo pẹlu agbegbe wọn ati bii wọn ṣe ṣeto aaye. Awọn koko-ọrọ pẹlu ibi ti awọn eniyan n gbe, idi ti awọn ilu ṣe dagba, ati bii ọrọ-aje ṣe yatọ ni agbaye.
learnSch_geography_f1_desc: Ṣe afiwe awọn orilẹ-ede meji nipasẹ HDI wọn. Ṣe idanimọ awọn idi meji ti ọkan le ni ipo ti o ga ju ekeji lọ.
learnSch_geography_f1_task: Ìwúwo olugbe = eniyan ÷ agbegbe. Ipon ni etikun ati awọn agbegbe olora; fọnka ni asale ati awọn oke-nla.
learnSch_geography_f1_kp0: Urbanisation: eniyan gbigbe lati igberiko si awọn agbegbe ilu fun awọn iṣẹ ati awọn iṣẹ.
learnSch_geography_f1_kp1: Awọn okunfa titari le awọn eniyan lọ (fun apẹẹrẹ osi, rogbodiyan); awọn okunfa fa wọn (fun apẹẹrẹ awọn iṣẹ, ailewu).
learnSch_geography_f1_kp2: Isọpọ agbaye: awọn ẹru, olu-ilu, eniyan, ati awọn imọran lọ kọja awọn aala diẹ sii larọwọto.
learnSch_geography_f1_kp3: Idagbasoke le jẹ iwọn nipasẹ GDP fun okoowo, ireti igbesi aye, ati ẹkọ (HDI).
learnSch_economics_f0_desc: Microeconomics ṣe iwadii bii awọn eniyan kọọkan ati awọn ile-iṣẹ ṣe ṣe awọn ipinnu nipa awọn orisun. O ṣe alaye bi a ṣe ṣeto awọn idiyele, idi ti awọn ọja yoo kuna nigbakan, ati bii awọn iwuri ṣe ṣe apẹrẹ ihuwasi.
learnSch_economics_f0_task: Ti iye owo kofi ba dide, kini o ṣẹlẹ si ibeere tii? Ṣe alaye nipa lilo awọn ọja aropo.
learnSch_economics_f0_kp0: Ibeere: bi idiyele ti ṣubu, opoiye ti a beere ga soke (ibasepo onidakeji).
learnSch_economics_f0_kp1: Ipese: bi idiyele ṣe n dide, opoiye ti a pese n dide (ibasepo taara).
learnSch_economics_f0_kp2: Iwọntunwọnsi: nibiti ipese ba pade ibeere - idiyele piparẹ ọja.
learnSch_economics_f0_kp3: Rirọ ṣe iwọn bawo ni ibeere ifura tabi ipese jẹ si awọn iyipada idiyele.
learnSch_economics_f0_kp4: Ikuna ọja: nigbati awọn ọja ba gbejade pupọ (awọn ita ita odi) tabi diẹ ju (awọn ọja gbangba).
learnSch_economics_f1_name: Isuna ti ara ẹni ṣe iranlọwọ fun ọ lati ṣakoso owo rẹ pẹlu ọgbọn. Loye ṣiṣe isunawo, fifipamọ, ati kirẹditi tumọ si pe o le ṣe awọn ipinnu alaye jakejado igbesi aye rẹ.
learnSch_economics_f1_desc: O jo'gun € 800 fun oṣu kan. Ṣe atokọ awọn ẹka 5 ti awọn inawo ati pin isuna kan fun ọkọọkan ti o ṣafikun to € 800.
learnSch_economics_f1_task: A isuna orin owo oya ati inawo. Na kere ju ti o jo'gun lati fipamọ.
learnSch_economics_f1_kp0: Ife ti o rọrun: I = P × r × t (Oṣuwọn pataki × akoko).
learnSch_economics_f1_kp1: Anfani akojọpọ n dagba awọn ifowopamọ lọpọlọpọ - bẹrẹ ni kutukutu.
learnSch_economics_f1_kp2: Compound interest grows savings exponentially — start early.
learnSch_economics_f1_kp3: Kirẹditi: yiya ni bayi ati sanpada nigbamii pẹlu iwulo; lo farabale.
learnSch_economics_f1_kp4: Owo-inawo pajawiri yẹ ki o bo osu 3-6 ti awọn inawo.
learnSch_earth_science_title: Geology || Geology ṣe iwadii igbekalẹ Earth, awọn apata ti o ṣe, ati bii o ṣe yipada ni akoko pupọ. Earth jẹ nipa ọdun 4.5 bilionu. Awọn ipele rẹ - erunrun, ẹwu, mojuto ode, inu inu - ni awọn ohun-ini oriṣiriṣi.
learnSch_earth_science_f0_name: A lava sisan cools ati ki o le. Iru awọn fọọmu apata wo? Kini o le sọ di apata metamorphic ni akoko pupọ?
learnSch_earth_science_f0_desc: Yiyi apata: igneous → sedimentary → metamorphic → pada si magma.
learnSch_earth_science_f0_task: Igneous apata dagba lati tutu magma tabi lava (fun apẹẹrẹ granite, basalt).
learnSch_earth_science_f0_kp0: Awọn apata sedimentary dagba lati awọn ipele fisinuirindigbindigbin ti erofo (fun apẹẹrẹ iyanrin, limestone).
learnSch_earth_science_f0_kp1: Awọn apata Metamorphic ti yipada nipasẹ ooru ati titẹ (fun apẹẹrẹ okuta didan, sileti).
learnSch_earth_science_f0_kp2: Plate tectonics ṣe alaye awọn iwariri-ilẹ, awọn volcanoes, ati ile oke.
learnSch_earth_science_f0_kp3: Rock ọmọ || Plate tectonics || Awọn iwariri-ilẹ
learnSch_earth_science_f0_tp0: Aworawo ṣe iwadi ohun gbogbo ti o kọja Earth - awọn aye-aye, awọn irawọ, awọn irawọ, ati agbaye funrararẹ. Eto oorun wa ti ṣẹda nipa 4.6 bilionu ọdun sẹyin. Agbaye ti wa ni ifoju lati jẹ ọdun 13.8 bilionu.
learnSch_earth_science_f0_tp1: Ṣe iṣiro: ina rin ni 300,000 km / s. Bawo ni ina ṣe rin irin-ajo ni iṣẹju 1? Ni wakati 1?
learnSch_earth_science_f1_desc: Astronomy studies everything beyond Earth — planets, stars, galaxies, and the universe itself. Our solar system formed about 4.6 billion years ago. The universe is estimated to be 13.8 billion years old.
learnSch_earth_science_f1_task: Calculate: light travels at 300,000 km/s. How far does light travel in 1 minute? In 1 hour?
learnSch_earth_science_f1_kp0: Eto oorun wa: aye orun 8 yipo Oorun. Bere fun: Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune.
learnSch_earth_science_f1_kp1: Awọn irawọ gbe agbara jade nipasẹ idapọ iparun: awọn ọta hydrogen dapọ lati ṣẹda helium.
learnSch_earth_science_f1_kp2: Ọdun imole jẹ ijinna ti ina n rin ni ọdun kan (≈9.46 trillion km).
learnSch_earth_science_f1_kp3: Ọna Milky ni galaxy wa; o ni lori 200 bilionu irawọ.
learnSch_earth_science_f1_kp4: Ilana Big Bang: Agbaye bẹrẹ bi ohun ti o gbona pupọ, aaye ipon ~ 13.8 bilionu ọdun sẹyin.
learnSch_earth_science_f1_tp1: Awọn irawọ ati awọn irawọ || Ṣiṣawari aaye
learnSch_health_title: Ilera ti ara ẹni || Ilera ti ara ẹni ni wiwa awọn isesi ati awọn yiyan ti o kan ilera ti ara ati ti ọpọlọ rẹ. Awọn iṣe ojoojumọ kekere - oorun, ounjẹ, adaṣe - ni awọn ipa igba pipẹ lori ilera.
learnSch_health_f0_name: Gbero ounjẹ iwontunwonsi pẹlu o kere ju awọn ẹgbẹ ounjẹ 4. Ṣe idanimọ ounjẹ kan ati iṣẹ rẹ fun ounjẹ kọọkan.
learnSch_health_f0_desc: Awọn agbalagba nilo wakati 7-9 ti oorun ni alẹ; odo nilo 8-10 wakati.
learnSch_health_f0_task: Ounjẹ iwontunwonsi pẹlu awọn carbohydrates, awọn ọlọjẹ, awọn ọra ti ilera, awọn vitamin, ati awọn ohun alumọni.
learnSch_health_f0_kp0: Idaraya ti ara deede (150 min/ọsẹ iwọntunwọnsi kikankikan) dinku eewu arun.
learnSch_health_f0_kp1: Hydration: ṣe ifọkansi fun ≈2 liters ti omi fun ọjọ kan da lori iṣẹ ṣiṣe ati oju-ọjọ.
learnSch_health_f0_kp2: Idena ilera: awọn ayẹwo deede, awọn ajesara, ati awọn abẹwo ehín.
learnSch_health_f1_desc: Opolo ilera jẹ pataki bi ilera ti ara. Ó nípa lórí bí a ṣe ń ronú, ìmọ̀lára, àti ìṣe wa. Loye wahala ati awọn ẹdun - ati ibiti o ti wa iranlọwọ - jẹ ọgbọn igbesi aye.
learnSch_health_f1_task: Ṣe atokọ awọn ọna ilera 3 ti o ṣakoso wahala. Se alaye idi ti kọọkan nwon.Mirza ṣiṣẹ physiologically tabi psychologically.
learnSch_health_f1_kp0: Wahala jẹ idahun deede si awọn italaya; aapọn onibaje ṣe ipalara ilera.
learnSch_health_f1_kp1: Awọn ilana: mimi jinlẹ, adaṣe ti ara, sisọ si ẹnikan, iṣakoso akoko.
learnSch_health_f1_kp2: Ibanujẹ ati ibanujẹ jẹ wọpọ - wọn jẹ awọn ipo iṣoogun, kii ṣe awọn ailagbara.
learnSch_health_f1_kp3: Iranlọwọ ọrẹ kan: gbọ laisi idajọ, ṣe atilẹyin atilẹyin ọjọgbọn.
learnSch_health_f1_kp4: Oorun, adaṣe, ati isopọpọ awujọ ṣe ilọsiwaju ilera ọpọlọ.
learnSch_health_f1_tp1: Awọn orisun iranlọwọ || Awọn isesi ilera
learnSch_health_f1_tp2: Iṣẹ ọna ati Oniru || Iṣẹ ọna wiwo
learnSch_arts_title: Iṣẹ ọna wiwo n ṣalaye awọn imọran, awọn ẹdun, ati awọn itan nipasẹ awọn aworan ati awọn nkan. Yiyaworan, kikun, ere, ati apẹrẹ gbogbo wọn lo awọn eroja ipilẹ kanna: laini, apẹrẹ, awọ, sojurigindin, aaye, ati fọọmu.
learnSch_arts_f0_name: Ṣe aworan eyikeyi ohun ni lilo awọn laini elegbegbe nikan (ilana nikan). Lẹhinna iboji agbegbe kan lati ṣafihan ijinle.
learnSch_arts_f0_desc: Kẹkẹ awọ: akọkọ (pupa, ofeefee, blue) → secondary (osan, alawọ ewe, aro).
learnSch_arts_f0_task: Awọn awọ ibaramu joko ni idakeji ara wọn lori kẹkẹ (pupa-alawọ ewe, bulu-osan).
learnSch_arts_f0_kp0: Tiwqn: bawo ni a ṣe ṣeto awọn eroja. Ofin ti awọn kẹta pin fireemu si 9 dogba awọn ẹya ara.
learnSch_arts_f0_kp1: Laini: le daba gbigbe, imolara, itọsọna.
learnSch_arts_f0_kp2: Aaye odi: abẹlẹ ni ayika koko-ọrọ kan - bi koko-ọrọ funrararẹ.
learnSch_arts_f0_kp3: Line: can suggest movement, emotion, direction.
learnSch_arts_f0_kp4: Negative space: the background around a subject — as important as the subject itself.
learnSch_music_f0_desc: Imọ ẹkọ orin jẹ ede orin. Ó ṣàlàyé bí a ṣe ṣètò àwọn ìró sínú orin aládùn, ìṣọ̀kan, àti ìró. Kika akọsilẹ orin dabi kika maapu ohun.
learnSch_music_f0_task: Pa ilu ti orin kan ti o mọ. Kọ pẹlu gigun (—) ati kukuru (·) aami. Bawo ni ọpọlọpọ lu fun igi?
learnSch_music_f0_kp0: Pitch: giga tabi irẹlẹ ti ohun kan. Iwọn ni Hz.
learnSch_music_f0_kp1: Awọn akọsilẹ lori oṣiṣẹ: Awọn laini clef Treble (EGBDF), awọn aaye (FACE).
learnSch_music_f0_kp2: Lu = pulse ti o duro. Tẹmpo = iyara (BPM). Rhythm = awọn ilana ti gun ati kukuru ohun.
learnSch_music_f0_kp3: Iwọn kan jẹ lẹsẹsẹ awọn akọsilẹ ni apẹrẹ kan pato (fun apẹẹrẹ iwọn pataki: gbogbo-gbogbo-idaji-gbogbo-gbogbo-gbogbo-idaji).
learnSch_music_f0_kp4: A kọọdu ti wa ni 3+ awọn akọsilẹ dun papo; awọn kọọdu pataki dun imọlẹ, awọn kọọdu kekere dun dudu.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_desc: Amọdaju ti ara ni awọn paati akọkọ mẹrin: ifarada ọkan ati ẹjẹ, agbara iṣan, irọrun, ati akojọpọ ara. Ikẹkọ agbegbe kọọkan n ṣe ilọsiwaju ilera ati iṣẹ nigbagbogbo.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_task: Ṣe apẹrẹ ero adaṣe ọsẹ 30-iṣẹju kan ni lilo ilana FITT. Ni o kere ju awọn oriṣi 2 ti adaṣe.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_kp0: Idaraya aerobic (miṣiṣẹ, odo) ṣe okunkun ọkan ati ẹdọforo.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_kp1: Idaraya anaerobic (gbigbe iwuwo, sprinting) kọ agbara iṣan.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_kp2: Apọju ilọsiwaju: diėdiẹ mu kikikan sii lati ma ni ilọsiwaju.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_kp3: Isinmi ati imularada jẹ nigbati awọn iṣan dagba ni okun sii.
learnSch_physical_education_f0_kp4: Ilana FITT: Igbohunsafẹfẹ, kikankikan, Akoko, Iru - awọn ọwọn ti eto ikẹkọ.
learnSch_german_language_f0_desc: Giramu German jẹ itumọ lori awọn ọran mẹrin (Nominativ, Akkusativ, Dativ, Genitiv) ti o pinnu orukọ ati awọn fọọmu nkan. Awọn ọran oye jẹ bọtini lati ṣe agbekalẹ awọn gbolohun German ti o tọ.
learnSch_german_language_f0_task: Atunkọ ninu ọran ti o pe: 'Der Hund (beißen) ___ Mann.' Fi awọn ti o tọ Akkusativ article fun 'Mann'.
learnSch_german_language_f0_kp0: Nominativ = koko-ọrọ (Ta ni iṣe naa?). Akkusativ = ohun taara (Kini?). Dativ = ohun aiṣe-taara (Lati / fun tani?). Genitiv = ohun ini.
learnSch_german_language_f0_kp1: Awọn nkan pataki yipada nipasẹ ọran: der/die/das (Nom.) → den/die/das (Akk.) → dem/der/dem (Dat.).
learnSch_german_language_f0_kp2: Ipo ọrọ-ọrọ: ni awọn gbolohun ọrọ akọkọ, ọrọ-ọrọ naa nigbagbogbo jẹ keji. Ni awọn gbolohun ọrọ abẹlẹ, ọrọ-ọrọ naa lọ si opin.
learnSch_german_language_f0_kp3: Awọn ipari ajẹmọ yipada da lori nkan ati ọran (lagbara, alailagbara, idinku idapọpọ).
learnSch_german_language_f0_kp4: Modal ọrọ-ìse (können, müssen, dürfen, sollen, wollen, mögen) nigbagbogbo so pọ pẹlu ohun ailopin ni opin.
learnSch_german_language_f1_desc: Itupalẹ ọrọ German kọ ọ lati ṣe idanimọ awọn ẹrọ kikọ, tumọ itumọ, ati kọ awọn ariyanjiyan ti a ṣeto. Awọn ọgbọn wọnyi lo si awọn ewi, awọn itan kukuru, ati prose to gun.
learnSch_german_language_f1_task: Wa apejuwe kan ati afarawe kan ninu ewi German kukuru kan. Kọ gbolohun kan ti o ṣe alaye ohun ti ọkọọkan tumọ si.
learnSch_german_language_f1_kp0: Ṣe itupalẹ ilana: ifihan, ara akọkọ, ipari (Einleitung, Hauptteil, Schluss).
learnSch_german_language_f1_kp1: Awọn ẹrọ litireso: Metapher (àkàwé), Vergleich (simile), Alliteration, Personifikation.
learnSch_german_language_f1_kp2: Awọn ọrọ Textsorte: a ṣe atupale oriki kan yatọ si ijabọ iroyin kan.
learnSch_german_language_f1_kp3: Iwe-ẹkọ (Awọn wọnyi) + ẹri (Beleg) + asọye (Deutung) = eto itupalẹ boṣewa.
learnSch_german_language_f1_kp4: Ọrọ aiṣe-taara nlo Konjunktiv I: Er sagt, er könne helfen.
learnSch_german_language_f1_tp0: Awọn oriṣi ọrọ || Awọn ẹrọ litireso
learnSch_german_language_f2_name: Kikọ German ti o dara jẹ kongẹ, ti ṣeto daradara, o si nlo awọn ọrọ-ọrọ ati awọn ipari gbolohun ọrọ oriṣiriṣi. Ṣiṣe adaṣe awọn oriṣi ọrọ ti o yatọ kọ igbẹkẹle fun awọn idanwo ati ibaraẹnisọrọ gidi-aye.
learnSch_german_language_f2_desc: Kọ 5-gbolohun Erörterung lori: 'Sollten Smartphones in der Schule verboten werden?' Lo 'einerseits…andererseits'.
learnSch_german_language_f2_task: Erörterung ( aroko asọye) ṣafihan pro ati awọn ariyanjiyan ilodi si ati ipari ti ara ẹni.
learnSch_german_language_f2_kp0: Kommentar (alaye) ṣe ariyanjiyan ipo kan pẹlu ẹri ati awọn ibeere arosọ.
learnSch_german_language_f2_kp1: Zusammenfassung (akopọ): ṣoki, ẹni-kẹta, akoko lọwọlọwọ, ko si awọn ero.
learnSch_german_language_f2_kp2: Ṣe iyatọ awọn ibẹrẹ gbolohun ọrọ: lo awọn isopọ abẹlẹ (weil, obwohl, damit, wenn) fun awọn ẹya eka.
learnSch_german_language_f2_kp3: Awọn ami ifamisi: aami idẹsẹ ṣaaju gbogbo awọn gbolohun ọrọ abẹlẹ (Nebensätze).
learnSch_religion_ethics_title: Esin & Ethics || Awọn ẹsin agbaye || Lílóye àwọn ẹ̀sìn pàtàkì lágbàáyé ń ṣèrànwọ́ láti mú ọ̀wọ̀, ìfọ̀rọ̀rora-ẹni-wò, àti ìmọ̀ àṣà ìṣẹ̀dálẹ̀ dàgbà. Aṣa atọwọdọwọ kọọkan nfunni ni awọn idahun alailẹgbẹ si awọn ibeere nipa igbesi aye, iku, idajọ, ati itumọ.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_name: Fi wé bí ẹ̀sìn méjì tó o ti kẹ́kọ̀ọ́ ṣe dáhùn ìbéèrè náà: ‘Kí ló máa ń ṣẹlẹ̀ lẹ́yìn ikú?’ Kọ awọn gbolohun ọrọ 3 fun ọkọọkan.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_desc: Kristiẹniti: igbagbọ ninu Ọlọrun kan, Jesu bi Olugbala; ọrọ mimọ = Bibeli; ~ 2.4 bilionu awọn ọmọlẹyin.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_task: Islam: igbagbo ninu Allah, Muhammad bi woli; ọrọ mimọ = Al-Qur'an; marun ọwọn dari aye ojoojumọ.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_kp0: Ẹsin Juu: monotheistic; Torah (Bibeli Heberu); 613 ofin (mitzvot); ~ 15 milionu awọn ọmọlẹyin.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_kp1: Hinduism: ọpọ awọn oriṣa, otito ti o ga julọ (Brahman); awọn imọran ti karma, dharma, isọdọtun.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_kp2: Buddhism: awọn ẹkọ ti Buddha; Òótọ́ Òótọ́ Mẹ́rin, Ọ̀nà Ìlọ́po Mẹjọ; ìlépa = Nirvana (ominira lati ijiya).
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_kp3: Awọn ẹsin agbaye || Awọn ọrọ mimọ
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_tp0: Awọn Ilana Iwa || Ethics beere: kini o tọ ati aṣiṣe, ati kilode? Awọn imọ-ọrọ ihuwasi akọkọ funni ni awọn ilana oriṣiriṣi fun ṣiṣe awọn ipinnu iwa. Lílóye wọn ràn ọ́ lọ́wọ́ láti ronú nípa àwọn ìṣòro ayé-ńlá.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_tp1: Ọkọ ayọkẹlẹ ti ara ẹni gbọdọ yan: kọlu eniyan 1 tabi yipada ki o lu 5. Ṣe itupalẹ atayanyan yii lati ọdọ alamọdaju ATI irisi deontological.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f0_tp2: Abajade (fun apẹẹrẹ Utilitarianism): ṣe idajọ awọn iṣe nipasẹ awọn abajade wọn. Ti o dara julọ fun nọmba ti o tobi julọ (Bentham, Mill).
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_name: Deontology (Kant): diẹ ninu awọn iṣe jẹ ẹtọ tabi aṣiṣe ninu ara wọn, laibikita awọn abajade. Iṣe pataki ti Ẹka: ṣe nikan bi o ṣe le ṣe gbogbo eniyan lati ṣe.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_desc: Iwa rere (Aristotle): fojusi lori iwa, kii ṣe awọn ofin. Eniyan oniwa rere yan iwọn goolu laarin awọn iwọn.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_task: Contractarianism (Rawls): idajọ jẹ ohun ti awọn eniyan onipin yoo gba si lẹhin 'iboju ti aimọkan' (laimọ ipo wọn ni awujọ).
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_kp0: Consequentialism (e.g. Utilitarianism): judge actions by their outcomes. Greatest good for the greatest number (Bentham, Mill).
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_kp1: Deontology (Kant): some acts are right or wrong in themselves, regardless of consequences. The Categorical Imperative: act only as you could will everyone to act.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_kp2: Virtue Ethics (Aristotle): focus on character, not rules. The virtuous person chooses the golden mean between extremes.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_kp3: Contractarianism (Rawls): justice is what rational people would agree to behind a 'veil of ignorance' (not knowing their place in society).
learnSch_religion_ethics_f1_kp4: Awọn ilana iṣe ti a lo: bii awọn imọ-jinlẹ wọnyi ṣe sọfun awọn ijiyan gidi - euthanasia, awọn ẹtọ ẹranko, AI, idajọ oju-ọjọ.
learnSch_social_studies_title: Tiwantiwa ati Ijọba || Loye bi awọn ijọba ṣe n ṣiṣẹ ṣe pataki fun ọmọ ilu ti nṣiṣe lọwọ. Awọn eto ijọba tiwantiwa ṣe aabo awọn ẹtọ, awọn agbara lọtọ, ati fun awọn ara ilu ni ohun nipasẹ awọn idibo.
learnSch_social_studies_f0_name: Ṣe apejuwe awọn ẹka mẹta ti ijọba ni orilẹ-ede rẹ. Fun apẹẹrẹ kan ti agbara ẹka kọọkan.
learnSch_social_studies_f0_desc: Tiwantiwa: agbara wa pẹlu awọn eniyan, ti a fihan nipasẹ awọn idibo ọfẹ ati awọn ẹtọ to ni aabo.
learnSch_social_studies_f0_task: Iyapa awọn agbara: isofin (ṣe awọn ofin), adari (ṣe awọn ofin), idajọ (awọn ofin tumọ).
learnSch_social_studies_f0_kp0: Awọn eto Federal pin agbara laarin aarin ati awọn ijọba agbegbe (fun apẹẹrẹ Germany, AMẸRIKA).
learnSch_social_studies_f0_kp1: Awọn ẹtọ eniyan jẹ gbogbo agbaye, awọn ẹtọ ti ko le ya sọtọ (fun apẹẹrẹ Ikede UN ti Awọn Eto Eda Eniyan, 1948).
learnSch_social_studies_f0_kp2: Awọn ile-igbimọ vs awọn eto ijọba: ninu awọn eto ile-igbimọ aṣofin ti wa lati ile-igbimọ aṣofin.
learnSch_social_studies_f0_tp1: Awujo ati Asa || Awujọ jẹ apẹrẹ nipasẹ aṣa, ọrọ-aje, awọn ile-iṣẹ, ati awọn ipa itan. Sociology ati awọn ẹkọ aṣa ṣe iranlọwọ fun wa ni oye aidogba, idanimọ, ati iyipada awujọ.
learnSch_social_studies_f0_tp2: Fun apẹẹrẹ kan ti bii agbaye ṣe yipada igbesi aye ojoojumọ ni orilẹ-ede rẹ. Ṣe ipa naa daadaa, odi, tabi mejeeji? Ṣe alaye.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_name: Ibaṣepọ: ilana nipasẹ eyiti awọn eniyan kọọkan kọ ẹkọ awọn ilana, awọn iye, ati awọn ipa ti awujọ wọn.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_desc: Society is shaped by culture, economy, institutions, and historical forces. Sociology and cultural studies help us understand inequality, identity, and social change.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_task: Give one example of how globalization has changed daily life in your country. Is the effect positive, negative, or both? Explain.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_kp0: Socialisation: the process by which individuals learn the norms, values, and roles of their society.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_kp1: Awujọ stratification: aidogba eleto ni awujo (kilasi, iwa, eya).
learnSch_social_studies_f1_kp2: Asa: awọn iye pinpin, awọn igbagbọ, awọn iṣe, ati awọn aami ti o so ẹgbẹ kan pọ.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_kp3: Isọdapọ agbaye ti yara paṣipaaro aṣa ati igbẹkẹle eto-ọrọ aje.
learnSch_social_studies_f1_kp4: Imọwe media: igbelewọn awọn orisun fun ojuṣaaju, irisi, ati ẹri jẹ ọgbọn pataki-ọdun 21st.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_desc: Epistemology beere: kini a le mọ, ati bawo ni a ṣe mọ ọ? O ṣe ayẹwo awọn orisun ati awọn opin ti imọ eniyan - idi, iriri, intuition, ati aṣẹ.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_task: Ṣe o ṣee ṣe lati mọ nkan kan pẹlu idaniloju pipe? Kọ esi 4-gbolohun kan lati ọdọ onipinnu ATI irisi alamọdaju.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_kp0: Rationalism (Descartes, Kant): idi ni orisun akọkọ ti imọ. 'Cogito ergo sum' - Mo ro pe, nitorina emi ni.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_kp1: Empiricism (Locke, Hume): imọ wa lati iriri ifarako. Okan bẹrẹ bi sileti ofo (tabula rasa).
learnSch_philosophy_f0_kp2: Skepticism: o yẹ ki a ṣiyemeji gbogbo awọn ẹtọ ati gba nikan ohun ti o le jẹri.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_kp3: Justified True Belief (Plato): imo = nkankan jẹ otitọ, o gbagbọ, ati awọn ti o ni idalare.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_kp4: Awọn iṣoro Gettier fihan pe igbagbọ otitọ lare ko nigbagbogbo to fun imọ.
learnSch_philosophy_f0_tp2: Imoye ti Okan ati Free Will
learnSch_philosophy_f1_name: Philosophy of Mind and Free Will
learnSch_philosophy_f1_desc: Kini okan? Njẹ a ni ominira lati ṣe awọn yiyan tootọ? Awọn ibeere wọnyi joko ni ikorita ti imoye, neuroscience, ati igbesi aye ojoojumọ.
learnSch_philosophy_f1_task: Ṣé lóòótọ́ làwọn èèyàn òmìnira? Kọ a 5-gbolohun ariyanjiyan boya fun compatibilism tabi lile determinism.
learnSch_philosophy_f1_kp0: Dualism (Descartes): okan ati ara jẹ awọn nkan lọtọ. Isoro: bawo ni wọn ṣe nlo?
learnSch_philosophy_f1_kp1: Ti ara: ọkan jẹ patapata ọja iṣẹ ṣiṣe ọpọlọ.
learnSch_philosophy_f1_kp2: Iṣẹ iṣe: awọn ipinlẹ ọpọlọ jẹ asọye nipasẹ ipa iṣẹ wọn, kii ṣe nkan ti ara wọn.
learnSch_philosophy_f1_kp3: Iṣoro lile ti aiji: kilode ti iṣelọpọ ti ara ṣe funni ni iriri ti ara ẹni?
learnSch_philosophy_f1_kp4: Ibamu: ifẹ ọfẹ ati ipinnu le wa papọ — ominira = ṣiṣe ni ibamu si awọn idi tirẹ, paapaa ti o ba ṣẹlẹ.
learnSch_technology_f0_desc: Ironu apẹrẹ jẹ ọna ti o da lori eniyan lati yanju awọn iṣoro ni ẹda ati eto. O ti lo ni apẹrẹ ọja, imọ-ẹrọ, UX, ati isọdọtun kọja gbogbo awọn ile-iṣẹ.
learnSch_technology_f0_task: Yan iṣoro kan ni ile-iwe rẹ. Waye awọn ipele ironu apẹrẹ 3 akọkọ: ṣapejuwe iṣoro naa, ṣalaye ẹniti o kan, ati ṣe ipilẹṣẹ awọn imọran 3.
learnSch_technology_f0_kp0: Awọn ipele 5: Empathize → Setumo → Ideate → Afọwọṣe → Idanwo.
learnSch_technology_f0_kp1: Empathize: loye awọn iwulo gidi awọn olumulo nipasẹ iwadii ati akiyesi.
learnSch_technology_f0_kp2: Ideate: ṣe ọpọlọpọ awọn imọran laisi idajọ; opoiye ṣaaju didara.
learnSch_technology_f0_kp3: Afọwọkọ: kọ iyara, awọn awoṣe olowo poku lati ṣe idanwo awọn imọran ṣaaju idoko-owo awọn orisun.
learnSch_technology_f0_kp4: Atunse: apẹrẹ jẹ iyipo; esi se gbogbo version.
learnSch_technology_f1_desc: Imọwe oni nọmba tumọ si agbọye bi imọ-ẹrọ ṣe n ṣiṣẹ, bii data ṣe nlo, ati bii o ṣe le lilö kiri ni agbaye oni-nọmba lailewu ati ni itara. AI n yi gbogbo aaye pada.
learnSch_technology_f1_task: Ṣe atokọ awọn oriṣi 3 ti data ara ẹni foonu rẹ n gba. Fun ọkọọkan, ṣalaye eewu kan ati anfani kan ti gbigba data yẹn.
learnSch_technology_f1_kp0: Awọn alugoridimu jẹ awọn ilana igbese-nipasẹ-igbesẹ ti awọn kọnputa tẹle. Wọn ṣe wiwa agbara, awọn iṣeduro, ati AI.
learnSch_technology_f1_kp1: Ẹkọ ẹrọ: awọn ọna ṣiṣe ti o ni ilọsiwaju lati data laisi siseto ni gbangba.
learnSch_technology_f1_kp2: Aṣiri data: loye kini awọn ohun elo n gba nipa rẹ ati bii o ṣe nlo.
learnSch_technology_f1_kp3: Alaye aiṣedeede: awọn iro jinlẹ, awọn nyoju àlẹmọ, ati imudara algorithmic jẹ ki igbelewọn to ṣe pataki.
learnSch_technology_f1_kp4: Awọn ipilẹ cybersecurity: lo awọn ọrọ igbaniwọle to lagbara, mu 2FA ṣiṣẹ, ṣe idanimọ awọn igbiyanju aṣiri.
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_desc: Larubawa ti kọ sọtun-si-osi (RTL) ni lilo awọn lẹta 28. Awọn apẹrẹ lẹta yipada da lori ipo ninu ọrọ kan (akọkọ, agbedemeji, ipari, sọtọ). Larubawa nlo awọn nomba Larubawa-Ilaorun-Indic (٠١٢٣٤٥٦٧٨٩) — awọn nọmba ti iwọ-oorun 0–9 jẹ itan-akọọlẹ lati inu iwọnyi.
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_task: Kọ awọn nọmba 1–10 ni Ila-oorun Arabic-Indic awọn nọmba (١ ٢ ٣ ...). Afiwe kọọkan pẹlu awọn oniwe-Oorun counterpart. Lẹhinna kọ ọrọ Larubawa fun “nọmba” (رقم – raqm).
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_kp0: Larubawa ti wa ni kika ati kọ lati ọtun si osi (RTL).
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_kp1: Awọn alfabeti ni awọn lẹta 28; pupọ julọ jẹ kọnsonanti. Awọn faweli nigbagbogbo ni a fihan bi awọn akọ-ọrọ (ḥarakāt).
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_kp2: Lẹta kọọkan ni to awọn fọọmu mẹrin: sọtọ (م), ibẹrẹ (مـ), agbedemeji (ـمـ), ipari (ـم).
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_kp3: Larubawa nlo awọn nọmba Larubawa-Ila-oorun-Indic: ٠ ١ ٢ ٣ ٤ ٥ ٦ ٧ ٨ ٩ (0–9). Awọn nọmba Iwọ-Oorun 0-9 wa lati iwọnyi nipasẹ mathimatiki Islam igba atijọ - ọrọ naa "awọn nọmba arabic" ni Iwọ-Oorun n tọka si awọn ipilẹṣẹ Ila-oorun wọnyi.
learnSch_arabic_language_f0_kp4: Larubawa Standard Modern (Fuṣḥā) jẹ lilo ni ẹkọ ati media; Awọn ede Darija/Levantine/Gulf yatọ nipasẹ agbegbe.
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_desc: Gírámà èdè Lárúbáwá da lórí àwọn gbòǹgbò lẹ́tà mẹ́ta (جذور) tí ó ń mú àwọn ọ̀rọ̀ tó jọra jáde. Àwọn nọ́ọ̀sì ní ìbálòpọ̀ gírámà (akọ/abo), nọ́mbà (ẹyọkan/mẹ́jì/pupọ), àti àpò. Awọn ọrọ-ọrọ jẹ idapọpọ fun eniyan, akọ-abo, ati nọmba.
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_task: Ṣe idanimọ awọn lẹta gbongbo ti: كَاتِب (onkọwe), مَكْتُوب (ti a kọ), كِتَابَة (kikọ). Kini gbongbo ti o wọpọ?
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_kp0: Ètò gbòǹgbò mẹ́ta: gbòǹgbò ك-ت-ب (k-t-b) ń fúnni ní: كَتَبَ (kataba, ó kọ), كِتَاب (kitāb, ìwé), مَكْتَبَة (maktaba, ìkàwé).
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_kp1: Awọn orukọ jẹ akọ tabi abo. Àwọn orúkọ abo sábà máa ń parí sí ة (tā' marbūṭa).
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_kp2: Meji ti wa ni akoso nipa fifi ان- (nominative) kun orukọ: كِتَابَان = iwe meji.
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_kp3: Púpọ̀ púpò: ọ̀pọ̀lọpọ̀ èdè Lárúbáwá yí àwọn fáwẹ́lì inú padà, f.eks. كِتَاب → كُتُب (awọn iwe).
learnSch_arabic_language_f1_kp4: Ọrọ-ọrọ-ọrọ-ohun-ọrọ (VSO) jẹ ilana ọrọ aiyipada ni Larubawa kilasika; SVO jẹ wọpọ ni Modern Standard Arabic.
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_desc: Ṣiṣe awọn fokabulari Arabic rọrun ni kete ti o loye eto gbongbo. Awọn ikini ti o wọpọ, awọn nọmba, ati awọn ọrọ lojoojumọ fun ọ ni ipilẹ fun ibaraẹnisọrọ gidi.
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_task: Tumọ sinu Arabic: 'O ka iwe kan.' (هو يقرأ كتاباً). Lẹhinna kọ gbolohun naa nipa lilo aṣẹ-ọrọ-akọkọ (VSO) ilana kilasika.
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_kp0: Ikini: السلام عليكم (As-salāmu ʿalaykum) — Alafia fun yin. Idahun: وعليكم السلام.
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_kp1: Awọn nọmba: وَاحِد (1), اثْنَان (2), ثَلَاثة (3), أَرْبَعَة (4), خَمۡسَة (5), سِتَّة (6), سَبْعَة (7), ثَمَانِيَة (8), عَةَ (8), عَةَ (10).
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_kp2: Ojo: الأحد (Sunday), الاثنين (Monday), الثلاثاء (Tuesday), الأربعاء (Wednesday), الخميس (Thursday), الجمعة (Friday), السبت (Saturday).
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_kp3: Awọn ọrọ-ọrọ ti o wọpọ: ذَهَبَ (dhahaba, lati lọ), أَكَلَ (akala, lati jẹun), قَرَأَ (qara'a, lati kà), كَتَبَ (kataba, lati kọ).
learnSch_arabic_language_f2_kp4: Formal vs informal: Modern Standard Arabic ti wa ni lo ninu eko; awọn oriÿi àsọyé yatọ kaakiri agbaye Arab.
learnSch_french_language_f0_desc: Pípè èdè Faransé le jẹ́ ìpèníjà fún àwọn tí ń sọ èdè Gẹ̀ẹ́sì nítorí àwọn fáwẹ́lì imú, àwọn lẹ́tà ìdákẹ́jẹ́ẹ́, àti àwọn ìsopọ̀ pẹ̀lú. Titunto si awọn ohun ni kutukutu jẹ ki sisọ ati oye rọrun pupọ.
learnSch_french_language_f0_task: Ka soke: 'Les enfants ont un ami anglais.' Samisi iru awọn asopọ ti o nilo lati ṣe. Ṣe adaṣe awọn akoko 3.
learnSch_french_language_f0_kp0: Awọn faweli ti imu: en/em, in/im/ain/ein, on/om, un — konsonanti ipari ko jẹ pe: 'bon' = /bɔ̃/.
learnSch_french_language_f0_kp1: Awọn lẹta ipalọlọ: kọnsonanti ipari maa n dakẹ (fun apẹẹrẹ 'vous' = /vu/), ayafi ṣaaju faweli (ibaraẹnisọrọ).
learnSch_french_language_f0_kp2: Asopọmọra: kọnsonanti ipari ipalọlọ deede ni a n pe nigbati ọrọ atẹle ba bẹrẹ pẹlu vowel: 'les amis' = /le.z‿ami/.
learnSch_french_language_f0_kp3: R ni French ni a guttural ohun (uvular), ko English r.
learnSch_french_language_f0_kp4: Àmì ìdáhùn: é (sé e), è (ìsí e), ê (itan), ç (asọ c = /s/), î, ô, û (ọ̀pọ̀lọpọ̀ ìtàn).
learnSch_french_language_f1_desc: Gírámà èdè Faransé ńlò àwọn orúkọ onítọ̀hún, ìsopọ̀ ọ̀rọ̀-ìṣe jákèjádò ènìyàn 6, àti ọ̀pọ̀lọpọ̀ àkókò. Imọye pataki julọ ni ṣiṣakoso lọwọlọwọ, ti o ti kọja (passé composé), ati awọn akoko aipe.
learnSch_french_language_f1_task: Conjugate 'parler' (lati sọrọ) ni akoko lọwọlọwọ fun gbogbo eniyan 6. Lẹhinna kọ awọn gbolohun ọrọ 2 nipa lilo passé composé.
learnSch_french_language_f1_kp0: Gbogbo awọn orukọ Faranse jẹ akọ tabi abo: le livre (m.), la tabili (f.). Ìwé gba: un/une, le/la, les.
learnSch_french_language_f1_kp1: Adjectives gba ni akọ ati nọmba: un grand livre / une grande maison.
learnSch_french_language_f1_kp2: Passé composé = avoir/être + ti o ti kọja participle: j'ai mangé (Mo je), il est alé (ó lọ).
learnSch_french_language_f1_kp3: Aipe (imparfait) ṣapejuwe awọn ipinlẹ ti o ti kọja ti nlọ lọwọ: je mangeais (Mo n jẹun), il faisait chaud.
learnSch_french_language_f1_kp4: Negation: ne ... pas yí ọ̀rọ̀-ìṣe náà ká: Je ne sais pas (Mi ò mọ̀).
learnSch_french_language_f1_tp0: Awọn orukọ ti akọ tabi abo || Awọn igba ọrọ-ọrọ
learnSch_french_language_f2_name: Kikọ ni Faranse nilo ifojusi si awọn ofin adehun, awọn aami ifamisi (awọn aaye ṣaaju !? ; :), ati iforukọsilẹ deede. Ilana ti o mọ - ifihan, idagbasoke, ipari - jẹ aringbungbun si kikọ ẹkọ Faranse.
learnSch_french_language_f2_desc: Kọ a 6-gbolohun French ìpínrọ lori ayanfẹ rẹ akoko. Lo o kere ju awọn asopọ ifọrọwerọ 3 ati subjunctive kan.
learnSch_french_language_f2_task: Awọn aami ifamisi Faranse ṣe afikun aaye ṣaaju: ; ! ? ati inu "guillemets" (awọn ami asọye).
learnSch_french_language_f2_kp0: Subjunctive (subjonctif) ṣe afihan iyemeji, imolara, tabi iwulo: Il faut que tu viennes.
learnSch_french_language_f2_kp1: Awọn asopọ ọrọ: d'abord (akọkọ), ensuite/puis (lẹhinna), enfin (nikẹhin), cependant (sibẹsibẹ), en effet (nitootọ).
learnSch_french_language_f2_kp2: Awọn ẹya aiṣedeede jẹ wọpọ: Il est important de + infinitive; Lori peut dire que...
learnSch_french_language_f2_kp3: Ọna kika lẹta: Madame/Monsieur (iṣisi deede), Veuillez agréer l'expression de mes salutation distinguées (isunmọ deede).
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_name: Pronunciation ati awọn ipilẹ || Ede Sipania jẹ ede ti o ni ibamu pẹlu foonu — awọn ọrọ ni a sọ ni pato bi a ti kọ. Eyi jẹ ki o jẹ ọkan ninu awọn ede ti o wa julọ fun awọn olubere. Titunto si awọn ohun ati eto asẹnti ni kutukutu jẹ bọtini.
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_desc: Samisi wahala ni: universidad, hablar, árbol, joven. Waye ofin aiyipada ki o ṣayẹwo eyi ti o nilo ami asẹnti.
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_task: Ede Sipania ni awọn faweli funfun 5: a, e, i, o, u — gbogbo wọn ni igbagbogbo.
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_kp0: Lẹta naa n dun bi 'ny' (España, mañana). Ilọpo meji naa dabi 'y' ni ọpọlọpọ awọn ede-ede.
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_kp1: Wahala: awọn ọrọ ti o pari ni vowel kan, n, tabi s ni a tẹnu mọ lori syllable keji-si-kẹhin. Awọn ami asẹnti (á, é) dojukọ eyi.
learnSch_spanish_language_f0_kp3: Awọn ede-ede: Castilian (Spain) nlo /θ/ fun c/z; Latin American Spani nlo /s/.
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_name: Gírámà èdè Sípáníìṣì jẹ́ ètò àti déédéé. Titunto si akọ abo, awọn ifunmọ ọrọ-ọrọ, ati awọn akoko meji ti o ti kọja (preterite ati aipe) fun ọ ni awọn irinṣẹ lati ṣe ibaraẹnisọrọ pẹlu igboya.
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_desc: Ṣe alaye igba lati lo ser vs. estar. Kọ 4 awọn gbolohun ọrọ apẹẹrẹ: 2 pẹlu ser, 2 pẹlu estar.
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_task: Awọn orukọ jẹ akọ tabi abo: el libro (m.), la mesa (f.). Adjectives gba: un libro intereresante / una mesa intereresante.
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_kp0: Ser vs estar: mejeeji tumọ si 'lati jẹ'. Ser = yẹ tẹlọrun; estar = ibùgbé ipinle: Soy médico / Estoy cansado.
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_kp1: Preterite (indefinido) = pari ti o ti kọja: Ayer comí pizza. Aipe (imperfecto) = ti nlọ lọwọ kọja: Cuando era niño, jugaba...
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_kp2: Awọn ọrọ-ọrọ ti o ni ifọkansi: me lavo (Mo wẹ ara mi), se llama (orukọ rẹ ni).
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_kp3: Reflexive verbs: me lavo (I wash myself), se llama (his/her name is).
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_kp4: Subjunctive fun lopo lopo / iyemeji: Quiero que vengas. Es posible que llueva.
learnSch_spanish_language_f1_tp0: Ser vs estar || Awọn igba ọrọ-ọrọ
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_name: Kikọ ede Spani tẹle awọn apejọ ti o han gbangba. Awọn ọrọ ẹkọ ẹkọ lo iforukọsilẹ deede, lakoko ti ibaraẹnisọrọ lojoojumọ nigbagbogbo gbona ati taara. Aṣẹ ti o lagbara ti awọn asopo ati subjunctive gbe kikọ rẹ ga.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_desc: Kọ imeeli kukuru kan (awọn gbolohun ọrọ 6) ni ede Spani pipe ọrẹ kan si ayẹyẹ ọjọ-ibi kan. Lo iforukọsilẹ deede ati alaye - lẹhinna ṣe afiwe wọn.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_task: Ede Sipania nlo ibeere yipo ¿ ati exclamation ¡ami ni ibẹrẹ awọn gbolohun ọrọ.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_kp0: Iforukọsilẹ deede: usted (iwọ deede), ko si awọn ihamọ, subjunctive fun awọn ibeere towotowo.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_kp1: Awọn asopọ: sin embargo (sibẹsibẹ), además (siwaju sii), por lo tanto (nitorinaa), aunque (biotilejepe), es decir (iyẹn).
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_kp2: Ṣiṣii lẹta: Estimado/a Sr./Sra. + oruko idile. Tilekun: Le saluda atentamente / Un cordial saludo.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_kp3: Ilana aroko: introducción (tesis), desarrollo (argumentos con ejemplos), ipari.
learnSch_spanish_language_f2_kp4: Formal la informal Forukọsilẹ || Awọn asopọ
learnSch_english_as_foreign_language_tit: Gírámà èdè Gẹ̀ẹ́sì jẹ́ ọ̀rọ̀ ìpìlẹ̀ ṣùgbọ́n ó ní ọ̀pọ̀lọpọ̀ àwọn ìlànà tí kò tọ́. Loye awọn akoko, awọn nkan, ati awọn ọrọ-ọrọ modal jẹ bọtini si ibaraẹnisọrọ deede.
learnSch_english_as_foreign_language_f0_: Tun awọn gbolohun ọrọ ti nṣiṣe lọwọ kọ ni ohùn palolo: (1) 'Olukọni ṣe alaye ẹkọ naa.' (2) 'Awọn onimo ijinlẹ sayensi ṣe awari eya tuntun kan.'
Gẹ̀ẹ́sì ní àwọn ọ̀rọ̀ ìse méjìlá. O wọpọ julọ: lọwọlọwọ ti o rọrun (Mo ṣiṣẹ), ilọsiwaju lọwọlọwọ (Mo n ṣiṣẹ), ti o ti kọja ti o rọrun (Mo ṣiṣẹ), pipe lọwọlọwọ (Mo ti ṣiṣẹ).
Rewrite these active sentences in passive voice: (1) 'The teacher explained the lesson.' (2) 'Scientists discovered a new species.'
English has 12 verb tenses. The most common: simple present (I work), present continuous (I am working), simple past (I worked), present perfect (I have worked).
Awọn nkan: 'a/an' fun awọn orukọ ti kii ṣe pato (iwe kan); 'awọn' fun awọn orukọ pato (iwe ti a jiroro).
Awọn ọrọ-ọrọ awoṣe (le, le, gbọdọ, yẹ, yoo, fẹ, le, le) agbara han, igbanilaaye, ọranyan, tabi iṣeeṣe.
Awọn ipo: Ti + o rọrun ti o ti kọja → yoo + ailopin (ipo keji: Ti MO ba ni akoko, Emi yoo rin irin-ajo).
Ohùn palolo: Ohun naa di koko-ọrọ: 'Akẹẹkọ ti kọ iwe naa.'
Kika ati oye || Imọye kika ti o lagbara tumọ si agbọye itumọ ti o fojuhan, ṣiṣe awọn itọkasi, ati iṣiro idi ati ilana onkọwe. O ṣe pataki fun aṣeyọri ẹkọ ni eyikeyi koko-ọrọ.
learnSch_english_as_foreign_language_f1_: Ka eyikeyi nkan iroyin paragira kan. Kọ̀wé: (1) kókó pàtàkì, (2) ẹ̀rí kan tí a fifúnni, (3) ìdí tí òǹkọ̀wé náà fi ní lọ́kàn.
Skimming: ka ni kiakia lati gba ero akọkọ. Ṣiṣayẹwo: wa awọn alaye ni pato.
Itọkasi: kika 'laarin awọn ila' - kini o tumọ ṣugbọn ko sọ taara?
Idi onkọwe: lati sọ fun, yipada, ṣe ere, tabi ṣapejuwe.
Fokabulari ni ipo: lo awọn ọrọ agbegbe lati ṣiṣẹ itumọ awọn ọrọ aimọ.
Kika to ṣe pataki: ṣe idanimọ awọn ẹtọ, ṣe ayẹwo ẹri, ati awọn arosọ ibeere.
Awọn ogbon imọran || Lominu ni kika

Kikọ Gẹẹsi ti ile-ẹkọ ẹkọ tẹle awọn apejọ mimọ: iforukọsilẹ deede, awọn ọrọ asọye, ati igbekalẹ ọgbọn. Titunto si awọn apejọ wọnyi ṣe iranlọwọ ni awọn idanwo, awọn ohun elo ile-ẹkọ giga, ati igbesi aye alamọdaju.
learnSch_english_as_foreign_language_f2_: Academic English writing follows clear conventions: formal register, precise vocabulary, and logical structure. Mastering these conventions helps in exams, university applications, and professional life.
Kọ a 5-gbolohun ifihan fun aroko ti lori: 'Ipa ti awujo media lori odomobirin opolo ilera.' Fi alaye iwe afọwọkọ kan kun.
Ẹya aroko: Ifaara (kio + ọrọ-ọrọ + iwe afọwọkọ), Ara (ojuami, ẹri, alaye fun paragirafi), Ipari (akọsilẹ atunto + pataki pataki).
Gbólóhùn Thesis: gbolohun kan ti o han gbangba ti o sọ ariyanjiyan akọkọ ti aroko ti.
Ede idabo ni kikọ ẹkọ: 'O le ṣe jiyan pe…', 'Ẹri daba…', 'Eyi le tọka…'
Yago fun ede ti kii ṣe alaye: maṣe lo awọn ihamọ (maṣe → maṣe), slang, tabi alaye ẹni akọkọ ayafi ti o ba beere.
Itọkasi: tọka awọn orisun ni deede (APA, MLA, Harvard) lati yago fun ikọlu.
learnUni_mathematics_f0_desc: Iṣiro jẹ mathimatiki iyipada. Iṣiro iyatọ wa awọn oṣuwọn iyipada (awọn itọsẹ); Iṣiro apapọ n wa awọn iwọn ti a kojọpọ (awọn akojọpọ). O ṣe atilẹyin fisiksi, imọ-ẹrọ, eto-ọrọ, ati gbogbo awọn imọ-jinlẹ pipo.
learnUni_mathematics_f0_task: Wa itọsẹ ti f(x) = 3x³ - 2x² + 5x - 7. Ṣe afihan igbesẹ kọọkan nipa lilo ofin agbara.
learnUni_mathematics_f0_kp0: Idiwọn kan ṣe apejuwe iye ti iṣẹ kan n sunmọ bi x ti n sunmọ aaye kan.
learnUni_mathematics_f0_kp1: Itọsẹ: f'(x) = oṣuwọn iyipada. Fun f(x) = xⁿ, f'(x) = nxⁿ⁻¹ (ofin agbara).
learnUni_mathematics_f0_kp3: Integral = agbegbe labẹ a ti tẹ. ∫xⁿ dx = xⁿ⁺¹/(n+1) + C.
learnUni_mathematics_f0_kp4: Ilana pataki ti iṣiro: iyatọ ati isọpọ jẹ awọn iṣẹ onidakeji.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_name: Algebra Laini || Algebra laini ni mathimatiki ti awọn fekito, matrices, ati awọn iyipada laini. O ṣe pataki ni ẹkọ ẹrọ, awọn aworan kọnputa, imọ-ẹrọ, ati imọ-jinlẹ data.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_desc: Ṣe isodipupo matrix A = [[1,2], [3,4]] nipasẹ matrix B = [[5,6], [7,8]]. Ṣe afihan gbogbo awọn iṣiro.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_task: A fekito ni titobi ati itọsọna. Vectors le fi kun ati iwọn.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_kp0: Matrix duro fun iyipada laini tabi eto awọn idogba.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_kp1: Ilọpo Matrix kii ṣe commutative: AB ≠ BA ni gbogbogbo.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_kp2: Ipinnu: scalar ti o sọ boya matrix jẹ aiyipada. det (A) = 0 → kii ṣe iyipada.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_kp3: Eigenvalues ​​ati eigenvectors: Av = λv. Lo ninu PCA, fisiksi, ati Google's PageRank.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_kp4: Vectors ati matrices || Awọn iyipada laini
learnUni_mathematics_f1_tp1: Awọn iṣiro ile-ẹkọ giga n gbe lati ijuwe si inferential - lilo data ayẹwo lati fa awọn ipinnu nipa awọn olugbe. Ilana iṣeeṣe pese ipilẹ to lagbara.
learnUni_mathematics_f1_tp2: Apeere ti awọn ọmọ ile-iwe 30 ni iwọn giga 170 cm, SD 8 cm. Ṣe iṣiro aarin igba igbẹkẹle 95%.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_name: Oniyipada ID: oniyipada ti iye rẹ jẹ ipinnu nipasẹ iṣẹlẹ laileto.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_desc: Pinpin deede: igbọnwọ agogo, tumọ = agbedemeji = ipo; 68-95-99.7 ofin.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_task: Idanwo arosọ: H₀ (asan) vs H₁ (yiyan). p-iye <0.05 → kọ H₀.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_kp0: Aarin igbẹkẹle: iwọn ninu eyiti paramita tootọ wa pẹlu iṣeeṣe ti a sọ.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_kp1: Olusọdipúpọ r: -1 = odi pipe, 0 = ko si ibatan laini, +1 = rere pipe.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_kp2: Hypothesis testing: H₀ (null) vs H₁ (alternative). p-value < 0.05 → reject H₀.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_kp3: Confidence interval: range in which the true parameter lies with stated probability.
learnUni_mathematics_f2_kp4: Correlation coefficient r: −1 = perfect negative, 0 = no linear relationship, +1 = perfect positive.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_desc: Awọn idogba iyatọ ṣe apejuwe bi awọn iwọn ṣe yipada pẹlu ọwọ si awọn iwọn miiran. Wọn jẹ ede ti fisiksi, imọ-ẹrọ, isedale, ati eto-ọrọ-aje - ṣe apẹẹrẹ ohun gbogbo lati idagbasoke olugbe si awọn orbits aye.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_task: Yanju dy/dx = 2xy pẹlu y (0) = 1. Awọn oniyipada lọtọ, ṣepọ, lo ipo ibẹrẹ.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_kp0: ODE kan (idogba iyatọ deede) kan pẹlu awọn itọsẹ pẹlu ọwọ si oniyipada kan: dy/dx = f(x, y).
learnUni_mathematics_f3_kp1: ODE Iyapa: dy/dx = g(x) · h (y) → awọn oniyipada lọtọ ati ṣepọ ẹgbẹ mejeeji.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_kp2: ODE laini aṣẹ-kini: dy/dx + P(x)y = Q(x), ti a yanju pẹlu ifosiwewe isọpọ μ = e^∫P(x) dx.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_kp3: ODE laini aṣẹ-keji pẹlu awọn iye-iye nigbagbogbo: ay″ + by′ + cy = 0. Yanju nipasẹ idogba abuda ar² + br + c = 0.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_kp4: Awọn iṣoro iye akọkọ (IVP): lo awọn ipo ibẹrẹ ti a fun lati wa ojutu kan pato igbagbogbo C.
learnUni_mathematics_f3_tp1: Awọn ODE Laini || Awọn ohun elo ni fisiksi
learnUni_mathematics_f3_tp2: Awọn nọmba eka || Awọn nọmba eka ti o fa awọn nọmba gidi pọ si nipa iṣafihan i = √(-1). Wọn ṣe pataki ni imọ-ẹrọ itanna, sisẹ ifihan agbara, awọn ẹrọ kuatomu, ati itupalẹ eka.
learnUni_mathematics_f4_name: Express z = 1 + i ni pola fọọmu. Wa modulus rẹ, ariyanjiyan, ko si kọ bi re^(iθ).
learnUni_mathematics_f4_desc: Nọmba eka kan: z = a + bi, nibiti a jẹ apakan gidi ati b apakan alaro.
learnUni_mathematics_f4_kp0: Fọọmu pola: z = r (cosθ + i·sinθ) = re^(iθ) (agbekalẹ Euler).
learnUni_mathematics_f4_kp2: Polar form: z = r(cosθ + i·sinθ) = re^(iθ) (Euler's formula).
learnUni_mathematics_f4_kp3: Idanimọ Euler: e^(iπ) + 1 = 0 — nigbagbogbo ti a npe ni idogba lẹwa julọ ni mathematiki.
learnUni_mathematics_f4_kp4: Ilana ti De Moivre: (cosθ + isinθ)ⁿ = cos(nθ) + i·sin(nθ).
learnUni_physics_f0_name: Awọn mekaniki kilasika ṣe apejuwe iṣipopada ti awọn nkan macroscopic nipa lilo awọn ofin Newton. Lagrangian ati awọn ẹrọ Hamiltonian jẹ awọn atunṣe ti o lagbara diẹ sii ti a lo ninu fisiksi ilọsiwaju.
learnUni_physics_f0_desc: Ọja ti o ni iwọn 3 kg ti o yọ si isalẹ idagẹrẹ ti ko ni ija ti 30°. Ṣe iṣiro isare rẹ nipa lilo ofin 2nd Newton.
learnUni_physics_f0_task: Ofin 2nd Newton ni fọọmu fekito: ΣF = ma.
learnUni_physics_f0_kp0: Itoju ipa: lapapọ ipa ti eto pipade jẹ igbagbogbo.
learnUni_physics_f0_kp1: Itoju ti agbara: ninu eto pipade, lapapọ agbara ẹrọ jẹ igbagbogbo.
learnUni_physics_f0_kp2: Ipa angula L = Iω (akoko inertia × iyara angula).
learnUni_physics_f0_kp3: Lagrangian mekaniki: L = T - V (kinetic iyokuro agbara agbara). Euler-Lagrange idogba nianfani išipopada.
learnUni_physics_f1_name: Electromagnetism ṣopọ ina, oofa ati ina. Awọn idogba mẹrin ti Maxwell ṣapejuwe awọn iyalẹnu eletiriki ati asọtẹlẹ awọn igbi itanna eletiriki.
learnUni_physics_f1_desc: Sọ ofin Faraday ki o fun ohun elo gidi-aye kan (fun apẹẹrẹ monomono tabi oluyipada).
learnUni_physics_f1_task: State Faraday’s law and give one real-world application (e.g. electric generator or transformer).
learnUni_physics_f1_kp0: Ofin Coulomb: F = kq₁q₂/r² (agbara laarin awọn idiyele).
learnUni_physics_f1_kp1: Ofin Gauss: ṣiṣan ina nipasẹ ilẹ pipade ∝ idiyele ti a fipa mọ.
learnUni_physics_f1_kp2: Ofin Faraday: iyipada oofa ṣiṣan nfa EMF kan.
learnUni_physics_f1_kp3: Awọn idogba Maxwell sọ asọtẹlẹ pe awọn igbi itanna eleto rin ni iyara ti ina.
learnUni_physics_f1_kp4: Imọlẹ jẹ igbi itanna eletiriki: Awọn aaye E ati B oscillate papẹndikula si ara wọn ati si itọsọna irin-ajo.
learnUni_computer_science_f0_name: Awọn ẹya data ati awọn alugoridimu
learnUni_computer_science_f0_desc: Awọn ẹya data ṣeto data daradara; algoridimu ilana ti o. Yiyan eto data to tọ ati algorithm pinnu boya eto kan nṣiṣẹ ni milliseconds tabi awọn wakati lori awọn ipilẹ data nla.
learnUni_computer_science_f0_task: Wa kakiri nipasẹ wiwa alakomeji lori titobi lẹsẹsẹ [2, 5, 8, 12, 16, 23] n wa 12. Awọn igbesẹ melo?
learnUni_computer_science_f0_kp0: orun: ti o wa titi-iwọn, O (1) wiwọle. Atokọ ti o somọ: iwọn agbara, iwọle O(n).
learnUni_computer_science_f0_kp1: Akopọ (LIFO) ati Queue (FIFO): ti a lo ninu awọn ọna ṣiṣe ṣipada, irin-ajo BFS/DFS.
learnUni_computer_science_f0_kp2: Tabili Hash: O(1) wiwa apapọ nipa lilo iṣẹ hash.
learnUni_computer_science_f0_kp3: Wiwa alakomeji: O(log n) - nilo data ti o to lẹsẹsẹ. Iwadi laini: O(n).
learnUni_computer_science_f0_kp4: Akọsilẹ Big-O ṣe iwọn bi akoko asiko ṣe ndagba pẹlu iwọn titẹ sii: O(1) <O(log n) <O(n) <O(n²).
learnUni_computer_science_f0_tp0: Awọn akojọpọ ati awọn atokọ || Awọn algoridimu tito lẹsẹsẹ
learnUni_computer_science_f1_desc: Awọn apoti isura infomesonu tọju ati ṣeto awọn data fun imupadabọ daradara ati ifọwọyi. Awọn apoti isura infomesonu ibatan lo awọn tabili ati SQL; Awọn apoti isura infomesonu NoSQL mu data ti a ko ṣeto tabi pinpin.
learnUni_computer_science_f1_task: Kọ ibeere SQL kan lati wa gbogbo awọn ọmọ ile-iwe ti o ni ipele ti o ga ju 80 lati tabili ti a pe ni “awọn ọmọ ile-iwe” pẹlu awọn ọwọn (id, orukọ, ite).
learnUni_computer_science_f1_kp0: Ibi ipamọ data ibatan n tọju data sinu awọn tabili (awọn ori ila = awọn igbasilẹ, awọn ọwọn = awọn abuda).
learnUni_computer_science_f1_kp1: Ibeere YAN SQL: Yan iwe LATI tabili NIBI IṢE ipo BEERE BY iwe.
learnUni_computer_science_f1_kp2: Bọtini alakọbẹrẹ: idamo alailẹgbẹ fun ila kọọkan. Bọtini ajeji: awọn ọna asopọ awọn ori ila kọja awọn tabili.
learnUni_computer_science_f1_kp3: Darapọ mọ awọn ori ila lati awọn tabili pupọ: INU INER da awọn ila ti o baamu pada.
learnUni_computer_science_f1_kp4: Awọn ohun-ini ACID: Atomity, Aitasera, Ipinya, Itọju - ṣe idaniloju awọn iṣowo igbẹkẹle.
learnUni_economics_f0_desc: Macroeconomics ṣe iwadii ọrọ-aje lapapọ: GDP, afikun, alainiṣẹ, eto eto-owo ati inawo. Awọn banki aringbungbun ati awọn ijọba lo awọn irinṣẹ wọnyi lati ṣe agbega idagbasoke iduroṣinṣin.
learnUni_economics_f0_task: Ti ile-ifowopamọ aringbungbun ba gbe awọn oṣuwọn iwulo, kini yoo ṣẹlẹ si yiya, idoko-owo, ati afikun? Ṣe alaye pq ti awọn ipa.
learnUni_economics_f0_kp0: GDP = C + I + G + (X-M): agbara + idoko-owo + inawo ijọba + awọn okeere apapọ.
learnUni_economics_f0_kp1: Ifowopamọ: igbega gbogbogbo ni awọn idiyele. Deflation: ṣubu ni awọn idiyele. Mejeeji le jẹ ipalara ti o ba jẹ iwọn.
learnUni_economics_f0_kp2: Alainiṣẹ: frictional (laarin awọn iṣẹ), igbekale (aiṣedeede awọn ọgbọn), cyclical (ipadasẹhin).
learnUni_economics_f0_kp3: Awọn ile-ifowopamọ aringbungbun gbe awọn oṣuwọn iwulo lati ja afikun; dinku wọn lati mu idagbasoke dagba.
learnUni_economics_f0_kp4: Awọn ọrọ-aje Keynesian: awọn ijọba yẹ ki o pọ si inawo lakoko awọn ipadasẹhin.
learnUni_economics_f0_tp0: GDP ati idagbasoke || Ifowopamọ ati isọkusọ
learnUni_biology_f0_name: isedale molikula ṣe iwadi awọn ilana molikula ti igbesi aye - ẹda DNA, transcription, itumọ, ati ilana ilana jiini. O jẹ ipilẹ ti imọ-ẹrọ imọ-ẹrọ, oogun, ati awọn Jiini.
learnUni_biology_f0_desc: Fi fun ọkọọkan DNA ATG-GCC-TAA, kini ọkọọkan mRNA? (Rọpo T pẹlu U, ati A↔T, C↔G)
learnUni_biology_f0_task: DNA → RNA → Amuaradagba: ẹkọ aarin ti isedale molikula.
learnUni_biology_f0_kp0: Transcription: DNA ti wa ni daakọ sinu ojiṣẹ RNA (mRNA) ni arin.
learnUni_biology_f0_kp1: Itumọ: awọn ribosomes ka mRNA ati pe awọn amino acid jọ sinu amuaradagba kan.
learnUni_biology_f0_kp2: Codon jẹ ọkọọkan 3-nucleotide ti o nfi kooduopo amino acid kan.
learnUni_biology_f0_kp3: CRISPR-Cas9: ohun elo ṣiṣatunṣe jiini ti o le ge ni deede ati yipada awọn ilana DNA.
learnUni_biology_f0_tp2: Awọn Jiini ṣe alaye bi a ṣe jogun awọn iwa. Itankalẹ ṣe alaye bi awọn eya ṣe yipada ni akoko nipasẹ yiyan adayeba ati iyatọ jiini. Papọ wọn ṣe alaye iyatọ ti igbesi aye.
learnUni_biology_f1_name: Lo square Punnett kan lati fi agbelebu Aa × Aa han. Kini genotype ati awọn ipin phenotype?
learnUni_biology_f1_desc: Awọn ofin Mendel: ofin ti ipinya (alleles ya sọtọ lakoko iṣelọpọ gamete); ofin ti ominira oriṣiriṣi.
learnUni_biology_f1_task: Olokiki alleles boju ipadasẹhin alleles ni heterozygote (Aa).
learnUni_biology_f1_kp0: Mendel’s laws: law of segregation (alleles separate during gamete formation); law of independent assortment.
learnUni_biology_f1_kp1: Dominant alleles mask recessive alleles in a heterozygote (Aa).
learnUni_biology_f1_kp2: Iwọntunwọnsi Hardy-Weinberg: awọn igbohunsafẹfẹ allele duro nigbagbogbo ni isansa ti itankalẹ.
learnUni_biology_f1_kp3: Aṣayan Adayeba: awọn ẹni-kọọkan pẹlu awọn abuda to dara julọ si agbegbe ye ki o ṣe ẹda diẹ sii.
learnUni_biology_f1_kp4: Awọn iyipada jẹ orisun ti o ga julọ ti iyatọ jiini; julọ ​​ni didoju.
learnUni_biology_f1_tp0: Mendelian Jiini || Awọn Jiini olugbe || Adayeba yiyan
learnUni_education_pedagogy_title: Ẹkọ & Ikẹkọ || Statistics & Data Science || Cybersecurity
learnUni_nutrition_dietetics_title: Thermodynamics ṣe iwadii ooru, iwọn otutu, ati iyipada agbara sinu iṣẹ. Awọn ofin akọkọ mẹta ṣe akoso gbogbo ẹrọ igbona, firiji, ati iṣesi kemikali lori Earth. Agbọye thermodynamics ṣe alaye idi ti awọn ẹrọ ko le jẹ 100% daradara ati idi ti yinyin ṣe yo nigbati o ba fi ọwọ kan.
learnSch_physics_f3_name: Awọn iwọn otutu ṣe iwọn agbara kainetik apapọ ti awọn patikulu; a wọn wọn ni Kelvin (K) tabi Celsius (°C).
learnSch_physics_f3_desc: Ofin 1st ti Thermodynamics: agbara ti wa ni ipamọ - ooru ti a ṣafikun si eto kan dọgba iyipada ninu agbara inu pẹlu iṣẹ ṣiṣe (ΔU = Q - W).
learnSch_physics_f3_kp0: Ofin 2nd: ooru n ṣàn lẹẹkọkan lati gbona si tutu, kii ṣe iyipada. Entropy (aiṣedeede) nigbagbogbo pọ si ni eto ti o ya sọtọ.
learnSch_physics_f3_kp1: Agbara ooru kan pato (c): Q = mcΔT - agbara ti o nilo lati gbe 1 kg ti nkan kan nipasẹ 1 °C.
learnSch_physics_f3_kp2: Iṣiṣẹ ti ẹrọ igbona: η = W/Q_hot = 1 - T_cold/T_hot (Iṣẹ Carnot — o pọju imọ-jinlẹ).
learnSch_physics_f3_kp3: Idina irin 200 g (c = 0.45 J/g · ° C) jẹ kikan lati 20 °C si 100 °C. Elo agbara ni a nilo? Lẹhinna ṣe iṣiro ṣiṣe Carnot ti ẹrọ ti n ṣiṣẹ laarin 500 K ati 300 K.
learnSch_physics_f3_kp4: Efficiency of a heat engine: η = W/Q_hot = 1 − T_cold/T_hot (Carnot efficiency — the theoretical maximum).
learnSch_physics_f3_task: A 200 g iron block (c = 0.45 J/g·°C) is heated from 20 °C to 100 °C. How much energy is needed? Then calculate the Carnot efficiency of an engine operating between 500 K and 300 K.
learnSch_physics_f3_tp0: Ooru ati otutu || Awọn ofin ti thermodynamics
learnSch_physics_f4_name: Fisiksi iparun n ṣawari ọna ti awọn iparun atomiki ati awọn ipa ti o mu wọn papọ. Awọn ekuro aiduroṣinṣin tu agbara silẹ bi itankalẹ lati de ipo iduroṣinṣin diẹ sii. Awọn aati iparun ṣe agbara oorun, awọn ohun ọgbin iparun, ati ṣalaye ipilẹṣẹ ti awọn eroja ninu awọn irawọ.
learnSch_physics_f4_desc: Nucleus ni awọn protons (rere) ati neutroni (aiṣedeede), ti o waye papọ nipasẹ agbara iparun ti o lagbara - o lagbara pupọ ju ifasilẹ elekitirota.
learnSch_physics_f4_kp0: Alpha (α) ibajẹ njadejade iparun helium (2 protons + 2 neutroni). Beta (β) ibajẹ njade itanna tabi positron jade. Ibajẹ Gamma (γ) ṣe itusilẹ itanna itanna eleto giga.
learnSch_physics_f4_kp1: Igbesi aye idaji: akoko fun idaji awọn ayẹwo ipanilara si ibajẹ. Lẹhin awọn igbesi aye idaji, ida ti o ku jẹ (½)ⁿ.
learnSch_physics_f4_kp2: Idogba agbara-agbara: E = mc² — ibi-kekere kan yipada si agbara nla (c = 3×10⁸ m/s).
learnSch_physics_f4_kp3: Fission pin ipin ti o wuwo (fun apẹẹrẹ ²³⁵U) itusilẹ agbara; idapọ darapọ mọ awọn ekuro ina (fun apẹẹrẹ ²H + ³H → ⁴He) n tu agbara diẹ sii paapaa fun ibi-ẹyọkan.
learnSch_physics_f4_kp4: Isotope ipanilara kan ni igbesi aye idaji ti ọdun 5. Ti o ba bẹrẹ pẹlu 80 g, melo ni o wa lẹhin ọdun 15? Kọ kọọkan igbese. Lẹhinna lo E = mc² lati wa agbara ti a tu silẹ ti 1 g ti ibi-nla ba yipada patapata si agbara.
learnSch_physics_f4_tp1: Fission ati idapọ || Awọn ipilẹ Fisiksi kuatomu
learnSch_physics_f4_tp2: Fisiksi kuatomu ṣe apejuwe ihuwasi ti ọrọ ati agbara ni atomiki ati iwọn subatomic. Ni ipele yii, awọn patikulu huwa bi awọn igbi, agbara wa ni awọn apo-iwe ọtọtọ (quanta), ati iṣe ti wiwọn yoo ni ipa lori ohun ti a ṣe akiyesi. Fisiksi kuatomu labẹ awọn lasers, semikondokito, ati awọn ọlọjẹ MRI.
learnSch_physics_f5_name: Ibasepo Planck: agbara photon jẹ E = hf, nibiti h = 6.63×10⁻³⁴ J·s (iduroṣinṣin Planck) ati f jẹ igbohunsafẹfẹ.
learnSch_physics_f5_desc: Ipa Photoelectric: ina n jade awọn elekitironi lati awọn irin roboto - ṣe afihan ina huwa bi awọn patikulu (awọn fọto). Einstein gba Ebun Nobel fun alaye yii.
learnSch_physics_f5_kp0: Igbi-patiku duality: elekitironi (ati gbogbo awọn patikulu) huwa bi awọn igbi mejeeji ati awọn patikulu; de Broglie wefulenti λ = h/(mv).
learnSch_physics_f5_kp1: Ilana aidaniloju Heisenberg: Δx · Δp ≥ ℏ/2 - o ko le mọ ipo mejeeji ati ipa ti patiku ni deede ni akoko kanna.
learnSch_physics_f5_kp2: Wave–particle duality: electrons (and all particles) behave as both waves and particles; de Broglie wavelength λ = h/(mv).
learnSch_physics_f5_kp3: Heisenberg uncertainty principle: Δx · Δp ≥ ℏ/2 — you cannot know both position and momentum of a particle precisely at the same time.
learnSch_physics_f5_kp4: Awọn elekitironi gba awọn ipele agbara ọtọtọ ni awọn ọta; nigbati elekitironi ba lọ silẹ si ipele kekere, o njade photon kan pẹlu agbara ti o dọgba si iyatọ.
learnSch_physics_f5_task: Foton ni igbohunsafẹfẹ 6.0×10¹⁴ Hz. Ṣe iṣiro agbara rẹ (h = 6.63×10⁻³⁴ J·s). Lẹhinna wa igbi ti elekitironi ti nrin ni 2.0×10⁶ m/s (ọpọlọpọ = 9.11×10⁻³¹ kg).
learnSch_physics_f6_desc: Ibaṣepọ pataki ti Einstein (1905) ṣe iyipada fisiksi nipa fifihan pe aaye ati akoko kii ṣe pipe — wọn na ati compress da lori iyara ojulumo. Ni awọn iyara ti o sunmọ iyara ina, akoko n fa fifalẹ, awọn nkan kuru, ati ilosoke pupọ. Awọn ipa wọnyi, ti o jẹrisi nipasẹ awọn satẹlaiti GPS ati awọn ohun imuyara patiku, yipada bii a ṣe loye agbaye.
learnSch_physics_f6_kp0: Ifiweranṣẹ akọkọ: awọn ofin ti fisiksi jẹ aami kanna ni gbogbo awọn fireemu itọkasi inertial (ti kii ṣe iyara).
learnSch_physics_f6_kp1: 2nd postulate: iyara ti ina c = 3×10⁸ m/s jẹ igbagbogbo fun gbogbo awọn alafojusi, laibikita iṣipopada ti orisun tabi oluwoye.
learnSch_physics_f6_kp2: Dilation akoko: aago gbigbe kan nṣiṣẹ losokepupo. Δt' = Δt / √(1 - v²/c²). Yiyara ti o gbe, akoko ti o lọra n kọja fun ọ.
learnSch_physics_f6_kp3: Idinku gigun: ohun gbigbe kan kuru ni itọsọna ti iṣipopada. L' = L₀ √(1 - v²/c²).
