learnSch_physics_f6_kp4: Mass–equivalence energy E = mc²: ibi-isinmi jẹ iru agbara ti a fipamọ. Eyi ni idi ti awọn aati iparun ṣe tu agbara pupọ silẹ.
learnSch_physics_f6_task: Rokẹti jẹ 100 m gigun ni isinmi ati irin-ajo ni 0.8c. Kini ipari rẹ bi a ṣe wọn nipasẹ oluwoye lori Earth? Lo L' = L₀√(1 - v²/c²). Paapaa, nipasẹ awọn aaya melo ni iṣẹju kan lori rocket yato si iṣẹju 1 lori Earth?
learnSch_physics_f6_tp2: Kemistri Organic || Kemistri Organic ṣe iwadii awọn agbo-ara ti o da lori erogba. Agbara alailẹgbẹ ti Erogba lati ṣe awọn iwe ifowopamọ mẹrin ti o ṣẹda awọn ohun elo ti o fẹrẹẹ ailopin - awọn bulọọki ile ti igbesi aye, awọn oogun, awọn epo, ati awọn pilasitik. Ṣiṣakoṣo awọn ẹgbẹ iṣẹ ṣiṣe ati awọn iru iṣesi ṣii biochemistry, elegbogi, ati imọ-jinlẹ ohun elo.
learnSch_chemistry_f3_name: Gbogbo awọn ohun alumọni Organic ni erogba, igbagbogbo ti sopọ mọ hydrogen (C–H) ati nigbagbogbo pẹlu O, N, S, tabi halogens.
learnSch_chemistry_f3_desc: Hydrocarbons: alkanes (C–C awọn iwe ifowopamosi ẹyọkan, ti o kun fun), alkenes (C=C bond double, unsaturated), alkynes (C≡C bond triple).
learnSch_chemistry_f3_kp0: All organic molecules contain carbon, typically bonded to hydrogen (C–H) and often also to O, N, S, or halogens.
learnSch_chemistry_f3_kp1: Hydrocarbons: alkanes (C–C single bonds, saturated), alkenes (C=C double bond, unsaturated), alkynes (C≡C triple bond).
learnSch_chemistry_f3_kp2: Awọn ẹgbẹ iṣẹ ṣe ipinnu awọn ohun-ini kemikali: –OH (ọti), –COOH (carboxylic acid), –NH₂ (amine), –CHO (aldehyde), –C=O (ketone).
learnSch_chemistry_f3_kp3: Awọn isomers igbekale ni agbekalẹ molikula kanna ṣugbọn ọna asopọ ti o yatọ; stereoisomers ni asopọ kanna ṣugbọn eto aye oriṣiriṣi.
learnSch_chemistry_f3_kp4: Awọn polymers jẹ awọn ohun elo nla ti a ṣe lati awọn ẹya monomer ti o tun ṣe: afikun polymerisation (ethene → polyethylene) ati polymerisation condensation (amino acids → proteins).
learnSch_chemistry_f3_task: Fa agbekalẹ igbekalẹ ni kikun ti ethanoic acid (CH₃COOH). Ṣe idanimọ ẹgbẹ iṣẹ. Kọ idogba fun esi rẹ pẹlu sodium hydroxide (NaOH) ati lorukọ awọn ọja naa.
learnSch_chemistry_f3_tp1: Awọn ẹgbẹ iṣẹ ati awọn aati || Polymers ati biomolecules || Electrochemistry || Electrochemistry ṣawari ibatan laarin awọn aati kemikali ati agbara itanna. Awọn batiri yipada agbara kemikali si ina; electrolysis wo ni yiyipada. Awọn aati Redox - awọn gbigbe elekitironi laarin awọn eya — wa ni ọkan ti gbogbo ilana elekitiroki, lati irin ipata si gbigba agbara foonu rẹ.
learnSch_chemistry_f3_tp2: Oxidation = isonu ti elekitironi (OIL); Idinku = ere ti awọn elekitironi (RIG). Gbogbo ifaseyin redox ni awọn ilana mejeeji ni nigbakannaa.
learnSch_chemistry_f4_name: Ninu sẹẹli galvanic (voltaic), ifasẹyin irapada lẹẹkọkan n wa ina lọwọlọwọ. Awọn anode jẹ odi (oxidation); cathode jẹ rere (idinku).
learnSch_chemistry_f4_desc: Electrolysis nlo agbara itanna ita lati wakọ esi ti kii ṣe lẹẹkọkan - ti a lo lati ṣe awopọ awọn irin, ṣe agbejade aluminiomu, ati pipin omi si H₂ ati O₂.
learnSch_chemistry_f4_kp0: Standard elekiturodu o pọju (E°): ga E° tumo si ni okun oxidising oluranlowo. Cell foliteji = E ° cathode - E ° anode.
learnSch_chemistry_f4_kp1: Awọn ofin Faraday: ọpọ nkan ti a fi sinu itanna eletiriki jẹ ibamu si idiyele ti o kọja (Q = It) ati si ibi-iṣan molar.
learnSch_chemistry_f4_kp2: Ninu elekitirosi ti sulfuric acid dilute, kọ awọn idogba idaji ni elekiturodu kọọkan. Ṣe idanimọ anode ati awọn ọja cathode. Ti lọwọlọwọ ti 2 A ba nṣàn fun 500 s, awọn moles ti awọn elekitironi melo ni a gbe lọ? (F = 96 500 C/mol)
learnSch_chemistry_f4_kp3: Awọn aati Redox ati awọn ipinlẹ oxidation
learnSch_chemistry_f4_kp4: Awọn sẹẹli Galvanic ati awọn batiri
learnSch_chemistry_f4_tp1: Iwontunwonsi kemikali waye ninu eto pipade nigbati awọn aati iwaju ati yiyipada tẹsiwaju ni awọn iwọn dogba, nitorinaa awọn ifọkansi ti awọn ifọkansi ati awọn ọja wa igbagbogbo. Imọye iwọntunwọnsi jẹ pataki fun kemistri ile-iṣẹ (ilana Haber) ati awọn ọna ṣiṣe ti ibi (pH ẹjẹ, iṣẹ ṣiṣe enzymu).
learnSch_chemistry_f5_desc: Chemical equilibrium occurs in a closed system when the forward and reverse reactions proceed at equal rates, so the concentrations of reactants and products remain constant. Understanding equilibrium is essential for industrial chemistry (the Haber process) and biological systems (blood pH, enzyme activity).
learnSch_chemistry_f5_kp0: Ni iwọntunwọnsi, oṣuwọn iṣesi iwaju jẹ dogba oṣuwọn ti ifaseyin yiyipada - awọn ifọkansi jẹ igbagbogbo ṣugbọn kii ṣe dandan dogba.
learnSch_chemistry_f5_kp1: Iwontunwonsi ibakan K = [awọn ọja] ^ n / [reactants] ^ m. K >> 1: awọn ọja ti o fẹran. K << 1: awọn oludasiṣẹ ṣe ojurere.
learnSch_chemistry_f5_kp2: Ilana Le Chatelier: ti eto kan ni iwọntunwọnsi ba ni idamu, o yipada lati koju iyipada ati mimu-pada sipo iwọntunwọnsi.
learnSch_chemistry_f5_kp3: Ifojusi ti o pọ si ti ifaseyin yipada iwọntunwọnsi si awọn ọja. Yiyọ ọja kan ṣe kanna.
learnSch_chemistry_f5_kp4: Fun awọn gaasi: jijẹ titẹ n yipada iwọntunwọnsi si ẹgbẹ pẹlu awọn moles ti gaasi diẹ. Iwọn iwọn otutu ṣe ojurere si itọsọna endothermic.
learnSch_chemistry_f5_task: N₂(g) + 3H₂(g) ⇌ 2NH₃(g) ΔH = -92 kJ/mol. Ṣe asọtẹlẹ iyipada ni iwọntunwọnsi nigbati: (a) titẹ ti pọ si, (b) iwọn otutu ti ga, (c) N₂ diẹ sii ni afikun. Ṣe alaye kọọkan nipa lilo ilana Le Chatelier.
learnSch_chemistry_f5_tp1: Awọn iṣiro iwọntunwọnsi Kc ati Kp
learnSch_chemistry_f6_desc: Kemistri Ayika ṣe iwadii bii awọn nkan kemika ṣe nlo pẹlu afẹfẹ, omi, ati ile - ati bii iṣẹ ṣiṣe eniyan ṣe paarọ awọn eto wọnyi. O ṣe alaye iyipada oju-ọjọ, idinku osonu, idoti omi, ati kemistri lẹhin awọn ojutu alagbero bii kemistri alawọ ewe ati awọn ohun elo biodegradable.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_kp0: Eefin ategun (CO₂, CH₄, N₂O, H₂O vapour) fa ati ki o tun jade infurarẹẹdi Ìtọjú, imorusi Earth ká dada — awọn eefin ipa.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_kp1: Ojo acid: SO₂ ati NOₓ (lati inu ijona epo fosaili) tu ni omi ojo ti o n ṣe H₂SO₃ ati HNO₃, ti o dinku pH ati ipalara awọn eto eda abemi.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_kp2: Idinku ozone: Awọn CFCs tu awọn ipilẹṣẹ Cl·radicals silẹ ni stratosphere, eyiti o ba O₃: Cl· + O₃ → ClO· + O₂ (iṣipaya pq).
learnSch_chemistry_f6_kp3: Eutrophication: iyọ ati fosifeti ṣiṣe kuro lati awọn ajile fa awọn ododo algal ti o dinku atẹgun ti a tuka ti o si pa igbesi aye omi.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_kp4: Awọn ilana kemistri alawọ ewe: awọn aati apẹrẹ ti o dinku egbin, lo awọn ohun kikọ sii isọdọtun, yago fun awọn nkan ti o lewu, ati mu ọrọ-aje atomu pọ si.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_task: Ṣàlàyé ìhùwàpadà ẹ̀wọ̀n pípé nípa èyí tí molecule CFC kan lè pa ẹgbẹẹgbẹ̀rún àwọn molecule ozone run. Kọ awọn igbesẹ bọtini meji. Lẹhinna ṣe iṣiro ọrọ-aje atomu ti iṣesi 2H₂ + O₂ → 2H₂O.
learnSch_chemistry_f6_tp2: Didara omi ati kemistri alawọ ewe
learnSch_biology_f3_desc: Jiinitiki jẹ imọ-jinlẹ ti ajogunba - bawo ni awọn ihuwasi ti kọja lati ọdọ awọn obi si ọmọ nipasẹ awọn Jiini ati awọn chromosomes. O ṣe atilẹyin oogun (awọn arun jiini, itọju ti ara ẹni), iṣẹ-ogbin (ibisi irugbin), ati imọ-jinlẹ oniwadi (profiling DNA). Lílóye àwọn apilẹ̀ àbùdá túmọ̀ sí òye ìdí tí ẹnì kọ̀ọ̀kan fi yàtọ̀ àti bí àwọn àrùn tí a jogún ṣe wáyé.
learnSch_biology_f3_kp0: Awọn Jiini jẹ awọn apakan ti DNA ti o ṣe koodu fun awọn ọlọjẹ. Jiini kọọkan wa ni ipo kan pato (locus) lori chromosome kan.
learnSch_biology_f3_kp1: Awọn eniyan ni awọn chromosomes 23 orisii (46 lapapọ); ọkan ṣeto lati kọọkan obi. Krómósómù ìbálòpọ̀: XX = abo, XY = akọ.
learnSch_biology_f3_kp2: Olokiki allele (B) awọn iboju iparada allele (b) ninu heterozygote (Bb). Awọn abuda ipadasẹhin han nikan nigbati homozygous (bb).
learnSch_biology_f3_kp3: Awọn onigun mẹrin Punnett ṣe asọtẹlẹ iṣeeṣe ti awọn genotypes ọmọ. Agbelebu monohybrid Bb × Bb n funni ni ipin phenotype 3:1.
learnSch_biology_f3_kp4: Awọn abuda ti o ni asopọ ibalopo (fun apẹẹrẹ ifọju awọ, haemophilia) ni a gbe sori chromosome X; awọn ọkunrin (XY) ni o ni ipa nigbagbogbo.
learnSch_biology_f3_task: Awọn obi meji ti o ni oju brown (Bb × Bb) ni awọn ọmọde. Fa Punnett square. Kini iṣeeṣe ti ọmọde ti o ni oju buluu (bb)? Kini genotype ati awọn ipin phenotype?
learnSch_biology_f3_tp0: Ogún Mendelian || Punnett onigun || Ogún ti o ni ibatan si ibalopo || Itankalẹ
learnSch_biology_f3_tp1: Itankalẹ jẹ iyipada ninu awọn abuda arole ti awọn eniyan lori awọn iran. Aṣayan adayeba ti Darwin jẹ ẹrọ akọkọ: awọn ẹni-kọọkan pẹlu awọn abuda anfani ti ye ati ẹda diẹ sii. Itankalẹ n ṣalaye iyatọ nla ti igbesi aye lori Earth ati awọn ẹya ti o pin laarin awọn oriṣiriṣi oriṣiriṣi.
learnSch_biology_f3_tp2: Aṣayan adayeba: awọn ẹni-kọọkan pẹlu awọn abuda to dara julọ si agbegbe ye ki o ṣe ẹda diẹ sii, gbigbe awọn abuda anfani si awọn ọmọ.
learnSch_biology_f4_name: Ẹri fun itankalẹ: igbasilẹ fosaili, anatomi afiwera (awọn ẹya isokan), ibajọra DNA, biogeography, akiyesi akiyesi.
learnSch_biology_f4_desc: Awọn iyipada ninu DNA jẹ orisun ti o ga julọ ti iyatọ jiini tuntun. Pupọ jẹ didoju; diẹ ninu awọn jẹ ipalara; kan diẹ pese anfani.
learnSch_biology_f4_kp0: Ni pato: nigbati awọn eniyan ba ya sọtọ (agbegbe, ibisi) gun to, wọn yipada si awọn ẹya ọtọtọ ti ko le ṣe ajọṣepọ mọ.
learnSch_biology_f4_kp1: Atako aporo aporo jẹ itankalẹ ni iṣe: awọn kokoro arun pẹlu awọn jiini resistance ye ati ẹda, ṣiṣe awọn igara sooro jẹ gaba lori.
learnSch_biology_f4_kp2: Ṣe alaye ni awọn igbesẹ mẹrin bi resistance aporo ṣe ndagba ninu olugbe kokoro nipa lilo yiyan adayeba. Lẹhinna ṣapejuwe awọn oriṣi oriṣiriṣi meji ti ẹri fun itankalẹ ati ṣalaye ohun ti ọkọọkan fihan.
learnSch_biology_f4_kp4: Antibiotic resistance is evolution in action: bacteria with resistance genes survive and reproduce, making resistant strains dominant.
learnSch_biology_f4_task: Explain in 4 steps how antibiotic resistance develops in a bacterial population using natural selection. Then describe two different types of evidence for evolution and explain what each shows.
learnSch_biology_f5_name: Ohun ọgbin Isedale || Awọn ohun ọgbin jẹ awọn olupilẹṣẹ akọkọ ni gbogbo awọn eto ilolupo - wọn gba agbara oorun ati yi pada sinu ọrọ Organic nipasẹ photosynthesis. Agbọye isedale ọgbin ni wiwa igbekalẹ (awọn gbongbo, awọn eso, awọn ewe, awọn ododo), photosynthesis, ẹda, ati ipa pataki ti awọn ohun ọgbin ṣe ni ṣiṣakoso oju-aye ti Earth ati igbesi aye ifunni.
learnSch_biology_f5_desc: Photosynthesis: 6CO₂ + 6H₂O + agbara ina → C₆H₁₂O₆ + 6O₂. O waye ninu awọn chloroplasts ti o ni chlorophyll ninu.
learnSch_biology_f5_kp0: Awọn ewe ti wa ni ibamu fun photosynthesis: agbegbe ti o tobi, tinrin, epidermis sihin, stomata fun titẹsi CO₂, ati nẹtiwọki iṣan ti o ni ọlọrọ.
learnSch_biology_f5_kp1: Xylem n gbe omi ati awọn ohun alumọni lati awọn gbongbo si awọn ewe. Phloem gbe awọn suga lati awọn ewe lọ si iyokù ọgbin naa.
learnSch_biology_f5_kp2: Transpiration: omi evaporates nipasẹ stomata, fifa omi soke nipasẹ awọn xylem (transpiration san).
learnSch_biology_f5_kp3: Atunse ọgbin: awọn irugbin aladodo lo pollination (gbigbe eruku adodo) ati idapọ lati gbe awọn irugbin jade; awọn irugbin pin si awọn ipo titun.
learnSch_biology_f5_kp4: Ṣe apẹrẹ idanwo kan lati ṣe idanwo boya kikankikan ina ni ipa lori oṣuwọn photosynthesis ni omi ikudu. Sọ ominira, ti o gbẹkẹle, ati awọn oniyipada iṣakoso. Ṣe asọtẹlẹ ati ṣalaye abajade.
learnSch_biology_f6_name: Maikirobaoloji jẹ iwadi ti awọn oganisimu airi - kokoro arun, awọn ọlọjẹ, elu, ati protists. Awọn nkan kekere wọnyi ṣe apẹrẹ ilera eniyan, iṣẹ-ogbin, iṣelọpọ ounjẹ, ati iyipo erogba agbaye. Loye awọn microbes jẹ pataki fun oogun (awọn oogun aporo, awọn ajesara), imọ-ẹrọ imọ-ẹrọ, ati oye arun.
learnSch_biology_f6_desc: Awọn kokoro arun jẹ prokaryotes (ko si arin). Pupọ jẹ alailewu tabi anfani; diẹ ninu awọn jẹ pathogens ti o nfa awọn akoran bi iko ati ọgbẹ.
learnSch_biology_f6_kp0: Awọn ọlọjẹ kii ṣe awọn sẹẹli - wọn jẹ awọn okun ti DNA/RNA ninu ẹwu amuaradagba. Wọn ṣe ẹda nikan nipa jija awọn ẹrọ sẹẹli agbalejo kan.
learnSch_biology_f6_kp1: Awọn egboogi pa tabi ṣe idiwọ kokoro arun ṣugbọn ko wulo si awọn ọlọjẹ (tutu ti o wọpọ, aisan). Lilo ilokulo n ṣe itọju aporo aporo.
learnSch_biology_f6_kp2: Eto ajẹsara: awọn aabo ti kii ṣe pato (awọ-ara, phagocytes) ati awọn aabo kan pato (lymphocytes ti n ṣe awọn ọlọjẹ). Awọn ajesara ṣe ikẹkọ eto ajẹsara lai fa arun.
learnSch_biology_f6_kp3: Awọn microbes ti o ni anfani: awọn kokoro arun ikun ṣe iranlọwọ tito nkan lẹsẹsẹ; elu gbe awọn egboogi (penicillin lati Penicillium); iwukara ferments sugars fun akara ati ọti.
learnSch_biology_f6_kp4: Beneficial microbes: gut bacteria aid digestion; fungi produce antibiotics (penicillin from Penicillium); yeast ferments sugars for bread and beer.
learnSch_biology_f6_task: Ṣe afiwe ilana ti kokoro arun ati ọlọjẹ kan. Ṣe alaye idi ti awọn oogun apakokoro ṣiṣẹ lori ọkan ṣugbọn kii ṣe ekeji. Lẹhinna ṣe apejuwe awọn ọna meji ti ara ṣe aabo fun ararẹ lodi si ikolu kokoro-arun.
learnSch_biology_f6_tp0: Awọn kokoro arun ati awọn ọlọjẹ || Eto ajẹsara ati awọn ajesara
learnSch_biology_f6_tp1: Awọn microbes ti o ni anfani ati awọn oogun apakokoro
learnSch_computer_science_f3_name: Awọn ẹya data jẹ awọn ọna ti a ṣeto lati fipamọ ati wọle si data; awọn algoridimu jẹ awọn ilana igbesẹ-nipasẹ-igbesẹ lati yanju awọn iṣoro. Yiyan eto data ti o tọ ati algorithm pinnu boya eto kan nṣiṣẹ ni milliseconds tabi awọn wakati. Koko-ọrọ yii jẹ ẹhin ti idagbasoke sọfitiwia to munadoko.
learnSch_computer_science_f3_desc: Arays itaja eroja ni a ti o wa titi ọkọọkan; wiwọle nipasẹ atọka jẹ O (1). Awọn atokọ gba iwọn agbara laaye ṣugbọn o le ni iraye si losokepupo.
learnSch_computer_science_f3_kp0: Awọn akopọ (LIFO - ti o kẹhin ninu, akọkọ jade) ati awọn ila (FIFO - akọkọ ninu, akọkọ jade) ṣakoso awọn akojọpọ aṣẹ fun awọn ọran lilo pato.
learnSch_computer_science_f3_kp1: Wiwa laini sọwedowo gbogbo eroja (O(n)); wiwa alakomeji nilo data lẹsẹsẹ ati idaji aaye wiwa ni igbesẹ kọọkan (O(log n)).
learnSch_computer_science_f3_kp2: Iru Bubble ṣe afiwe awọn eroja ti o wa nitosi o si paarọ wọn (O(n²)). Dapọ too yapa ati ki o dapọ leralera (O(n log n)) - Elo yiyara fun data nla.
learnSch_computer_science_f3_kp3: Akọsilẹ Big-O ṣe apejuwe ṣiṣe algorithm: O(1) jẹ igbagbogbo, O(n) jẹ laini, O (n²) jẹ kuadiratiki - isalẹ ni o dara julọ fun awọn igbewọle nla.
learnSch_computer_science_f3_kp4: Tọpinpin iru bubble lori atokọ [5, 3, 8, 1, 4]. Ṣe afihan iwe-iwọle kọọkan. Ka lapapọ awọn afiwera ati swaps. Lẹhinna kọ pseudocode fun wiwa alakomeji lori atokọ tito lẹsẹsẹ.
learnSch_computer_science_f3_task: Awọn akojọpọ ati awọn atokọ || Awọn algoridimu wiwa
learnSch_computer_science_f3_tp2: Ibi ipamọ data jẹ akojọpọ iṣeto ti data ti a ṣeto. Awọn apoti isura infomesonu ibatan tọju data sinu awọn tabili ti o sopọ nipasẹ awọn bọtini. SQL gba ọ laaye lati ṣẹda, beere, imudojuiwọn, ati paarẹ awọn igbasilẹ. Awọn aaye data agbara gbogbo ohun elo pataki lati awọn eto iṣakoso ile-iwe si awọn iru ẹrọ media awujọ.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_name: Ibi ipamọ data ibatan n tọju data sinu awọn tabili (awọn ori ila = awọn igbasilẹ, awọn ọwọn = awọn aaye). Awọn tabili ni asopọ nipasẹ awọn bọtini akọkọ ati ajeji.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_desc: Bọtini akọkọ: idanimọ alailẹgbẹ fun igbasilẹ kọọkan ninu tabili kan. Bọtini ajeji: ṣe asopọ tabili kan si bọtini akọkọ ti omiiran.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_kp0: Ibeere YAN SQL: Yan iwe LATI tabili NIBI IṢE ipo BEERE BY iwe. Apeere: Yan orukọ LATI awọn akẹkọ NIBI ipele = 'A'.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_kp1: Primary key: a unique identifier for each record in a table. Foreign key: links one table to the primary key of another.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_kp2: SQL SELECT query: SELECT column FROM table WHERE condition ORDER BY column. Example: SELECT name FROM students WHERE grade = 'A'.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_kp3: Iṣe deede dinku iṣẹdapọ data nipa pipin awọn tabili nitoribẹẹ nkan data kọọkan ti wa ni ipamọ ni ẹẹkan.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_kp4: Awọn iṣẹ CRUD: Ṣẹda (FI sii), Ka (Yan), Imudojuiwọn (Imudojuiwọn), Paarẹ (PA) - awọn iṣe ipilẹ data mẹrin.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_task: Ṣe apẹrẹ aaye data ti o rọrun fun ile-ikawe ile-iwe (awọn iwe, awọn ọmọ ile-iwe, awọn awin). Ṣetumo o kere ju awọn tabili mẹta, awọn aaye wọn, ati awọn ibatan. Lẹhinna kọ ibeere SQL kan lati wa gbogbo awọn iwe lọwọlọwọ ni awin si ID ọmọ ile-iwe 42.
learnSch_computer_science_f4_tp0: Awọn tabili ati awọn bọtini || Awọn ibeere SQL || Isọdọtun
learnSch_computer_science_f4_tp2: Nẹtiwọọki kan so awọn kọnputa pọ lati pin data ati awọn orisun. Intanẹẹti jẹ nẹtiwọki ti o tobi julọ ni agbaye - nẹtiwọki ti awọn nẹtiwọki. Loye bi data ṣe n rin irin-ajo (awọn ilana, awọn adirẹsi IP, DNS) ati bii o ṣe jẹ aabo ( fifi ẹnọ kọ nkan, awọn ogiriina) jẹ pataki ni ọjọ-ori oni-nọmba.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_name: LAN (Nẹtiwọọki Agbegbe Agbegbe): so awọn ẹrọ pọ ni agbegbe kekere kan. WAN (Nẹtiwọọki Agbegbe Jakejado): so awọn LAN pọ si awọn ijinna nla - intanẹẹti jẹ WAN kan.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_desc: Àdírẹ́ẹ̀sì IP: àmì òǹkà aláìlẹ́gbẹ́ kan fún ẹ̀rọ kọ̀ọ̀kan lórí nẹ́tíwọ́kì (f.eks. 192.168.1.1 fún IPv4). DNS tumọ awọn orukọ-ašẹ (google.com) si awọn adirẹsi IP.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_kp0: TCP/IP Protocol suite: Ilana Iṣakoso Gbigbe ṣe idaniloju awọn apo-iwe data de ni deede; Internet Protocol ipa-ọna wọn.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_kp1: HTTP (Ilana Gbigbe HyperText) n gbe awọn oju-iwe wẹẹbu lọ. HTTPS ṣafikun fifi ẹnọ kọ nkan TLS - aami padlock fihan asopọ rẹ ti paroko.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_kp2: Iyipada apo-iwe: data ti pin si awọn apo-iwe, ọkọọkan ni ipa ọna ominira kọja nẹtiwọọki, lẹhinna tun ṣajọpọ ni ibi ti o nlo.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_kp3: Wa ohun ti o ṣẹlẹ nigbati o ba tẹ 'www.example.com' sinu ẹrọ aṣawakiri kan ki o tẹ Tẹ - lati wiwa DNS si gbigba oju opo wẹẹbu naa. Darukọ gbogbo ilana ati igbesẹ ti o kan.
learnSch_computer_science_f5_kp4: Awọn iru nẹtiwọki ati awọn ilana
learnSch_computer_science_f5_tp0: Aabo: HTTPS ati fifi ẹnọ kọ nkan
learnSch_computer_science_f5_tp2: Rhetoric jẹ ọna ti ibaraẹnisọrọ to ni idaniloju - lilo ede ni imunadoko lati sọ fun, yipada, tabi ru olugbo kan. Ariyanjiyan kọ ọ lati ṣe agbero ọgbọn, awọn ariyanjiyan ti o da lori ẹri ati lati ṣe idanimọ ati koju ironu alailagbara. Awọn ọgbọn wọnyi jẹ pataki fun awọn ijiyan, awọn arosọ, awọn ilana ofin, ati igbesi aye ara ilu.
learnSch_language_arts_f3_name: Awọn ọna idaniloju mẹta ti Aristotle: Ethos (igbekele ti agbọrọsọ), Pathos (ẹdun ẹdun), Logos (ariyanjiyan ọgbọn ati ẹri).
learnSch_language_arts_f3_desc: Rhetoric is the art of persuasive communication — using language effectively to inform, persuade, or motivate an audience. Argumentation teaches you to construct logical, evidence-based arguments and to identify and counter weak reasoning. These skills are essential for debates, essays, legal proceedings, and civic life.
learnSch_language_arts_f3_kp0: Aristotle's three modes of persuasion: Ethos (credibility of the speaker), Pathos (emotional appeal), Logos (logical argument and evidence).
learnSch_language_arts_f3_kp1: Ijiyan ti o lagbara ni: ẹtọ ti o han gbangba (iwe-ẹkọ), awọn idi atilẹyin, ẹri, ati idahun si awọn ariyanjiyan.
learnSch_language_arts_f3_kp2: Awọn iro ti o mọgbọnwa ṣe ipalara awọn ariyanjiyan: ad hominem (ikọlu eniyan), eniyan koriko (ti o ṣe afihan wiwo ilodisi), dichotomy eke (awọn aṣayan meji nikan ti a gbekalẹ).
learnSch_language_arts_f3_kp3: Idiyele apaniyan n gbe lati awọn ilana gbogbogbo si awọn ipinnu kan pato (gbogbo eniyan jẹ iku; Socrates jẹ eniyan; nitorinaa Socrates jẹ iku).
learnSch_language_arts_f3_kp4: Ero inductive fa awọn ipinnu gbogbogbo lati awọn akiyesi kan pato - lagbara ṣugbọn o le jẹ aṣiṣe ti awọn apẹẹrẹ ko ba jẹ aṣoju.
learnSch_language_arts_f3_task: Ka a irohin ero nkan. Ṣe idanimọ ẹtọ akọkọ, awọn ege mẹta ti ẹri atilẹyin, awọn olugbo ti a pinnu, ati iro ọgbọn ọgbọn kan (ti o ba jẹ eyikeyi). Lẹhinna kọ 200-ọrọ counter-ariyanjiyan nipa lilo gbogbo awọn ipo Aristotle mẹta.
learnSch_language_arts_f3_tp0: Ethos, pathos, awọn apejuwe || Awọn iro ti o mọgbọnwa
learnSch_history_f2_name: Akoko ode oni yi agbaye pada nipasẹ iṣawakiri, iyipada, ati iṣelọpọ. Imugboroosi Yuroopu ti o sopọ mọ awọn kọnputa, Imọlẹ laya aṣa atọwọdọwọ pẹlu idi, awọn iyipada ijọba tiwantiwa tun ṣe awọn ijọba, ati Iyika Ile-iṣẹ yipada bi eniyan ṣe n gbe ati ṣiṣẹ - fifi awọn ipilẹ lelẹ fun agbaye imusin.
learnSch_history_f2_desc: Ọjọ-ori ti Ṣiṣayẹwo (1400s-1600s): Awọn agbara Yuroopu (Portugal, Spain, England, Netherlands) lọ kiri si Amẹrika, Afirika, ati Esia, ṣiṣẹda awọn nẹtiwọọki iṣowo agbaye ati awọn ijọba ijọba amunisin.
learnSch_history_f2_kp0: Iyika Imọ-jinlẹ ati Imọlẹ (1600-1700s): awọn onimọran bii Galileo, Newton, Locke, ati Voltaire lo idi ati akiyesi lati koju aṣẹ ijo ati agbara ibile.
learnSch_history_f2_kp1: Iyika Amẹrika (1776) ati Iyika Faranse (1789): atilẹyin nipasẹ awọn imọran Imọlẹ, awọn ileto ati awọn ara ilu ti ṣubu awọn ijọba ọba lati fi idi awọn ẹtọ, awọn ofin ijọba mulẹ, ati ọba-alaṣẹ olokiki.
learnSch_history_f2_kp2: Iyika Ile-iṣẹ (1760-1850s): bẹrẹ ni Ilu Gẹẹsi - eedu, awọn ẹrọ ina, awọn ile-iṣelọpọ, ati awọn ọna oju-irin ṣe iyipada awọn awujọ ti o da lori ogbin sinu awọn ọrọ-aje ilu ile-iṣẹ.
learnSch_history_f2_kp3: Ile-ijọsin: Awọn orilẹ-ede Yuroopu ṣe ijọba ijọba Afirika, Esia, ati Amẹrika - yiyọ awọn orisun jade, nipo awọn olugbe, ati fifi awọn abajade iṣelu ati aṣa ti o pẹ to gun silẹ.
learnSch_history_f2_kp4: Yan iṣẹlẹ kan lati 1500-1900 (fun apẹẹrẹ Iyika Faranse). Ṣe alaye: (a) awọn idi mẹta, (b) awọn iṣẹlẹ pataki meji, (c) awọn abajade igba pipẹ meji. Lo awọn ọjọ pato ati awọn eniyan.
learnSch_history_f3_desc: Ọrundun 20th mu awọn ogun agbaye, ijọba-ijọba, isọdọtun, ati Ogun Tutu — ṣe atunṣe gbogbo orilẹ-ede lori Aye. O tun jẹ ọgọrun ọdun ti ilọsiwaju iyalẹnu: ijatil ti fascism, igbega awọn ẹtọ eniyan, awọn ibalẹ oṣupa, ati iyipada oni-nọmba. Lílóye rẹ̀ ṣe kókó láti lóye ayé òde òní.
learnSch_history_f3_kp0: Ogun Àgbáyé Kìíní (1914–1918): ló fa ìpayà Archduke Franz Ferdinand; ti o fa nipasẹ orilẹ-ede, ijọba ijọba, ologun, ati awọn eto ajọṣepọ. ~ 17 milionu ti ku.
learnSch_history_f3_kp1: Ogun Àgbáyé Kejì (1939–1945): Germany Nazi, Fascist Italy, àti Imperial Japan lòdì sí àwọn Allies. Bibajẹ naa pa ~ 6 milionu awọn eniyan Juu. Ti pari pẹlu awọn bombu atomiki lori Hiroshima ati Nagasaki.
learnSch_history_f3_kp2: Ogun Tutu (1947 – 1991): arojinle ati orogun geopolitical laarin USA (kapitalisimu, tiwantiwa) ati USSR (communism). Awọn ogun aṣoju, Ere-ije Space, ije ohun ija iparun, ati odi Berlin pin agbaye.
learnSch_history_f3_kp3: Decolonization (1945 – 1975): awọn agbeka ominira ni Afirika, Esia, ati Aarin Ila-oorun ti pari awọn ijọba ileto ti Yuroopu. Nigbagbogbo de pelu rogbodiyan ati aisedeede.
learnSch_history_f3_kp4: Ìparapọ̀ Àwọn Orílẹ̀-Èdè dá 1945 sílẹ̀ láti mú àlàáfíà wà; Ikede Agbaye ti Awọn Eto Eda Eniyan gba 1948 - mejeeji awọn idahun taara si awọn ika ika WWII.
learnSch_history_f3_task: Ṣe afiwe awọn okunfa ati awọn abajade ti WWI ati WWII. Ṣẹda tabili pẹlu: Idi akọkọ, aaye titan bọtini, Iku iku, Abajade nla. Lẹhinna ṣalaye bi WWII ṣe yori taara si Ogun Tutu naa.
learnSch_history_f3_tp1: Decolonization ati eto eda eniyan || Awọn ọna Itan & Orisun Onínọmbà
learnSch_history_f3_tp2: Itan kii ṣe awọn ọjọ ati awọn iṣẹlẹ nikan - o jẹ itumọ ti ẹri. Awọn onimọ-jinlẹ ṣe itupalẹ awọn orisun akọkọ (awọn iwe atilẹba, awọn ohun-ọṣọ) ati awọn orisun keji (awọn iwe-ẹkọ, awọn itan-akọọlẹ) lati tun ṣe awọn ti o ti kọja. Kọ ẹkọ bii o ṣe le ṣe iṣiro awọn orisun ni itara jẹ ki o jẹ oniwadi to dara julọ, ero inu, ati ọmọ ilu.
learnSch_history_f4_name: Orisun akọkọ: ti a ṣẹda ni akoko iṣẹlẹ (iwe iroyin, aworan, adehun, iwe iroyin). Orisun Atẹle: ti a ṣẹda nigbamii, itumọ awọn orisun akọkọ (igbesiaye, iwe itan, iwe ẹkọ).
learnSch_history_f4_desc: Onínọmbà SOAPS: Orisun, Apejọ, Awọn olugbo, Idi, Koko-ọrọ kan fun oye eyikeyi iwe itan.
learnSch_history_f4_kp0: Igbẹkẹle la iwulo: orisun aiṣedeede tun le wulo bi ẹri ohun ti onkọwe gbagbọ tabi kini ete ti o wa ni akoko naa.
learnSch_history_f4_kp1: Idi vs. ibamu: nitori pe awọn iṣẹlẹ meji ṣẹlẹ papọ ko tumọ si ọkan fa ekeji. Awọn opitan n wa ẹri ti asopọ taara.
learnSch_history_f4_kp2: Itan-akọọlẹ jẹ iwadi ti bii itan ti kọ ati tumọ. Iṣẹlẹ kanna (fun apẹẹrẹ Iyika Faranse) ni a le rii ni oriṣiriṣi pupọ nipasẹ awọn onkọwe oriṣiriṣi.
learnSch_history_f4_kp3: Wa ọrọ itan tabi lẹta lati akoko eyikeyi. Waye SOAPS onínọmbà. Ṣe ayẹwo igbẹkẹle rẹ (ṣe akiyesi ipo ati idi ti onkọwe) ati iwulo rẹ (awọn ibeere itan wo ni o ṣe iranlọwọ lati dahun?).
learnSch_geography_f2_desc: Awọn maapu jẹ awọn irinṣẹ agbara fun aṣoju alaye aaye. Aworan aworan jẹ imọ-jinlẹ ati aworan ṣiṣe awọn maapu. Lati awọn tabulẹti amọ atijọ si awọn aworan satẹlaiti GPS, awọn maapu ti ṣe amọna iṣawari, ṣe agbekalẹ iṣelu, ati ni oye ti agbaye wa. Kika ati ṣiṣẹda awọn maapu jẹ ọgbọn agbegbe ti ipilẹ.
learnSch_geography_f2_kp0: Iwọn: ipin laarin ijinna lori maapu kan ati ijinna gidi-aye. A 1: 50,000 asekale map tumo si 1 cm = 500 m.
learnSch_geography_f2_kp1: Awọn itọkasi grid: awọn ila ti latitude (petele, awọn iwọn ariwa/guusu) ati longitude (inaro, awọn iwọn ila-oorun/oorun) wa gangan aaye eyikeyi lori Earth.
learnSch_geography_f2_kp2: Awọn ila elegbegbe so awọn aaye ti igbega dogba; contours ti o wa ni pẹkipẹki = oke giga; ni opolopo alafo = jeje ite.
learnSch_geography_f2_kp3: Awọn asọtẹlẹ maapu yi dada ilẹ ti o tẹ lori maapu alapin kan. Iṣiro Mercator ṣe itọju apẹrẹ ṣugbọn o da iwọn; Peters asọtẹlẹ ṣe itọju agbegbe ṣugbọn o da apẹrẹ.
learnSch_geography_f2_kp4: GIS (Eto Alaye Ilẹ-ilẹ) fẹlẹfẹlẹ awọn eto data lọpọlọpọ (olugbe, lilo ilẹ, oju-ọjọ) sori awọn maapu oni-nọmba fun itupalẹ ati ṣiṣe ipinnu.
learnSch_geography_f2_task: Lilo maapu topographic kan (tabi iyaworan tirẹ), ṣe idanimọ: (a) oke giga, (b) afonifoji, (c) oke oke. Kọ itọkasi akoj oni-nọmba 6 fun ipade naa. Ṣe iṣiro ijinna gidi ti ọna 4 cm lori maapu 1: 50,000 kan.
learnSch_geography_f3_desc: Oju ojo jẹ ipo igba diẹ ti afẹfẹ; afefe jẹ aropin igba pipẹ. Awọn agbegbe oju-ọjọ ile-aye - lati ilẹ-ooru si pola - jẹ apẹrẹ nipasẹ ibu, awọn ṣiṣan omi okun, giga, ati awọn ẹfũfu ti n bori. Loye awọn ọna ṣiṣe oju-ọjọ jẹ pataki fun iṣẹ-ogbin, igbaradi ajalu, ati sisọ iyipada oju-ọjọ.
learnSch_geography_f3_kp0: Awọn okunfa ti o ni ipa lori afefe: latitude (igun oorun), giga (iwọn otutu lọ silẹ ~ 6.5 ° C fun 1000 m), ijinna lati okun, awọn ṣiṣan okun, awọn afẹfẹ ti nmulẹ.
learnSch_geography_f3_kp1: Oju-ọjọ Tropical: gbona ati tutu ni gbogbo ọdun, nitosi equator. Mẹditarenia: awọn igba ooru gbigbẹ gbigbona, awọn igba otutu tutu tutu. Pola: tutu patapata, ojoriro kekere.
learnSch_geography_f3_kp2: Ojo iwaju: awọn ọpọ eniyan ti afẹfẹ gbona ati tutu pade; afẹfẹ gbona ga soke lori otutu, tutu, ati awọn condenses. Wọpọ ni aarin-latitudes (UK, Germany).
learnSch_geography_f3_kp3: Yiyipo omi: evaporation → condensation (awọsanma Ibiyi) → ojoriro → dada run-pipa / infiltration → pada si evaporation.
learnSch_geography_f3_kp4: Iyipada oju-ọjọ: dide CO₂ n mu ipa eefin pọ si, nfa imorusi agbaye, awọn iṣẹlẹ oju-ojo diẹ sii, awọn ipele okun ti o ga, ati awọn agbegbe agbegbe afefe.
learnSch_geography_f3_task: Ṣe afiwe oju-ọjọ ti ipo igbo ojo otutu pẹlu ipo asale kan. Fun ọkọọkan: ipinlẹ tumọ si iwọn otutu lododun, ojo riro lododun, awọn okunfa, ati awọn aṣamubadọgba meji ti awọn oganisimu ti ngbe nibẹ.
learnSch_geography_f3_tp0: Awọn okunfa ti o ni ipa lori afefe
learnSch_geography_f3_tp1: Awọn agbegbe oju-ọjọ || Oju ojo iwaju ati iyipo omi
learnSch_geography_f3_tp2: Iṣowo Kariaye & Agbaye || Iṣowo kariaye gba awọn orilẹ-ede laaye lati ṣe amọja ni ohun ti wọn gbejade daradara ati iṣowo fun ohun gbogbo miiran. Ìsọ̀rọ̀ ayélujára - ìsopọ̀ tí ó pọ̀ síi ti àwọn ọrọ̀ ajé, àṣà ìbílẹ̀, àti ènìyàn — ti mú ọgọ́rọ̀ọ̀rún mílíọ̀nù kúrò nínú ipò òṣì ṣùgbọ́n ó tún ti dá aidogba àti àwọn ìpèníjà àyíká.
learnSch_economics_f2_name: Anfani afiwe: orilẹ-ede kan yẹ ki o ṣe amọja ni iṣelọpọ awọn ọja nibiti idiyele anfani rẹ ti kere ju, lẹhinna iṣowo - paapaa ti o ba dara julọ ni ohun gbogbo.
learnSch_economics_f2_desc: Awọn ọja okeere: awọn ẹru ati awọn iṣẹ ti wọn ta ni okeere (owo oya fun orilẹ-ede naa). Awọn agbewọle lati ilu okeere: awọn ẹru ati awọn iṣẹ ti a ra lati odi (awọn inawo).
learnSch_economics_f2_kp0: Awọn idena iṣowo: awọn owo-ori (awọn owo-ori lori awọn agbewọle lati ilu okeere), awọn ipin (awọn opin agbewọle), awọn embargoes (awọn idinamọ lapapọ) - daabobo awọn ile-iṣẹ ile ṣugbọn gbe awọn idiyele soke fun awọn alabara.
learnSch_economics_f2_kp1: Awọn adehun iṣowo ọfẹ (fun apẹẹrẹ EU Single Market, NAFTA) dinku awọn idena laarin awọn orilẹ-ede ọmọ ẹgbẹ, igbelaruge iṣowo ati idagbasoke eto-ọrọ aje.
learnSch_economics_f2_kp2: Iwontunwonsi ti isowo: okeere – agbewọle. Ajeseku iṣowo tumọ si diẹ sii ni okeere; aipe iṣowo tumọ si diẹ sii ti wa ni agbewọle.
learnSch_economics_f2_kp3: Orilẹ-ede A le ṣe agbejade awọn kọnputa 100 TABI awọn tonnu 200 ti alikama fun ọdun kan. Orilẹ-ede B le ṣe agbejade awọn kọnputa 60 TABI awọn tonnu 180 ti alikama. Fihan orilẹ-ede wo ni anfani afiwera ni ọja kọọkan ati ṣalaye idi ti awọn mejeeji ni anfani lati amọja ati iṣowo.
learnSch_economics_f2_task: Awọn idena iṣowo ati iṣowo ọfẹ
learnSch_economics_f2_tp2: Isuna ti ara ẹni ni wiwa iṣakoso ilowo ti owo: gbigba, fifipamọ, ṣiṣe isunawo, yiya, ati idoko-owo. Imọwe owo ṣe iranlọwọ fun ọ lati yago fun awọn ẹgẹ gbese, kọ ọrọ, ati ṣe awọn ipinnu alaye jakejado igbesi aye rẹ - lati iṣẹ akọkọ rẹ si ifẹhinti lẹnu iṣẹ. Awọn ọgbọn wọnyi ko ṣọwọn kọ ṣugbọn ni gbogbo agbaye nilo.
learnSch_economics_f3_name: Isuna ṣe ipin owo-wiwọle rẹ kọja awọn iwulo (iyalo, ounjẹ), awọn ifẹ (idaraya), ati awọn ifowopamọ. Ofin 50/30/20: Awọn iwulo 50%, 30% fẹ, 20% awọn ifowopamọ.
learnSch_economics_f3_desc: Anfani akojọpọ: iwulo jẹ mina lori mejeeji akọkọ ati anfani ti akojo. € 1,000 ni 5% iwulo agbodọgba lododun di € 1,629 lẹhin ọdun 10.
learnSch_economics_f3_kp0: Gbese to dara (yawo, awin ọmọ ile-iwe) le kọ ọrọ tabi awọn ọgbọn. Gbese buburu (kaadi kirẹditi anfani-giga, awin ọjọ-isanwo) ṣe ẹgẹ rẹ ni ọna ti awọn sisanwo.
learnSch_economics_f3_kp1: Ifowopamọ npa agbara rira: ti afikun ba jẹ 3% ati awọn ifowopamọ rẹ jo'gun 1%, owo rẹ padanu iye gidi ni gbogbo ọdun.
learnSch_economics_f3_kp2: Good debt (mortgage, student loan) can build wealth or skills. Bad debt (high-interest credit card, payday loan) traps you in a cycle of payments.
learnSch_economics_f3_kp3: Inflation erodes purchasing power: if inflation is 3% and your savings earn 1%, your money loses real value every year.
learnSch_economics_f3_kp4: Diversification: itankale awọn idoko-owo kọja awọn ohun-ini oriṣiriṣi (awọn ọja, awọn iwe ifowopamosi, ohun-ini) dinku eewu - 'maṣe fi gbogbo awọn eyin rẹ sinu agbọn kan’.
learnSch_economics_f3_task: Ṣẹda isuna oṣooṣu kan fun ọmọ ile-iwe ti n gba € 800 fun oṣu kan. Pin awọn oye nipa lilo ofin 50/30/20. Lẹhinna ṣe iṣiro iye € 500 ti o dagba si ni ọdun 5 ni 4% anfani agbo-ọdun lododun: A = P(1 + r) ^ n.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_desc: Awọn okun bo 71% ti oju ilẹ ati ṣe ilana oju-ọjọ, ṣe agbejade atẹgun, ati atilẹyin ipinsiyeleyele iyalẹnu. Yiyipo omi nigbagbogbo n gbe omi laarin awọn okun, oju-aye, ati ilẹ, ṣiṣe Earth nikan ni aye ti o ni omi omi ni oju rẹ - ipo bọtini fun igbesi aye.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_kp0: Iwọn omi: evaporation (omi si gaasi, ti a mu nipasẹ agbara oorun) → condensation (gaasi si awọn droplets, awọn awọsanma ti o ṣẹda) → ojoriro (ojo, egbon) → ṣiṣe-pipa ati infiltration → pada si evaporation.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_kp1: Awọn okun tọju ooru ati oju-ọjọ iwọntunwọnsi: wọn fa CO₂ ati ooru lati oorun, ti o tu silẹ laiyara ati awọn iwọn otutu otutu.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_kp2: Awọn ṣiṣan omi okun (fun apẹẹrẹ Gulf Stream) gbe ooru ni ayika agbaye, imorusi tabi itutu agbaiye awọn ẹkun eti okun ti o jinna si equator.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_kp3: Omi acidification: bi CO₂ ṣe n tuka ninu omi okun o ṣe agbekalẹ carbonic acid (H₂CO₃), pH ti o dinku ati idẹruba iyun reefs ati shellfish.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_kp4: Omi inu ile: omi ti a fipamọ sinu awọn aquifers labẹ ilẹ. Iyọkuro-iyọkuro npa awọn aquifers yiyara ju ti wọn gba agbara lọ - ọrọ aabo omi agbaye ti ndagba.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_task: Fa ati ki o ni kikun si aami yiyipo omi. Fun ipele kọọkan, sọ ilana ti ara ti o kan (evaporation, condensation, bbl) ati orisun agbara ti n ṣakọ rẹ. Lẹhinna ṣe alaye awọn iṣẹ eniyan meji ti o da omi yipo pada.
learnSch_earth_science_f2_tp1: Awọn ṣiṣan omi okun ati afefe
learnSch_earth_science_f3_desc: Awọn ewu adayeba - awọn iwariri-ilẹ, awọn onina, tsunami, awọn iji lile - dide lati inu ati agbara oju aye. Loye awọn idi wọn, pinpin, ati awọn ipa gba awọn awujọ laaye lati mura silẹ, dinku ibajẹ, ati fi awọn ẹmi pamọ. Ewu si awọn olugbe eniyan da bi pupọ lori awọn ifosiwewe awujọ ati ti ọrọ-aje bi lori eewu ti ara funrararẹ.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_kp0: Awọn iwariri-ilẹ waye ni awọn aala awo tectonic (Konsafetifu, iparun, imudara). Iwọn titobi Richter / akoko ṣe iwọn itusilẹ agbara; ọkọọkan = ×32 igba diẹ agbara.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_kp1: Awọn onina n dagba ni awọn agbegbe isọdọtun (awọn ibẹjadi, lava viscous) ati ni awọn aaye ti o gbona/awọn aala ti o ni agbara (effusive, runny lava, fun apẹẹrẹ Iceland, Hawaii).
learnSch_earth_science_f3_kp2: Tsunami jẹ awọn igbi omi nla ti o nfa nipasẹ awọn iwariri abẹlẹ tabi awọn eruption volcano. Tsunami Okun India ti 2004 pa ~ 230,000 eniyan.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_kp3: Awọn cyclones Tropical (awọn iji lile / typhoons) dagba lori omi okun gbona (≥26°C). Wọ́n ń mú kí ìjì líle, ìjì líle, àti àkúnya omi wá.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_kp4: Ipalara si awọn eewu adayeba da lori osi, didara ile, awọn eto ikilọ, ati iṣakoso - awọn orilẹ-ede to talika jiya aibikita.
learnSch_earth_science_f3_task: Ṣe afiwe awọn okunfa ati awọn ipa ti iwariri-ilẹ nla kan (fun apẹẹrẹ Haiti 2010) pẹlu eruption nla onina (fun apẹẹrẹ Oke Pinatubo 1991). Lo tabili kan: Idi, Titobi, Awọn ipa akọkọ, Awọn ipa keji, Idahun eniyan.
learnSch_health_f2_name: Iranlọwọ akọkọ & Aabo Ti ara ẹni
learnSch_health_f2_desc: Iranlọwọ akọkọ ni iranlọwọ lẹsẹkẹsẹ ti a fi fun eniyan ti o farapa tabi alaisan ṣaaju ki iranlọwọ iṣoogun ti oṣiṣẹ to de. Mọ iranlọwọ akọkọ gba awọn ẹmi là - pẹlu 'pq ti iwalaaye' ni idaduro ọkan ọkan. Imọ aabo ti ara ẹni ṣe iranlọwọ lati yago fun awọn ijamba, da ewu mọ, ati ṣe awọn ipinnu to dara ni awọn pajawiri.
learnSch_health_f2_kp0: Iwadi akọkọ (ABCDE): Ọna atẹgun, Mimi, Circulation, Disability (ipele ti aiji), Ifihan (awọn ipalara ti o han).
learnSch_health_f2_kp1: CPR (Resuscitation Cardiopulmonary): 30 compressions àyà ni 5-6 cm ijinle ati ~ 100-120 fun iṣẹju kan, lẹhinna 2 mimi igbala. Tun ṣe titi iranlọwọ yoo fi de.
learnSch_health_f2_kp2: Ipo imularada: fun aimọkan ṣugbọn eniyan mimi - ṣe idilọwọ gige lori eebi ati jẹ ki ọna atẹgun ṣii.
learnSch_health_f2_kp3: Fun awọn gbigbona: dara labẹ omi ṣiṣan tutu fun awọn iṣẹju 10. MAA ṢE lo yinyin, bota, tabi ehin. Bo pẹlu aṣọ wiwọ ti kii ṣe fluff ti o mọ.
learnSch_health_f2_kp4: Npe awọn iṣẹ pajawiri: sọ ipo rẹ, iru pajawiri, ati nọmba awọn eniyan ti o kan. Duro lori laini ki o tẹle awọn itọnisọna.
learnSch_health_f2_task: Kọ itọsọna igbese-nipasẹ-igbesẹ fun idahun si eniyan ti o ti ṣubu ati ti ko dahun. Pẹlu: ṣayẹwo fun ailewu, iṣiro aiji, pipe fun iranlọwọ, awọn igbesẹ CPR, ati igba lati da duro. Ṣafikun awọn nọmba isunmọ (oṣuwọn funmorawon, ijinle).
learnSch_arts_f1_desc: Awọn oṣere yan lati ọpọlọpọ awọn ilana ati awọn ohun elo - iyaworan, kikun, titẹ sita, ere, aworan oni nọmba - ọkọọkan pẹlu awọn agbara ati awọn lilo pato. Loye awọn media aworan oriṣiriṣi ṣe iranlọwọ fun ọ lati yan ohun elo to tọ fun ero iṣẹ ọna rẹ, ati kọ awọn fokabulari kan lati jiroro ati ṣe iṣiro awọn iṣẹ-ọnà ni itara.
learnSch_arts_f1_kp0: Media yiya: pencil (graphite), eedu, inki - ọkọọkan ṣe agbejade didara laini oriṣiriṣi, ohun orin, ati sojurigindin. Awọn ilana gbigbọn: hatching, cross-hatching, stippling, blending.
learnSch_arts_f1_kp1: Media kikun: awọ omi (sihin, awọn agbegbe ina ti a fi silẹ laisi awọ), acrylics (orisun omi, gbigbe-yara, wapọ), awọn epo (gbigbẹ lọra, awọ ọlọrọ, ilana glazing ibile).
learnSch_arts_f1_kp2: Titẹ sita: titẹ iderun (linocut - gige kuro lati lọ kuro ni apẹrẹ), titẹ iboju, etching - awọn atẹjade aami pupọ lati inu matrix kan.
learnSch_arts_f1_kp3: Aworan: aropo (awoṣe amọ, apejọ), iyokuro (okuta gbígbẹ tabi igi), simẹnti (idẹ, resini). Aworan fifi sori ẹrọ nlo aaye funrararẹ bi alabọde.
learnSch_arts_f1_kp4: Awọn irinṣẹ iṣẹ ọna oni nọmba (Procreate, Photoshop, Blender) ṣe ẹda ati fa awọn ilana ibile - awọn fẹlẹfẹlẹ, awọn gbọnnu, ati awoṣe 3D - ṣugbọn nilo imọ ti awọn ipilẹ ipilẹ kanna.
learnSch_arts_f1_task: Yan iṣẹ ọnà kan ati alabọde aworan kan ti o ko lo tẹlẹ. Ṣe iwadii awọn ohun-ini rẹ, lẹhinna ṣẹda ikẹkọ nipa lilo alabọde yẹn. Kọ awọn ọrọ 150 ṣe iṣiro ohun ti o ṣiṣẹ, kini o nira, ati bii alabọde ṣe ni ipa lori abajade.
learnSch_arts_f2_name: Ilana Awọ || Awọ jẹ ẹya wiwo ti o lagbara julọ - o fa imolara, ṣẹda ijinle, ati ṣe itọsọna oju oluwo naa. Ilana awọ ṣe alaye awọn ibatan laarin awọn awọ ati bi o ṣe le lo wọn mọọmọ. Lati kẹkẹ awọ si dapọ opiti, awọ imudani ṣe iyipada ipa ti eyikeyi iṣẹ ọna.
learnSch_arts_f2_desc: Awọn awọ akọkọ (RYB fun kikun: pupa, ofeefee, buluu) ko ṣee ṣe nipasẹ dapọ. Awọn awọ keji (osan, alawọ ewe, eleyi ti) ni a ṣe lati awọn alakọbẹrẹ meji.
learnSch_arts_f2_kp0: Awọn awọ ibaramu joko ni idakeji ara wọn lori kẹkẹ awọ (fun apẹẹrẹ pupa-alawọ ewe, bulu-osan). Ti a gbe si ẹgbẹ ni ẹgbẹ wọn mu ara wọn pọ si; adalu ti won yomi to grẹy/brown.
learnSch_arts_f2_kp1: Iwọn otutu awọ: awọn awọ gbona (awọn pupa, awọn oranges, yellows) rilara agbara ati ilosiwaju ni wiwo. Awọn awọ tutu (bulus, alawọ ewe, awọn eleyi ti) lero tunu ati ki o pada sẹhin.
learnSch_arts_f2_kp2: Tint = awọ + funfun (fẹẹrẹfẹ). Iboji = awọ + dudu (ṣokunkun). Ohun orin = awọ + grẹy. Awọn wọnyi ṣẹda iye iwọn ni ohun ise ona.
learnSch_arts_f2_kp3: Awọn ilana awọ afọwọṣe (awọn awọ to wa nitosi) ṣẹda isokan. Awọn ero oni-mẹta (awọn awọ-awọ kanna-mẹta) ṣẹda itansan larinrin. Monochromatic nlo hue kan ni awọn iye oriṣiriṣi.
learnSch_arts_f2_kp4: Ṣẹda kẹkẹ awọ ti o nfihan gbogbo awọn hues 12 (3 akọkọ, 3 secondary, 6 tertiary). Lẹhinna kun tabi ya awọn onigun mẹrin kekere meji ni ẹgbẹ ni ẹgbẹ nipa lilo bata ibaramu kan ki o ṣe alaye ipa wiwo. Ṣe alaye pẹlu: tint, iboji, ati ohun orin ti awọ kan.
learnSch_music_f1_desc: Awọn ohun-elo orin agbaye ni a ṣe akojọpọ si awọn idile nipasẹ bi wọn ṣe ṣe agbejade ohun. Awọn oriṣi orin - lati kilasika si jazz si hip-hop - ṣe afihan aṣa, itan-akọọlẹ, ati agbegbe awujọ. Mọ awọn ohun elo ati awọn iru yoo fun ọ ni awọn fokabulari ti o wulo ati riri pupọ ti orin bi igbe aye, fọọmu aworan ti n dagba.
learnSch_music_f1_kp0: Awọn idile ohun elo: awọn okun (violin, gita - awọn okun gbigbọn), afẹfẹ igi (flute, clarinet - ọwọn afẹfẹ gbigbọn), idẹ (ipè, trombone - awọn ète buzzing), percussion (ilu, xylophone - hit), keyboard (piano, organ — awọn ọna ṣiṣe lọpọlọpọ).
learnSch_music_f1_kp1: Orchestra ruju: awọn okun, woodwind, idẹ, Percussion. Adaorin ṣe ipoidojuko gbogbo awọn apakan nipa lilo idari ati baton.
learnSch_music_f1_kp2: Orin kilasika (1750–1820): awọn fọọmu ti a ṣeto (sonata, simfoni, ere orin), awọn olupilẹṣẹ bii Mozart, Haydn, Beethoven. Orin Romantic (1820–1900): ikosile ẹdun diẹ sii, awọn akọrin nla, Brahms, Tchaikovsky, Wagner.
learnSch_music_f1_kp3: Jazz (awọn ọdun 1900, awọn orisun Amẹrika-Amẹrika): imudara, imuṣiṣẹpọ, ariwo swing. Awọn ẹya-ara: bebop, jazz tutu, idapọ. Blues: ipe-ati-idahun, 12-bar fọọmu.
learnSch_music_f1_kp4: Agbejade ati apata (1950-orundun-): gita ina mọnamọna, baasi, awọn ilu, awọn ohun orin. Hip-hop (1970s, Bronx NY): DJing, iṣapẹẹrẹ, rapping, breakdancing — agbeka aṣa pipe.
learnSch_music_f1_task: Tẹtisi nkan kan lati ọkọọkan awọn oriṣi oriṣiriṣi meji (fun apẹẹrẹ simfoni Beethoven ati orin blues kan). Fun ọkọọkan: ṣe idanimọ awọn ohun elo ti a lo, tẹmpo, adaṣe, iṣesi, ati ẹya orin kan pato si oriṣi yẹn. Ṣe afiwe wọn ni tabili kan.
learnSch_music_f1_tp0: Awọn idile irinṣẹ || Classical ati Romantic music
learnSch_music_f1_tp1: Jazz, blues, ati awọn eya imusin
learnSch_music_f1_tp2: Itan Orin || Itan-akọọlẹ orin tọpasẹ bi awọn aṣa orin, awọn ohun elo, ati awọn imọran ti wa kọja awọn ọgọrun ọdun ati awọn aṣa. Lati orin Gregorian si awọn orin aladun Beethoven si orin ijó itanna, akoko kọọkan n ṣe afihan awọn iye awujọ rẹ, imọ-ẹrọ, ati wiwo agbaye. Lílóye ìtàn orin ń mú kí ìmọrírì jinlẹ̀ síi ó sì fi orin tí ó wà lọ́wọ́lọ́wọ́ sí ipò ọ̀rọ̀.
learnSch_music_f2_name: Igba atijọ (500–1400): Kọrin Gregorian ( monophonic, orin ohun ti a ko tẹle fun ile ijọsin). Renesansi (1400-1600): polyphony (ọpọ ominira ohun awọn ẹya ara); orin alailesin farahan.
learnSch_music_f2_desc: Baroque (1600–1750): J.S. Bach, Handel, Vivaldi. Ornate counterpoint, basso continuo, awọn fọọmu: fugue, suite, oratorio. Opera ti a se ni Florence (~ 1600).
learnSch_music_f2_kp0: Akoko kilasika (1750-1820): iwọntunwọnsi, mimọ, idagbasoke ti simfoni, fọọmu sonata, quartet okun. Mozart, Haydn, tete Beethoven.
learnSch_music_f2_kp1: Akoko Romantic (1820 – 1900): Kikan ẹdun, orin eto (sọ itan kan), ifẹ orilẹ-ede (Grieg, Sibelius, Dvořák), awọn akọrin ti o gbooro pupọ.
learnSch_music_f2_kp2: 20th orundun: Modernism (Stravinsky, Schoenberg's 12-tone system), Jazz Age, Rock & Roll Iyika (1950s), minimalism (Philip Glass), ati iyipada oni-nọmba ti n ṣẹda itanna ati orin kọmputa.
learnSch_music_f2_kp3: Ṣẹda Ago ti Western music lati 500 CE si awọn bayi. Fun akoko kọọkan: kọ orukọ, awọn ọjọ, awọn olupilẹṣẹ / awọn oṣere meji, ẹya orin bọtini kan, ati ohun elo abuda kan tabi fọọmu. Ṣe àpèjúwe tàbí ṣe ìtumọ̀ àyọkà orin kan láti ìgbà kọ̀ọ̀kan.
learnSch_music_f2_task: Create a timeline of Western music from 500 CE to the present. For each period: write the name, dates, two composers/artists, one key musical feature, and one characteristic instrument or form. Illustrate or annotate one musical excerpt from each period.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_name: Egbe idaraya & Awọn ilana || Awọn ere idaraya ẹgbẹ ṣe idagbasoke awọn ọgbọn ti ara, ironu ọgbọn, ibaraẹnisọrọ, ati idari. Boya bọọlu afẹsẹgba, bọọlu inu agbọn, folliboolu, tabi bọọlu ọwọ - ọkọọkan nbeere oye ti awọn ofin, awọn ipo, ati awọn ilana ẹgbẹ. Kọ ẹkọ lati ka ere naa ati ṣe awọn ipinnu iyara jẹ pataki bi agbara ti ara.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_desc: Ibaraẹnisọrọ: pipe fun bọọlu, siseto aabo, ati iwuri fun awọn ẹlẹgbẹ ẹgbẹ jẹ pataki bi imọ-ẹrọ imọ-ẹrọ ni awọn ere idaraya ẹgbẹ.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_kp0: Awọn ilana ni bọọlu: awọn agbekalẹ (4-4-2, 4-3-3) pinnu bi awọn oṣere ṣe wa ni ipo. Titẹ ga soke ni ipolowo vs. jin olugbeja ti wa ni contrasting ilana yonuso.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_kp1: Ṣiṣe ipinnu: awọn oṣere ti o dara julọ ṣe ọlọjẹ agbegbe wọn nigbagbogbo, nireti gbigbe ti nbọ, ati yan aṣayan ti o ṣe anfani ẹgbẹ dipo iṣafihan ọgbọn ẹni kọọkan.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_kp2: Awọn ofin wa fun didara ati ailewu. Loye ofin ita (bọọlu afẹsẹgba), awọn iboju arufin (bọọlu inu agbọn), tabi awọn aṣiṣe iyipo (bọọlu folliboolu) ṣe idilọwọ awọn aṣiṣe ati awọn ijiya.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_kp3: Olori ati ere idaraya: awọn alakoso ṣe iwuri ati ibaraẹnisọrọ; gbogbo awọn oṣere bọwọ fun awọn alatako, awọn onidajọ, ati awọn abajade - awọn iye pataki ti ere idaraya.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_kp4: Yan ere idaraya ẹgbẹ kan ti o ṣe tabi wo. Ṣe apẹrẹ adaṣe adaṣe lati mu ọgbọn kan pato dara si (fun apẹẹrẹ gbigbe deede ni bọọlu). Ipinle: ogbon ti a fojusi, ohun elo ti o nilo, awọn itọnisọna fun liluho, bi o ṣe le jẹ ki o le, ati bi o ṣe le ṣe ayẹwo ilọsiwaju.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_task: Ṣiṣẹpọ ẹgbẹ ati ibaraẹnisọrọ || Awọn ilana ati kika ere
learnSch_physical_education_f1_tp0: Ofin ati itẹ play || Nini alafia & Igbesi aye ilera
learnSch_physical_education_f1_tp1: Nini alafia jẹ diẹ sii ju amọdaju ti ara - o ni pẹlu ilera ọpọlọ, oorun, ounjẹ, awọn isopọ awujọ, ati iṣakoso wahala. Igbesi aye ilera ti a ṣe lori iṣẹ ṣiṣe deede, jijẹ iwọntunwọnsi, oorun to peye, ati awọn ibatan to dara ṣe aabo fun arun onibaje ati atilẹyin alafia ni gbogbo igbesi aye.
learnSch_physical_education_f1_tp2: WHO ṣe iṣeduro awọn iṣẹju 150-300 ti iṣẹ ṣiṣe aerobic niwọntunwọnsi fun ọsẹ kan fun awọn agbalagba (fun apẹẹrẹ ririn brisk, gigun kẹkẹ) tabi awọn iṣẹju 75 ti iṣẹ ṣiṣe ti o lagbara.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_name: Orun: awọn ọdọ nilo wakati 8-10 fun alẹ kan. Oorun ti ko to n ṣe idiwọ isọdọkan iranti, iṣesi, iṣẹ ajẹsara, ati akoko ifasẹyin.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_desc: Awọn ilana iṣakoso wahala: adaṣe ti ara, iṣaro, mimi jinlẹ, iṣakoso akoko, ati sisọ si eniyan ti o gbẹkẹle jẹ gbogbo awọn isunmọ orisun-ẹri.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_kp0: Akoko iboju: lilo ti o pọ ju (paapaa media media ni alẹ) ṣe idalọwọduro oorun ati pe o ni asopọ si aibalẹ ati iyi ara ẹni kekere ninu awọn ọdọ. Awọn fifọ oni nọmba ati awọn aala ṣe iranlọwọ.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_kp1: Imọye nkan elo: ọti ati taba jẹ ofin ṣugbọn ipalara - ọti-waini ba ẹdọ ati ọpọlọ jẹ; siga fa akàn ẹdọfóró ati arun inu ọkan ati ẹjẹ. Awọn mejeeji jẹ ipalara paapaa fun awọn ara to sese ndagbasoke.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_kp2: Stress management techniques: physical exercise, mindfulness, deep breathing, time management, and talking to a trusted person are all evidence-based approaches.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_kp3: Screen time: excessive use (especially social media at night) disrupts sleep and is linked to anxiety and low self-esteem in adolescents. Digital breaks and boundaries help.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_kp4: Substance awareness: alcohol and tobacco are legal but harmful — alcohol damages the liver and brain; smoking causes lung cancer and cardiovascular disease. Both are especially harmful for developing bodies.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_task: Ṣẹda eto alafia ti ara ẹni ni ọsẹ kan. Pẹlu: Awọn akoko iṣẹ ṣiṣe ti ara 5 (iru, iye akoko, kikankikan), iṣeto oorun, awọn ilana iṣakoso wahala 3, ati awọn ibi-afẹde ounjẹ 2. Ronu lori agbegbe wo ni o nilo ilọsiwaju julọ ati idi.
learnSch_physical_education_f2_tp0: Awọn itọnisọna iṣẹ ṣiṣe ti ara
learnSch_physical_education_f2_tp2: Ilera oni nọmba ati imọ nkan na
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_desc: Ethics Philosophical béèrè: bawo ni o yẹ a sise? Kini o jẹ ki iṣe kan tọ tabi aṣiṣe? Awọn ilana ilana iṣe pataki mẹta - awọn abajade, deontology, ati awọn ilana iwa-rere - pese awọn idahun oriṣiriṣi. Lilo awọn ilana wọnyi si awọn atayanyan gidi-aye (euthanasia, idajọ oju-ọjọ, AI) ndagba ti o han gedegbe, ero ihuwasi ti iṣeto.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_kp0: Iṣeduro (Utilitarianism - Mill, Bentham): iṣe kan tọ ti o ba mu idunnu nla jade fun nọmba ti o tobi julọ. Abajade pinnu iwa.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_kp1: Deontology (Kant): diẹ ninu awọn iṣe jẹ ẹtọ tabi aṣiṣe ni inu, laibikita awọn abajade. Iṣe pataki ti Ẹka: ṣiṣẹ nikan nipasẹ awọn ofin ti o le jẹ awọn ofin agbaye.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_kp2: Iwa iwa rere (Aristotle): fojusi lori iwa kuku ju awọn ofin tabi awọn abajade. Ènìyàn oníwà rere ti mú ìwà ìgboyà, òtítọ́, ìdájọ́ òdodo, àti ìfaradà dàgbà.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_kp3: Ibaṣepọ iwa: awọn ilana iṣe yatọ laarin awọn aṣa ati awọn ẹni-kọọkan - ko si idiwọn gbogbo agbaye. Iwa absolutism: diẹ ninu awọn iṣe nigbagbogbo jẹ ẹtọ tabi aṣiṣe laibikita aṣa.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_kp4: Ilana ti a fiwe si ṣe ayẹwo awọn ariyanjiyan kan pato: awọn ilana iṣoogun (euthanasia, iṣẹyun), awọn ilana ayika (awọn iṣẹ si ẹda ti kii ṣe eniyan), ati awọn ihuwasi AI (awọn ohun ija adase, ikọkọ).
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_task: Waye kọọkan ninu awọn ilana ilana iṣe pataki mẹta (utilitarianism, deontology, ethics virtue) si atayanyan yii: 'Ṣe o jẹ iwa lati purọ lati daabobo awọn ikunsinu ẹnikan bi?’ Fun ọkọọkan, sọ ilana ipilẹ ti ipilẹ ati idahun rẹ si atayanyan naa.
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_tp1: Kant ati deontology || Iwa iwa rere ati awọn ilana ti a lo
learnSch_religion_ethics_f2_tp2: Eto eda eniyan & Ijẹ ọmọ ilu agbaye
learnSch_social_studies_f2_name: Ẹ̀tọ́ ọmọnìyàn jẹ́ ẹ̀tọ́ àgbáyé tí gbogbo ènìyàn ní, láìka orílẹ̀-èdè, akọ akọ tàbí abo, ẹ̀yà, tàbí ẹ̀sìn sí. Ikede Kariaye fun Eto Eda Eniyan (1948) fi wọn sinu ofin agbaye. Ọmọ ilu agbaye tumọ si agbọye awọn ẹtọ ati awọn ojuse rẹ ni agbaye ti o ni asopọ ati ṣiṣe iṣe fun ododo, ọjọ iwaju alagbero.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_desc: Ikede Agbaye ti Awọn Eto Eda Eniyan (UDHR, 1948) ni awọn nkan 30 ti o kan awọn ẹtọ ilu, iṣelu, ọrọ-aje, awujọ, ati aṣa - ipilẹ ti ofin awọn ẹtọ eniyan agbaye.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_kp0: Awọn ẹtọ iran akọkọ: ilu ati iṣelu (ọrọ ọfẹ, ẹtọ si idanwo ododo, ẹtọ lati dibo). Iran-keji: aje ati awujọ (ẹtọ si ẹkọ, ilera, iṣẹ).
learnSch_social_studies_f2_kp1: Awọn ẹgbẹ ẹtọ eniyan: Igbimọ Eto Eto Eda Eniyan UN, Ile-ẹjọ Odaran Kariaye (ṣe ẹjọ awọn iwa-ipa ogun ati awọn iwa-ipa si ọmọ eniyan), Ile-ẹjọ Yuroopu ti Awọn Ẹtọ Eniyan.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_kp2: Human rights bodies: UN Human Rights Council, International Criminal Court (prosecutes war crimes and crimes against humanity), European Court of Human Rights.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_kp3: Awọn ẹtọ ọmọde: Adehun UN lori Awọn ẹtọ ti Ọmọde (1989) ṣe iṣeduro ẹtọ awọn ọmọde si ẹkọ, aabo, ilera, ati ikopa. Ti fọwọsi nipasẹ awọn orilẹ-ede 196.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_kp4: Ọmọ ilu agbaye: gbigba ojuse fun awọn ọran agbaye (iyipada oju-ọjọ, aidogba, rogbodiyan) ati ṣiṣe ni agbegbe ati ni kariaye. Awon NGO (Amnesty International, Médecins Sans Frontières) fi ilana yii kun.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_task: Yan nkan mẹ́ta nínú Ìkéde Àgbáyé ti Ẹ̀tọ́ Ọmọnìyàn. Fun ọkọọkan: sọ ẹtọ, fun apẹẹrẹ gidi-aye nibiti ẹtọ yii ti ru loni, ki o daba igbese kan ti eniyan tabi ijọba le ṣe.
learnSch_social_studies_f2_tp0: UDHR ati ofin agbaye || Awọn ẹtọ ọmọde || Omo ilu agbaye ati igbese
learnSch_social_studies_f2_tp2: Ethics jẹ ẹka ti imoye ti o beere bi o ṣe yẹ ki a gbe ati ṣe. Ìmọ̀ ọgbọ́n orí ìwà rere máa ń ṣàyẹ̀wò àwọn ìpìlẹ̀ àwọn ìlànà tá a ní: kí ló dára, kí ló jẹ́ òdodo, báwo ló sì ṣe yẹ ká máa ṣe sáwọn míì? Awọn ibeere wọnyi kii ṣe arosọ - wọn ṣe atilẹyin awọn ofin, awọn ipinnu iṣoogun, idagbasoke AI, ati awọn yiyan ojoojumọ.
learnSch_philosophy_f2_name: Otitọ ti iwa: Awọn otitọ iwa ti o daju wa ni ominira ti ohun ti ẹnikẹni ro. Iwa lodi si-otitọ: iwa jẹ ti a ṣe nipasẹ awọn eniyan, awọn awujọ, tabi jẹ ikosile ti ẹdun lasan.
learnSch_philosophy_f2_desc: Iṣoro trolley (Judith Jarvis Thomson / Philippa Foot): Ṣe iwọ yoo darí ọkọ oju-irin ti o salọ lati pa eniyan kan ati fipamọ marun bi? Awọn ilana oriṣiriṣi fun awọn idahun oriṣiriṣi.
learnSch_philosophy_f2_kp0: Idajọ (Rawls): ṣe apẹrẹ awujọ lati ẹhin 'iboju ti aimọkan' - lai mọ ipo tirẹ, o yan awọn ofin ododo ti gbogbo eniyan le gba si.
learnSch_philosophy_f2_kp1: Ilọsiwaju iwa: awọn awujọ yi awọn iwo ihuwasi wọn pada ni akoko pupọ - ẹrú jẹ ofin ni ẹẹkan ati gba; Wọ́n máa ń lo ìdálóró nígbà kan nínú àwọn ilé ẹjọ́. Eyi n gbe soke: ṣe iwa ni ibatan si akoko bi?
learnSch_philosophy_f2_kp2: Iwa ti ẹranko: ariyanjiyan lilo ti Peter Singer pe ijiya ẹranko ka iwa ni deede si ijiya eniyan. Ṣe o? Kini atẹle fun bi a ṣe jẹun ati iwadii?
learnSch_philosophy_f2_kp3: Ṣe itupalẹ iṣoro trolley nipa lilo awọn ilana iṣe iṣe oriṣiriṣi meji. Ewo ni ilana kọọkan yoo ni imọran? Lẹhinna ṣe apẹrẹ atayanyan iwa ti ara rẹ ki o ṣe itupalẹ rẹ. Jíròrò bóyá ìdáhùn ‘ẹ̀tọ́’ wà tàbí àwọn tó ní ìdí tó dára jù lọ.
learnSch_philosophy_f2_task: Idajo ati Rawls || Awọn ilana ti ẹranko ati awọn atayanyan ti a lo
learnSch_philosophy_f2_tp1: Robotics daapọ ẹrọ imọ-ẹrọ, ẹrọ itanna, ati siseto lati ṣẹda awọn ẹrọ ti o ṣe awọn iṣẹ ṣiṣe ni adase tabi ologbele-laifọwọyi. Adaṣiṣẹ - rirọpo iṣẹ eniyan pẹlu awọn ẹrọ - n yipada ile-iṣẹ, oogun, ati igbesi aye ojoojumọ. Loye awọn ẹrọ roboti mura ọ silẹ fun agbaye nibiti eniyan ati awọn ẹrọ n ṣiṣẹ pọ si.
learnSch_philosophy_f2_tp2: Awọn roboti ni awọn paati akọkọ mẹta: awọn sensosi (ṣe akiyesi agbegbe), awọn oṣere (gbe ati ṣiṣẹ), ati oludari kan (ṣe ilana data sensọ ati pinnu awọn iṣe — 'ọpọlọ').
learnSch_technology_f2_desc: Robotics combines mechanical engineering, electronics, and programming to create machines that perform tasks autonomously or semi-autonomously. Automation — replacing human labour with machines — is transforming industry, medicine, and everyday life. Understanding robotics prepares you for a world where humans and machines increasingly work together.
learnSch_technology_f2_kp0: Robots have three main components: sensors (perceive the environment), actuators (move and act), and a controller (processes sensor data and decides actions — the 'brain').
learnSch_technology_f2_kp1: Awọn iwọn ti ominira (DoF): nọmba awọn ọna ominira ti robot le gbe. Apa roboti pẹlu 6 DoF le de ipo eyikeyi ati iṣalaye ni aaye 3D.
learnSch_technology_f2_kp2: Awọn roboti ile-iṣẹ: alurinmorin, kikun, apejọ ni awọn ile-iṣẹ ọkọ ayọkẹlẹ. Awọn roboti ifowosowopo (awọn koboti) ṣiṣẹ lailewu lẹgbẹẹ eniyan. Awọn roboti abẹ (Da Vinci) gba awọn iṣẹ ṣiṣe deede.
learnSch_technology_f2_kp3: Imọye Oríkĕ (AI) mu awọn roboti pọ si pẹlu iran (awọn ohun idanimọ), sisọ ede adayeba (awọn aṣẹ ohun), ati ẹkọ ẹrọ (imudara lati iriri).
learnSch_technology_f2_kp4: Adaṣiṣẹ ati eto-ọrọ aje: awọn roboti pọ si iṣelọpọ ṣugbọn yi awọn iṣẹ kan pada. Awọn iṣẹ tuntun ni a ṣẹda ni itọju roboti, siseto, ati apẹrẹ. Awọn net ipa ti wa ni ariyanjiyan.
learnSch_technology_f2_task: Ṣe apẹrẹ robot ti o rọrun lati ṣe iṣẹ-ṣiṣe kan pato (fun apẹẹrẹ yiyan awọn atunlo). Apejuwe: awọn sensosi nilo, awọn oṣere ti o nilo, ọgbọn iṣakoso (aworan sisan tabi pseudocode), ati awọn ipo ikuna ti o pọju. Lẹhinna jiroro ibakcdun ihuwasi kan nipa adaṣe adaṣe iṣẹ yii.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_desc: Awọn eto ijọba pinnu bi a ṣe ṣeto awujọ kan ati bii agbara ṣe pin kaakiri. Tiwantiwa - ijọba nipasẹ awọn eniyan - gba ọpọlọpọ awọn ọna: taara, aṣoju, alaarẹ, ati ile igbimọ aṣofin. Ifiwera awọn ọna ṣiṣe ṣe iranlọwọ fun wa idi ti diẹ ninu awọn orilẹ-ede jẹ iduroṣinṣin ati ọfẹ lakoko ti awọn miiran jẹ alaṣẹ tabi riru.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_kp0: Tiwantiwa: Awọn ara ilu yan awọn aṣoju ti o ṣe awọn ofin fun wọn. Awọn ilana pataki: ofin ti ofin, iyapa awọn agbara, ominira ti ikosile, idajọ ominira.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_kp1: Eto Alakoso (USA): alase (Aare) ni a yan taara ati lọtọ si ile-igbimọ aṣofin. Eto ile igbimọ aṣofin (UK, Jẹmánì): adari wa lati ati pe o jẹ jiyin fun ile igbimọ aṣofin.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_kp2: Iyapa awọn agbara: isofin (ṣe awọn ofin), adari (ṣe awọn ofin), idajọ (awọn ofin tumọ). Awọn sọwedowo ati awọn iwọntunwọnsi ṣe idiwọ eyikeyi ẹka lati di alagbara ju.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_kp3: Awọn ijọba alaṣẹ: agbara ti o dojukọ ni oludari kan tabi ẹgbẹ kan laisi iṣiro tiwantiwa tootọ (fun apẹẹrẹ North Korea, Belarus). Awọn ijọba arabara: awọn idibo waye ṣugbọn kii ṣe ọfẹ tabi ododo.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_kp4: Ipinle naa: agbegbe ti o ni iye olugbe ayeraye, ijọba ti o munadoko, ati ọba-alaṣẹ ti a mọ. Awọn orilẹ-ede le ni awọn ẹgbẹ ti o pọju ninu; orile-ede-ipinle mö eya pẹlu oselu aala.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_task: Ṣe afiwe awọn eto iṣelu ti AMẸRIKA (aare) ati Jamani (aṣofin). Fun ọkọọkan: ṣapejuwe bawo ni a ṣe yan adari, bawo ni awọn ofin ṣe ṣe, ati kini yoo ṣẹlẹ ti ijọba ba padanu atilẹyin ti gbogbo eniyan. Ewo ni o ro pe o ni iṣiro tiwantiwa ti o lagbara sii? Dare.
learnSch_politics_civics_f0_tp2: Awọn ọna ṣiṣe alaṣẹ || Eto eda eniyan & International Law
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_desc: Ofin agbaye n ṣe akoso awọn ibatan laarin awọn ipinlẹ ati aabo awọn ẹtọ ipilẹ ti ẹni kọọkan. Aṣẹ lẹhin-WWII ti ṣẹda UN, Ile-ẹjọ Odaran Kariaye, ati awọn adehun ti o di awọn orilẹ-ede lati ṣe atilẹyin awọn ẹtọ eniyan. Loye awọn ile-iṣẹ wọnyi ṣe iranlọwọ fun ọ lati ṣe ayẹwo bi agbaye ṣe dahun si rogbodiyan, aiṣedeede, ati awọn rogbodiyan omoniyan.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_kp0: Ajo Agbaye (ti a da 1945, awọn orilẹ-ede ọmọ ẹgbẹ 193): n ṣetọju alaafia ati aabo agbaye, ṣe agbega idagbasoke ati awọn ẹtọ eniyan nipasẹ awọn ile-iṣẹ amọja 15 rẹ.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_kp1: Ofin omoniyan agbaye (Awọn apejọ Geneva): ṣe aabo fun awọn ara ilu, awọn ọmọ ogun ti o gbọgbẹ, ati awọn ẹlẹwọn ogun lakoko ija ologun. Ṣírú wọn jẹ́ ìwà ọ̀daràn ogun.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_kp2: Ile-ẹjọ Odaran Kariaye (ICC, The Hague): ṣe idajọ awọn eniyan kọọkan fun ipaeyarun, awọn iwa-ipa si ẹda eniyan, ati awọn iwa-ipa ogun nigbati awọn kootu orilẹ-ede kuna lati ṣiṣẹ.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_kp3: Nupojipetọ vs. idasi: awọn ipinlẹ jẹ ọba-ọba (ko si kikọlu ita ni awọn ọran inu), ṣugbọn ẹkọ 'Ojúṣe lati Daabobo' (R2P) ngbanilaaye ilowosi nigbati ipinlẹ kan ba ṣe awọn ika nla.
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_kp4: Ofin asasala: Adehun asasala ti 1951 ṣe asọye asasala bi ẹnikan ti o salọ inunibini ti o da lori ẹya, ẹsin, orilẹ-ede, ero oloselu, tabi ẹgbẹ awujọ. Awọn ipinlẹ ko gbọdọ da wọn pada si ewu (ti kii ṣe atunṣe).
learnSch_politics_civics_f1_task: Ṣe iwadii idaamu lọwọlọwọ tabi aipẹ ti kariaye (fun apẹẹrẹ rogbodiyan tabi pajawiri omoniyan). Ṣe idanimọ: (a) iru awọn ofin agbaye lo, (b) awọn iṣe wo ni UN tabi ICC ti ṣe, (c) ariyanjiyan kan fun ati ọkan lodi si idasi ologun.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_desc: Ikopa tiwantiwa kọja idibo - o pẹlu ipolongo, ẹbẹ, ikede, ati ṣiṣe fun ọfiisi. Awọn eto idibo ṣe ipinnu bi awọn ibo ṣe tumọ si awọn ijoko ati ṣe apẹrẹ awọn abajade iṣelu. Loye ikopa ṣe iranlọwọ fun ọ lati lo awọn ẹtọ rẹ ati da iyatọ laarin ijọba tiwantiwa ti ilera ati idinku oludibo.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_kp0: Awọn eto idibo: First-Past-The-Post (UK, USA) - oludije pẹlu ọpọlọpọ awọn ibo bori, duro lati gbe awọn eto ẹgbẹ meji jade. Aṣoju Iṣọkan (Germany, Fiorino) - awọn ẹgbẹ gba awọn ijoko ni iwọn si awọn ibo, ṣe iwuri fun awọn iṣọpọ ẹgbẹ-pupọ.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_kp1: Awọn ẹgbẹ oṣelu ṣeto awọn eniyan ti o ni awọn iwo kanna lati dije ati ṣe ijọba. Osi-apakan: tobi Equality, ipinle intervention. Ọtun-apakan: ominira olukuluku, awọn ọja ọfẹ. Aarin: dede awọn ipo.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_kp2: Ipadabọ oludibo yatọ: ifaramọ ilu giga n mu ijọba tiwantiwa lagbara. Awọn idena pẹlu: iforukọsilẹ eka, awọn ibeere ID oludibo, awọn ibudo idibo ti ko wọle, ati ijakulẹ.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_kp3: Ikopa ti kii ṣe idibo: awọn ẹbẹ, awọn ifihan gbangba, aigbọran ara ilu (fifọ ofin alaafia lati ṣe afihan aiṣedeede - ti Gandhi lo, Martin Luther King), ijajagbara media awujọ.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_kp4: Media ati ijoba tiwantiwa: Awọn iroyin ọfẹ jẹ awọn ijọba ni akọọlẹ (ohun-ini kẹrin). Àlẹmọ awọn nyoju ati alaye aiṣedeede ṣe idẹruba idibo alaye - imọwe media jẹ ọgbọn ti ara ilu.
learnSch_politics_civics_f2_task: Ṣe afiwe FPTP ati Aṣoju Iṣeduro ni lilo awọn ilana wọnyi: ododo ti aṣoju, iduroṣinṣin ti ijọba, yiyan oludibo, ati iṣeeṣe ti iṣọkan. Lẹhinna ṣe apẹrẹ ipolongo kan fun idibo igbimọ ile-iwe kan - kọ iwe ifihan kan, ṣe idanimọ awọn oludibo rẹ, ati gbero awọn iṣẹ ipolongo mẹta.
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_desc: Psychology jẹ iwadi ijinle sayensi ti okan, ọpọlọ, ati ihuwasi. O n wa lati ni oye idi ti eniyan fi ronu, rilara, ati ṣe ni ọna ti wọn ṣe - lati oorun ati iranti si ifẹ ati ibinu. Awọn ọna Psychology jẹ imọ-jinlẹ: awọn idanwo iṣakoso, akiyesi, ati itupalẹ iṣiro. O ti yipada oogun, ẹkọ, ati igbesi aye ojoojumọ.
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_kp0: Awọn iwoye pataki ti Psychology: imọ-jinlẹ (ọpọlọ, awọn Jiini), imọ (awọn ilana ironu), ihuwasi (ihuwasi akiyesi, imudara), psychodynamic (awọn awakọ ti ko mọ), ati ẹda eniyan (iwa-ara-ẹni).
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_kp1: Ọna imọ-jinlẹ ninu imọ-ọkan: arosọ → adanwo → ikojọpọ data → itupalẹ → ipari. Atunwo ẹlẹgbẹ ṣe idaniloju pe a ṣayẹwo awọn awari ṣaaju ki o to tẹjade.
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_kp2: Awọn agbegbe bọtini ọpọlọ: cortex prefrontal (ipinnu-ṣiṣe, eniyan), amygdala (imolara, idahun iberu), hippocampus (Idasilẹ iranti), cerebellum (itọju).
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_kp3: Iseda vs. ìjiyàn jíjinlẹ̀: dé ìwọ̀n àyè wo ni Jiini (iseda) vs. Awọn ti isiyi ipohunpo: mejeeji nlo.
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_kp4: Ethics ni oroinuokan: awọn olukopa gbọdọ funni ni ifọwọsi alaye, le yọkuro nigbakugba, data jẹ aṣiri, ati pe awọn ijinlẹ ko gbọdọ fa ipalara pipẹ. Idanwo Milgram (1960s) gbe awọn ibeere iṣe pataki dide.
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_task: Ṣe apẹrẹ iwadi akiyesi iwa lati ṣe iwadii boya awọn ọmọ ile-iwe ni idamu diẹ sii nigbati wọn ba kọ orin tabi ni ipalọlọ. Ipinle: ibeere iwadi, ọna, awọn oniyipada, awọn idamu ti o pọju, ati bi o ṣe le ṣe itupalẹ data naa.
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_tp0: Awọn irisi pataki || Awọn ọpọlọ ati ihuwasi || Awọn ọna iwadi ati awọn ilana iṣe
learnSch_psychology_school_f0_tp2: Imọye n tọka si gbogbo awọn ilana ọpọlọ: akiyesi, akiyesi, iranti, ironu, ede, ati ipinnu iṣoro. Imọye iranti - bawo ni o ṣe ṣẹda, fipamọ, ati gba pada - jẹ pataki taara si kikọ. Iwadi fihan pe iranti ti nṣiṣe lọwọ ati atunwi alafo ṣe iyalẹnu ju kika palolo lọ fun idaduro igba pipẹ.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_name: Awoṣe ile-itaja pupọ (Atkinson & Shiffrin): iranti ifarako (ida kan ti iṣẹju kan) → iranti igba kukuru (7 ± 2 awọn ohun kan, ~ 20 iṣẹju-aaya) → iranti igba pipẹ (agbara ailopin, ti o le yẹ).
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_desc: Ṣiṣe koodu: yiyi iriri pada si awọn itọpa iranti. Ifaminsi alaye (sisopọ alaye titun si imọ ti o wa tẹlẹ) jẹ diẹ munadoko diẹ sii ju atunwi rote lọ.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_kp0: Ipa aye: kika ohun elo kanna kọja awọn igba pupọ lori akoko (atunwi alafo) yori si iranti igba pipẹ ti o dara dara julọ ju 'cramming' lọpọlọpọ.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_kp1: Iwa imupadabọ: ifitonileti ifitonileti ni itara (idanwo ara ẹni, awọn kaadi filaṣi) mu awọn itọpa iranti lagbara pupọ diẹ sii ju kika kika. Eyi ni 'ipa idanwo'.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_kp2: Iranti jẹ atunṣe, kii ṣe ibisi: ni gbogbo igba ti a ba ranti iranti kan, a yipada ni arekereke. Nítorí náà ẹ̀rí ẹlẹ́rìí kò ṣe ìgbẹ́kẹ̀lé — tí a fihàn léraléra nínú ìwádìí inú ilé ẹjọ́.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_kp3: Ṣe idanwo ipa aye: ṣe iwadi awọn ọrọ tuntun 20 nipa lilo iṣe ti o pọ (gbogbo ni ẹẹkan loni). Ṣe idanwo fun ara rẹ lẹhin ọjọ 1. Lẹhinna ṣe iwadi awọn ọrọ tuntun 20 lori awọn ọjọ 5 (4 fun ọjọ kan). Ṣe idanwo lẹhin awọn ọjọ 7. Ṣe afiwe awọn ikun rẹ ki o kọ awọn awari rẹ.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_kp4: Memory is reconstructive, not reproductive: every time we recall a memory, we subtly alter it. Eyewitness testimony is therefore unreliable — shown repeatedly in courtroom research.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_task: Test the spacing effect: study 20 new vocabulary words using massed practice (all at once today). Test yourself after 1 day. Then study 20 new words over 5 days (4 per day). Test after 7 days. Compare your scores and write up your findings.
learnSch_psychology_school_f1_tp2: Awọn ilana ikẹkọ lati inu imọ-jinlẹ
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_desc: Awọn ẹkọ ẹkọ nipa ẹkọ nipa awujọ awujọ bii eniyan ṣe ronu, rilara, ati huwa ni iwaju awọn miiran - gidi tabi airotẹlẹ. Ó ṣàfihàn bí ọ̀rọ̀ àyíká wa ṣe jinlẹ̀ tó: a fara mọ́ àwọn ẹgbẹ́, a ṣègbọràn sí àṣẹ, a sì ṣàgbékalẹ̀ ojúsàájú — ní gbogbo ìgbà láìmọ̀. Imọye ipa awujọ ṣe iranlọwọ fun wa lati ṣe ominira diẹ sii, awọn ipinnu ihuwasi.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_kp0: Ibamu (idanwo Asch, 1951): awọn olukopa funni ni awọn idahun ti ko tọ ni gbangba nigbati wọn rii pe awọn miiran fun wọn - ṣe afihan iwuwasi (nfẹ lati baamu) ati alaye (awọn onigbagbọ awọn miiran jẹ ẹtọ) ipa awujọ.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_kp1: Ìgbọràn (Milgram, 1963): awọn olukopa ti a nṣakoso nkqwe lewu ina mọnamọna nitori ohun aṣẹ olusin wi fun wọn lati - 65% lọ si awọn ti o pọju. Dohia lehe aṣẹpipa nọ duto ayihadawhẹnamẹnu mẹdetiti tọn ji do hia.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_kp2: Ipa oju-ọna: diẹ sii awọn eniyan ti o wa ni pajawiri, diẹ ni o ṣeese eyikeyi eniyan lati ṣe iranlọwọ (itankale ti ojuse). Kitty Genovese nla, 1964.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_kp3: Imọye ifọkansi: a ṣe alaye ihuwasi nipa sisọ si inu (ẹni, agbara) tabi ita (ipo, orire) awọn okunfa. Aṣiṣe ikasi ipilẹ: iwọnju awọn idi inu inu fun ihuwasi buburu awọn miiran.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_kp4: Ni-ẹgbẹ ati ita-ẹgbẹ: a ṣe ojurere fun awọn eniyan ti a ṣe idanimọ pẹlu ('wa') ati pe o le ṣe iyatọ si awọn miiran ('wọn'). Robbers Cave ṣàdánwò fihan bi ẹgbẹ idije orisi igbogunti.
learnSch_psychology_school_f2_task: O ṣe akiyesi pe ko si ẹnikan ninu yara ti o kunju ti o ṣe iranlọwọ fun eniyan ti o ti fi iwe wọn silẹ ti o si farahan ninu irora. Nípa lílo ìmọ̀ ẹ̀kọ́ àkànlògbò, ṣàlàyé: (a) ìdí tí èyí fi lè ṣẹlẹ̀, (b) Àwọn nǹkan pàtó wo ló ń pọ̀ sí i tàbí dídín àǹfààní láti ṣèrànwọ́ kù, (d) ohun tí ìwọ fúnra rẹ lè ṣe láti borí ipa tí wọ́n ń dúró tì.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_name: Eto oorun wa ti ṣẹda ni nkan bi 4.6 bilionu ọdun sẹyin lati inu awọsanma ti gaasi ati eruku. Ó ní ìràwọ̀ kan (Oòrùn), àwọn pílánẹ́ẹ̀tì mẹ́jọ, ọ̀pọ̀lọpọ̀ oṣù, àti àìlóǹkà ara kéékèèké — asteroids, comets, àti àwọn pílánẹ́ẹ̀tì arara. Lílóye ìtòlẹ́sẹẹsẹ rẹ̀ àti àwọn ipa tí ń ṣàkóso rẹ̀ ṣopọ̀ mọ́ fisiksi, kemistri, àti ipò wa nínú àgbáálá ayé.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_desc: Oorun ni 99.86% ti iwọn ti eto oorun. O n ṣe agbara nipasẹ idapọ iparun: awọn ekuro hydrogen fiusi lati ṣe helium, itusilẹ awọn oye pupọ ti ina ati ooru.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_kp0: Awọn aye apata inu: Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars - kekere, ipon, sunmo si Oorun. Awọn omiran ti ita / yinyin: Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune - o tobi pupọ, jina si Oorun.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_kp1: Awọn ofin Kepler: awọn aye-aye yipo Oorun ni awọn ellipses (kii ṣe awọn iyika); gbe yiyara nigbati o sunmọ Sun; ati onigun mẹrin ti akoko orbital jẹ iwọn si cube ti rediosi orbital.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_kp2: Igbanu asteroid wa laarin Mars ati Jupiter; Belt Kuiper ti o kọja Neptune ni Pluto ati awọn aye aye arara miiran. Comets pilẹṣẹ lati Oort awọsanma.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_kp3: The asteroid belt lies between Mars and Jupiter; the Kuiper Belt beyond Neptune contains Pluto and other dwarf planets. Comets originate from the Oort Cloud.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_kp4: Walẹ di ohun gbogbo ni yipo. Iyara ona abayo: iyara ti a nilo lati ya kuro ninu walẹ ti ara - Earth jẹ ~ 11.2 km/s; Oṣupa jẹ ~ 2.4 km / s.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_task: Ṣẹda aworan atọka ti eto oorun. Fun aye kọọkan: sọ iwọn rẹ ni ibatan si Earth, akoko orbital, ẹya alailẹgbẹ kan, ati boya o le ṣe atilẹyin igbesi aye. Samisi igbanu asteroid ati Kuiper Belt. Ṣe alaye ofin Kepler keji ni lilo aworan atọka rẹ.
learnSch_astronomy_f0_tp0: Oorun ati awọn aye ti inu || Awọn aye aye ode ati awọn ara kekere
learnSch_astronomy_f0_tp2: Stars & Stellar Itankalẹ || Awọn irawọ kii ṣe ayeraye - wọn ti bi, gbe, wọn si ku, nigbagbogbo ninu awọn bugbamu iyalẹnu. Ayanmọ irawọ kan da lori iwọn rẹ patapata. Oorun yoo bajẹ faagun sinu omiran pupa ati lẹhinna ṣubu si arara funfun kan, lakoko ti awọn irawọ nla diẹ sii pari bi awọn irawọ supernovae ati neutroni tabi awọn iho dudu. Gbogbo awọn eroja ti o wuwo ju hydrogen ni a da sinu awọn irawọ.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_name: Awọn irawọ dagba ni nebulae (awọn awọsanma omiran ti gaasi ati eruku) nigbati agbara walẹ fa awọn iṣupọ lati ṣubu ati ki o gbona titi ti idapọmọra iparun yoo gbin - ibimọ ti protostar, lẹhinna irawọ ọkọọkan kan.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_desc: Ọkọọkan akọkọ: awọn irawọ lo pupọ julọ ti igbesi aye wọn ni idapọ hydrogen si helium ni ipo iduroṣinṣin. Oorun ti wa lori ọna akọkọ fun ~ 4.6 bilionu ọdun ati pe o ni ~ 5 bilionu ti o ku.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_kp0: Aworan atọka Hertzsprung-Russell (HR) ṣe igbero awọn irawọ nipasẹ itanna ati iwọn otutu. Main ọkọọkan nṣiṣẹ diagonally; awọn omiran pupa (oke apa ọtun) ati awọn adẹtẹ funfun (isalẹ apa osi) wa ni pipa yii.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_kp1: Awọn irawọ ti o kere pupọ (bii Oorun): ilana akọkọ → omiran pupa → ayeraye nebula → arara funfun → (bakẹhin) arara dudu.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_kp2: Awọn irawọ giga-giga: ọna akọkọ → supergiant pupa → bugbamu supernova (ṣẹda awọn eroja ti o wuwo ju irin, tuka wọn sinu aaye) → irawọ neutroni tabi iho dudu.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_kp3: Fa awọn ipa ọna itankalẹ alarinrin meji lori aworan atọka HR: ọkan fun irawọ kan bi Oorun, ọkan fun irawọ ni igba 20 diẹ sii ti o pọ sii. Fun ipele kọọkan: sọ orukọ, iwọn akoko, ati ilana iparun akọkọ ti n ṣẹlẹ. Ṣe alaye kini supernova jẹ ati idi ti o ṣe pataki fun ipilẹṣẹ ti awọn eroja lori Earth.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_kp4: Star Ibiyi ati akọkọ ọkọọkan || HR aworan atọka
learnSch_astronomy_f1_tp1: Ni ikọja eto oorun wa ni awọn ọkẹ àìmọye ti awọn irawọ ti a ṣe akojọpọ si awọn iṣupọ, ati lẹhin awọn irawọ ni agbaye ti o ṣe akiyesi - bii 93 bilionu ọdun ina kọja ati 13.8 bilionu ọdun. Cosmology — Imọ ti ipilẹṣẹ ati itankalẹ agbaye — ti ṣafihan aworan iyalẹnu kan: Big Bang, aaye ti o gbooro, ọrọ dudu, ati agbara dudu.
learnSch_astronomy_f1_tp2: Ọ̀nà Milky jẹ ìṣùpọ̀ ìràwọ̀ onífẹ̀ẹ́fẹ́fẹ́ tí a díwọ̀n tí ó ní ~250 bílíọ̀nù ìràwọ̀. Oorun wa wa ~ 27,000 awọn ọdun ina lati ile-iṣẹ galactic. O gba Oorun ~ 225 milionu ọdun lati yipo galaxy.
learnSch_astronomy_f2_name: Awọn oriṣi Agbaaiye: ajija (bii ọna Milky ati Andromeda), elliptical (awọn irawọ agbalagba, gaasi kekere), alaibamu (ko si apẹrẹ asọye, nigbagbogbo abajade ti awọn ikọlu galactic).
learnSch_astronomy_f2_desc: Beyond our solar system lie billions of stars grouped into galaxies, and beyond galaxies lies the observable universe — about 93 billion light-years across and 13.8 billion years old. Cosmology — the science of the universe's origin and evolution — has revealed an astonishing picture: the Big Bang, expanding space, dark matter, and dark energy.
learnSch_astronomy_f2_kp0: The Milky Way is a barred spiral galaxy containing ~250 billion stars. Our Sun is located ~27,000 light-years from the galactic centre. It takes the Sun ~225 million years to orbit the galaxy.
learnSch_astronomy_f2_kp1: Galaxy types: spiral (like the Milky Way and Andromeda), elliptical (older stars, little gas), irregular (no defined shape, often result of galactic collisions).
learnSch_astronomy_f2_kp2: Ilana Big Bang: ~ 13.8 bilionu ọdun sẹyin, Agbaye bẹrẹ bi ohun ti o gbona pupọ, aaye ipon ati pe o ti n pọ si lati igba naa. Ẹri: itankalẹ isale makirowefu agba aye, Ofin Hubble (awọn galaxies yiyara ni iyara ti wọn jinna si).
learnSch_astronomy_f2_kp3: Ọrọ dudu: ọrọ alaihan ti ko tan imọlẹ ṣugbọn ti awọn ipa agbara walẹ mu awọn iṣupọ pọ. Ṣe soke ~ 27% ti agbara-agbara agbaye. Iseda rẹ jẹ aimọ.
learnSch_astronomy_f2_kp4: Agbara dudu: ipa aramada ti o n wa imugboroja isare ti agbaye. Ṣe soke ~ 68% ti Agbaye. Nkan ti o wọpọ (irawọ, awọn aye aye, gaasi) jẹ ~ 5% nikan.
learnSch_astronomy_f2_task: Ṣẹda 'adirẹsi' kan fun Earth: aye, eto irawọ, galaxy, ẹgbẹ galaxy, supercluster, Agbaye ti o ṣe akiyesi. Pese ijinna / iwọn fun ipele kọọkan. Lẹhinna ṣe alaye awọn ege meji ti ẹri fun ẹkọ Big Bang, pẹlu kini itankalẹ isale makirowefu agba aye jẹ.
learnSch_latin_language_f0_desc: Latin jẹ ede ti o ni iyipada — awọn ipari ọrọ (kii ṣe ilana ọrọ) ṣe afihan iṣẹ girama. Titunto si awọn idinku ọrọ-ọrọ ati awọn ifunmọ ọrọ-ọrọ ṣii itumọ ọrọ Latin eyikeyi, lati awọn ijabọ ogun Kesari si ewi apọju Virgil. Gírámà èdè Látìn tún mú òye èdè Gẹ̀ẹ́sì, Faransé, Sípéènì, Ítálì, àti Pọ́gígà pọ̀ sí.
learnSch_latin_language_f0_kp0: Latin ni o ni marun declensions nọun. Ilọkuro kọọkan ni awọn ọran mẹfa: yiyan (koko ọrọ), ẹsun (ohun), genitive (ohun-ini), dative (ohun aiṣe-taara), ablative (orisirisi), vocative (adirẹsi).
learnSch_latin_language_f0_kp1: Apeere 1st declension: puella (ọmọbinrin) - puella (nom.), puellam (acc.), puellae (gen.), puellae (dat.), puella (abl.), puella (voc.). Pupọ: puellae, puellas, puellarum, puellis, puellis, puellae.
learnSch_latin_language_f0_kp2: Awọn ọrọ-ọrọ jẹ idapọpọ fun eniyan (1st/2nd/3rd), nọmba (ẹyọkan/pupọ), wahala (lọwọsi, aipe, pipe, ojo iwaju), ohun (lọwọ/palolo), ati iṣesi (itọkasi, subjunctive, pataki).
learnSch_latin_language_f0_kp3: Present tense of amare (to love): amo, amas, amat, amamus, amatis, amant — I love, you love, he/she/ it loves, we love, you (pl.) love, they love.
learnSch_latin_language_f0_kp4: Ilana ọrọ ni Latin jẹ rọ nitori awọn ipari ṣe afihan iṣẹ: 'Puella aquam portat' ati 'Aquam puella portat' mejeeji tumọ si 'Ọmọbirin naa gbe omi.' Itọkasi n yipada ṣugbọn itumo awọn iduro.
learnSch_latin_language_f0_task: Kọ orukọ 'dominus' silẹ (titunto si, akọ-ara-ara ti o dinku) ni gbogbo awọn ọran mẹfa, ẹyọkan ati pupọ. Lehin na parapo 'videre' (lati wo) ni isinsinyi, gbogbo eniyan. Tumọ: 'Dominus puellas amat' ati 'Puellae dominum vident'.
learnSch_latin_language_f0_tp0: Awọn idinku orukọ ati awọn ọran
learnSch_latin_language_f1_desc: Kika awọn ọrọ Latin ododo - Caesar, Cicero, Virgil, Ovid - so ọ pọ si ọdun 2,000 ti ironu Iwọ-oorun, ofin, litireso, ati imọ-jinlẹ. Ogbon ti itumọ ṣe agbero pipe ti iṣiro, sũru, ati agbara lati ṣiṣẹ pẹlu awọn gbolohun ọrọ ti o nipọn. Paapaa awọn ọrọ ti o rọrun ṣafihan awọn iye Roman, itan-akọọlẹ, ati arosọ.
learnSch_latin_language_f1_kp0: Ilana itumọ: ṣe idanimọ ọrọ-ọrọ naa ni akọkọ (o sọ fun ọ iṣe ati wahala), lẹhinna koko-ọrọ (orukọ), lẹhinna nkan naa (ẹsun), lẹhinna awọn eroja miiran.
learnSch_latin_language_f1_kp1: Ti Kesari 'De Bello Gallico' ti kọ ni itele, Latin ologun - o dara fun awọn olubere. Awọn ọrọ-ọrọ Cicero lo arosọ ti o nipọn. Virgil's 'Aeneid' jẹ oríkì pẹlu mita ati ede alaworan.
learnSch_latin_language_f1_kp2: Awọn gbolohun ọrọ abẹlẹ: ẹsun + ailopin (gbólóhùn aiṣe-taara), awọn gbolohun ọrọ pẹlu (nigbati/latigba), awọn gbolohun ọrọ ibatan (qui, quae, quod — who, which), awọn gbolohun ọrọ abajade (ut + subjunctive).
learnSch_latin_language_f1_kp3: Iṣoro pipe: awọn iṣe ti o kọja ti pari. Awọn ipari pipe deede: -i, -isti, -it, -imus, -istis, -erunt. Apeere: amavi = Mo feran / Mo ti feran.
learnSch_latin_language_f1_kp4: Awọn ilana kika: awọn itọka ọrọ-ọrọ ṣe iranlọwọ nigbati girama ko ṣe akiyesi. Lo imọ ti awọn ọrọ gbongbo - ọpọlọpọ awọn ọrọ Gẹẹsi jẹ awọn itọsẹ Latin (fun apẹẹrẹ 'ibudo' lati portare = lati gbe).
learnSch_latin_language_f1_task: Tumọ aye yii lati ọdọ Kesari: 'Milites Romani castrum magnum aedificaverut. Galli fun silvas fugerunt ati ni montibus se celaverunt.' Itupalẹ: ṣe idanimọ koko-ọrọ, ọrọ-ọrọ, nkan, ati eyikeyi awọn gbolohun ọrọ ablative. Kini wahala ni awọn ọrọ-ọrọ naa? Kí ni èyí sọ fún wa nípa ohun tó ṣẹlẹ̀ tẹ́lẹ̀?
learnSch_latin_language_f2_name: Aṣa Romu Nipasẹ Ede || Latin kii ṣe ede nikan - o jẹ ọkọ ti gbogbo ọlaju ti o ṣe agbekalẹ ofin, faaji, ẹsin, ati ironu iṣelu kọja Yuroopu ati agbaye. Awọn imọran Romu ti a fi sinu Latin - res publica, imperium, senatus, ius - taara fun wa ni 'olominira', 'ijọba', 'Alagba', ati 'idajọ'. Lílóye ohun-ìní yìí jẹ́ aláìníyàtọ̀ sí òye ìtàn Ìwọ̀-oòrùn.
learnSch_latin_language_f2_desc: Ogún ti Latin: ~ 60% ti awọn ọrọ Gẹẹsi jẹ lati inu Latin tabi Faranse ti o ni ipa lati Latin. Awọn orukọ imọ-jinlẹ, awọn ofin ofin, ati awọn fokabulari iṣoogun jẹ Latin ni pataki julọ.
learnSch_latin_language_f2_kp0: Awọn imọran ofin Roman ti o tun wa ni lilo: habeas corpus (o gbọdọ gbejade ara - ẹtọ lati ma ṣe ni ẹwọn laisi idiyele), idajọ labẹ (labẹ onidajọ), ni isansa, pro bono, ex parte.
learnSch_latin_language_f2_kp1: Awọn ilowosi ẹsin ati aṣa ti Roman: kalẹnda (awọn oṣu ti a npè ni lẹhin awọn oriṣa Romu ati awọn ọba: Oṣu Kini / Janus, Oṣu Kẹta / Mars, Oṣu Keje / Julius Caesar), awọn aṣẹ ayaworan (Doric, Ionic, Korinti).
learnSch_latin_language_f2_kp2: Latin mottos si tun lo: carpe diem (gba awọn ọjọ), cogito ergo apao (Mo ro pe, nitorina emi ni), veni vidi vici (Mo ti wá, Mo ti ri, Mo ti ṣẹgun - Julius Caesar), e pluribus unum (jade ti ọpọlọpọ, ọkan - USA motto).
learnSch_latin_language_f2_kp3: Awọn iwe Romu: Virgil's 'Aeneid' (adaparọ ipilẹ ipilẹ ti Rome), Ovid's 'Metamorphoses' (awọn arosọ ti iyipada), awọn ọrọ Cicero, awọn asọye ologun ti Kesari - gbogbo wọn tun ka ati kọ ẹkọ loni.
learnSch_latin_language_f2_kp4: Wa awọn ọrọ Gẹẹsi 10 ti o wa lati awọn gbongbo Latin ni paragi kan ti eyikeyi iwe-ẹkọ. Fun ọkọọkan: kọ gbongbo Latin, itumọ rẹ, ati ọrọ Gẹẹsi. Lẹ́yìn náà, ṣàlàyé ọ̀rọ̀ òfin Róòmù kan kí o sì fi bí ó ṣe wúlò nínú ètò òfin òde òní hàn.
learnSch_latin_language_f2_task: Awọn gbongbo Latin ni Gẹẹsi ati imọ-jinlẹ
learnSch_latin_language_f2_tp0: Roman ofin ati iselu || Latin litireso ati asa
learnSch_media_studies_f0_desc: Imọwe media ni agbara lati wọle si, itupalẹ, ṣe iṣiro, ati ṣẹda media. Ni agbaye ti o kun fun alaye - awọn iroyin, media awujọ, ipolowo, ere idaraya - agbara lati ṣe ayẹwo awọn orisun ni itara, ṣe idanimọ abosi, ati idanimọ ifọwọyi jẹ ọgbọn ipilẹ tiwantiwa. Awọn ara ilu ti o mọọwe si media jẹ lile lati tan.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_kp0: Gbogbo awọn ifiranṣẹ media ti wa ni itumọ: wọn ṣe nipasẹ ẹnikan, fun idi kan, fun olugbo kan, ni lilo awọn ilana kan pato, pẹlu awọn ipa agbara. Ilana CAGE: Ikọle, Awọn olugbo, Iru, Ipa.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_kp1: Iyatọ ninu awọn iroyin: iyanju yiyan (kini awọn itan ti o bo), aiṣedeede fireemu (bii wọn ṣe gbekalẹ), ati irẹjẹ orisun (ti a gbọ ohun rẹ). Gbogbo awọn iÿë media ni diẹ ninu irẹjẹ - ibeere naa ni iye ati ni itọsọna wo.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_kp2: Alaye ti ko tọ: alaye eke tan kaakiri laisi aniyan lati tan. Iyatọ: mọọmọ alaye eke ti a ṣẹda lati ṣina. Awọn oju opo wẹẹbu Ṣiṣayẹwo otitọ (Snopes, Otitọ Kikun, Politifact) ṣe iranlọwọ lati rii daju awọn ẹtọ.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_kp3: Awọn ilana ipolowo: afilọ ẹdun, ifọwọsi olokiki, bandwagon ('gbogbo eniyan lo'), aini ('ifunni to lopin'), atunwi. Ipolowo n ṣiṣẹ lairotẹlẹ - paapaa ti a ba mọ awọn ẹtan naa.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_kp4: Awọn ọrọ ohun-ini: nọmba kekere ti awọn ile-iṣẹ ni awọn media agbaye julọ (News Corp, Disney, Google, Meta). Nini idojukọ le ṣe idinwo oniruuru awọn oju-iwoye.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_task: Yan itan iroyin kan ti o bo nipasẹ awọn ọna oriṣiriṣi mẹta (fun apẹẹrẹ nkan BBC kan, tabloid, ati ifiweranṣẹ awujọ awujọ). Ṣe afiwe: akọle, ohun orin, ẹri ti a lo, ti awọn agbasọ ọrọ rẹ wa, ati ohun ti o kù. Oṣuwọn kọọkan fun igbẹkẹle. Pari eyi ti o jẹ igbẹkẹle julọ ati idi.
learnSch_media_studies_f0_tp0: Media ikole ati abosi || Alaye ti ko tọ ati ṣiṣe ayẹwo-otitọ
learnSch_media_studies_f1_name: Fiimu jẹ ọkan ninu awọn media itan-itan ti o lagbara julọ ti a ṣẹda lailai. O darapọ aworan, ohun, gbigbe, ati ṣiṣatunṣe lati ṣẹda itumọ. Kọ ẹkọ lati 'ka' fiimu bi ọrọ kan - itupalẹ awọn igun kamẹra, ina, apẹrẹ ohun, ati igbekalẹ itan — ṣii iriri ti o ni ọlọrọ ti sinima ati fun ọ ni awọn irinṣẹ lati ṣẹda awọn itan wiwo tirẹ.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_desc: Awọn iyaworan kamẹra: isunmọ pupọ (imolara, alaye), isunmọ (idahun ihuwasi), ibọn alabọde (ohun kikọ + ọrọ-ọrọ), ibọn gigun (eto), ibọn gigun pupọ (ipinya, ala-ilẹ). Ọkọọkan ṣẹda awọn ipa ẹdun oriṣiriṣi.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_kp0: Awọn igun kamẹra: igun kekere (jẹ ki koko-ọrọ jẹ alagbara), igun giga (jẹ ki koko-ọrọ jẹ kekere / ipalara), ipele oju (aiṣedeede), itọlẹ Dutch (unase / ẹdọfu). Ojuami ti wiwo Asokagba immerse awọn wiwo ni a ti ohun kikọ silẹ ká irisi.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_kp1: Ṣiṣatunṣe: ge (iyipada lẹsẹkẹsẹ), ipare (diẹdiẹ si dudu - daba akoko gbigbe), tu (ni lqkan - ni imọran asopọ). Ṣiṣatunṣe Montage ṣẹda itumo nipasẹ ọkọọkan (Eisenstein).
learnSch_media_studies_f1_kp2: Ohun: ohun diegetic (ti o wa ninu aye fiimu - ijiroro, awọn igbesẹ ẹsẹ), ti kii-diegetic (orin ohun ti a gbọ nikan nipasẹ awọn olugbo). Orin ṣẹda iṣesi; ipalọlọ ṣẹda ẹdọfu.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_kp3: Mise-en-scène: ohun gbogbo ti a gbe sinu fireemu - ṣeto apẹrẹ, awọn aṣọ, ina, ipo oṣere. Kọọkan ano ibasọrọ itumo mọọmọ.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_kp4: Yan iṣẹlẹ iṣẹju meji kan lati fiimu kan. Itupalẹ: (a) awọn oriṣi ibọn mẹta ti a lo ati ipa wọn, (b) ina (bọtini giga = imọlẹ / idunnu tabi bọtini kekere = dudu / ohun ijinlẹ?), (c) ohun (ṣapejuwe ounjẹ ounjẹ ati ti kii-diegetic), (d) bii ṣiṣatunṣe ṣe ṣẹda iyara. Pari kini iṣesi ti ṣẹda ati bii.
learnSch_media_studies_f1_task: Awọn iyaworan kamẹra ati awọn igun
learnSch_media_studies_f2_desc: Awọn iru ẹrọ media awujọ ti yipada bi awọn eniyan ṣe n sọrọ, jijẹ awọn iroyin, ati awọn idamọ fọọmu. Wọn tun ti ṣafihan awọn eewu tuntun: ifọwọyi algorithmic, cyberbullying, ogbara ikọkọ, ati iselu iselu.
