Loye bii awọn iru ẹrọ ṣe n ṣiṣẹ ati bii o ṣe le lo wọn ni itara ati lailewu jẹ ọmọ ilu oni-nọmba pataki.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_kp0: Awọn algoridimu ṣe adani akoonu ti o da lori ihuwasi rẹ - kini o tẹ, fẹran, ati pinpin. Eyi ṣẹda awọn nyoju àlẹmọ nibiti o ti rii awọn aaye ifẹsẹmulẹ nikan, imudara polarisation.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_kp1: Awoṣe iṣowo: pupọ julọ awọn iru ẹrọ awujọ jẹ ọfẹ nitori data awọn olumulo ati akiyesi jẹ ọja ti a ta si awọn olupolowo. 'Ti o ko ba sanwo, iwọ ni ọja naa.'
learnSch_media_studies_f2_kp2: Ẹsẹ oni nọmba: gbogbo nkan ti o firanṣẹ, fẹran, tabi wiwa fi itọpa ayeraye silẹ. Awọn agbanisiṣẹ ọjọ iwaju, awọn ile-ẹkọ giga, ati agbofinro le wọle si gbogbo eniyan ati akoonu ikọkọ nigbakan.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_kp3: Cyberbullying: tipatipa ori ayelujara ti o le jẹ ailorukọ, de ọdọ awọn olufaragba nibikibi, ati fi igbasilẹ ayeraye silẹ. Awọn ipa lori ilera ọpọlọ jẹ lile; o jẹ ẹṣẹ ofin ni ọpọlọpọ awọn orilẹ-ede.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_kp4: Deepfakes ati media sintetiki: AI le ṣẹda awọn fidio iro ni idaniloju ti awọn eniyan gidi. Eyi jẹ ki ẹri wiwo npọ sii ti ko ni igbẹkẹle — 'riran' kii ṣe 'gbagbọ' mọ.
learnSch_media_studies_f2_task: Ṣe ayẹwo wiwa media awujọ tirẹ: aworan wo ni o ṣe awọn ifiweranṣẹ gbangba rẹ ṣẹda? Kini algorithm rẹ fihan ọ? Ṣe o tẹle awọn akọọlẹ pẹlu awọn oju-ọna ti o lodi si? Lẹhinna ṣe apẹrẹ itọsọna kan fun ọmọ ile-iwe Ọdun 7 kan lori ailewu ati pataki lilo media awujọ - pẹlu 5 pato, awọn imọran to wulo.
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_name: Awọn ipilẹ Mandarin: Pinyin & Awọn ohun orin
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_desc: Mandarin Kannada ni awọn agbọrọsọ to ju bilionu 1 lọ kaakiri agbaye ati pe o jẹ ede ti a sọ julọ nipasẹ awọn agbọrọsọ abinibi. Ko dabi awọn ede alfabeti, Mandarin nlo awọn ohun orin — awọn ayipada ninu ipolowo ti o yi itumọ pada - ati eto kikọ logographic kan. Titunto si eto romanisation Pinyin ati awọn ohun orin mẹrin jẹ igbesẹ akọkọ to ṣe pataki.
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_kp0: Pinyin: eto romanisation osise fun Mandarin. O nlo awọn lẹta Latin pẹlu awọn ami ohun orin lati ṣe aṣoju pronunciation. Pataki fun kikọ awọn kikọ ati lilo awọn ọna titẹ sii oni-nọmba.
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_kp1: Awọn ohun orin mẹrin: 1st (ipele giga, ā) — 'mā' tumọ si iya. 2nd (jinde, á) — 'má' tumo si hemp. 3rd (dipping, ǎ) — 'mǎ' tumo si ẹṣin. 4th (falling, à) — 'mà' tumo si lati ibaniwi. Plus didoju ohun orin (ko si ami).
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_kp2: Awọn ibẹrẹ (kọnsonanti): b, p, m, f, d, t, n, l, g, k, h, j, q, x, zh, ch, sh, r, z, c, s. Awọn ipari (awọn vowels ati awọn ipari): a, o, e, i, u, ü, ai, ei, ao, ou, an, en, ang, Eng, ong, ati bẹbẹ lọ
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_kp3: Awọn ikini pataki: 你好 (nǐ hǎo) - hello; 谢谢 (xièxiè) — o ṣeun; 不客气 (bù kèqì) — o kaabo; 对不起 (duìbuqǐ) - binu; 再见 (zàijiàn) - o dabọ.
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_kp4: Gírámà èdè Mandarin rọrùn ju àwọn èdè Yúróòpù lọ ní àwọn ọ̀nà kan: kò sí ìsopọ̀ ọ̀rọ̀-ìse, kò sí akọ akọ ọ̀rọ̀ Gírámà, kò sí ìparí ọ̀pọ̀lọpọ̀. Ilana Ọrọ (Koko-ọrọ-ọrọ-Ohun) n gbe itumo.
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_task: Tẹtisi gbogbo awọn ohun orin mẹrin ti 'ma' ki o tun ṣe titi iwọ o fi le gbejade kọọkan ni pato. Kọ 'Mo jẹ ọmọ ile-iwe' ni Mandarin ni lilo Pinyin: 'Wǒ shì xuéshēng.' Lẹ́yìn náà, kọ̀wé pé: 'Mo fẹ́ jẹ ìrẹsì' — 'Wǒ xiǎng chī mǐfàn.' Ṣe alaye iyatọ ninu itumọ ti o ṣẹlẹ nipasẹ iyipada ohun orin ni 'mā/mǎ'.
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_tp0: Awọn ohun orin mẹrin || Pinyin eto
learnSch_chinese_language_f0_tp1: Awọn ikini ipilẹ ati awọn gbolohun ọrọ
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_name: Awọn ohun kikọ Kannada (汉字, Hànzì) jẹ ọkan ninu awọn eto kikọ kikọ atijọ julọ ni agbaye, pẹlu awọn ohun kikọ to ju 50,000 lọ - botilẹjẹpe imọwe nilo mimọ nipa 2,000–3,000 awọn ti o wọpọ. Awọn ohun kikọ kii ṣe awọn iyaworan laileto - wọn kọ wọn lati awọn paati ti o nilari ti a pe ni awọn ipilẹṣẹ, eyiti o pese awọn amọran si itumọ ati awọn igba miiran pronunciation.
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_desc: Awọn ohun kikọ ti wa ni kikọ lori onigun mẹrin akoj ati ki o kq o dake ni kan pato ibere. Awọn ofin aṣẹ ikọlu ṣe idaniloju aitasera ati iranti iranlọwọ: gbogbo oke si isalẹ, osi si otun, petele ṣaaju inaro.
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_kp0: Awọn ipilẹṣẹ: gbogbo awọn ohun kikọ ni ipilẹṣẹ atunmọ ti o tọka si itumọ. 水 (omi radical 氵) farahan ni 海 (okun), 河 (odo), 泳 ( we). Mọ ~ 200 awọn ipilẹṣẹ ṣii awọn ilana ni ẹgbẹẹgbẹrun awọn ohun kikọ.
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_kp1: Irọrun vs. Ibile: Awọn ohun kikọ ti o rọrun (ti a lo ni Ilu China, Singapore) ni awọn ikọlu diẹ. Awọn ohun kikọ ti aṣa (Taiwan, Hong Kong, awọn agbegbe okeokun) ṣe itọju awọn fọọmu itan. Apeere: ife — 爱 (irọrun) la. 愛 (ibile).
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_kp2: HSK (Hanyu Shuiping Kaoshi): idanwo pipe ni Kannada. HSK 1 = 150 ọrọ, HSK 2 = 300, to HSK 6 = 5,000 ọrọ. Aṣepari pataki fun awọn akẹẹkọ Kannada.
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_kp3: Awọn ohun kikọ ti o wọpọ lati kọ ẹkọ akọkọ: 一二三四五六七八九十 (1–10), 人 (eniyan), 大 (nla), 小 (kekere), 中 (arin/China), 日 (oorun/ọjọ), 月 (osupa/osu), ni oke 山(ina).
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_kp4: Kọ ẹkọ ati kọ (pẹlu aṣẹ ikọlu to pe) awọn nọmba 1–10 ni awọn ohun kikọ Kannada. Lẹhinna kọ ẹkọ awọn kikọ marun diẹ sii nipa lilo awọn ipilẹṣẹ wọn bi awọn iranlọwọ iranti - ṣe alaye asopọ fun ọkọọkan. Nikẹhin, kọ orukọ rẹ si Pinyin ki o yan awọn ohun kikọ Kannada ti o yẹ fun rẹ.
learnSch_chinese_language_f1_tp1: Irọrun vs. Awọn ohun kikọ ibilẹ
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_name: Kikọ ibaraẹnisọrọ Mandarin ṣi awọn ilẹkun si 1.4 bilionu awọn ibaraẹnisọrọ ti o pọju ati ọkan ninu awọn aṣa larinrin julọ ni agbaye. Awọn koko-ọrọ pataki - awọn ifihan, akoko, riraja, ounjẹ, awọn itọnisọna - pese awọn fokabulari ti o wulo fun ibaraẹnisọrọ ojoojumọ. Iṣe deede girama Kannada jẹ ki ibaraẹnisọrọ wa ni iyalẹnu ni kete ti awọn ohun orin ati awọn fokabulari ipilẹ ti ni oye.
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_desc: Ilana gbolohun: Koko-ọrọ + Akoko + Ibi + Ọrọ-ọrọ + Nkan. Apeere: 我 (I) 明天 (ọla) 在图书馆 (ninu ile-ikawe) 学习 (iwadi) 中文 (Chinese) = 我明天在图书馆学习中文.
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_kp0: Bibeere awọn ibeere: ṣafikun 吗 (ma) si alaye kan fun Bẹẹni/Bẹẹkọ awọn ibeere. 你是学生 (o jẹ ọmọ ile-iwe) → 你是学生吗? (Ṣe ọmọ ile-iwe ni ẹ?). Tàbí lo àwọn ọ̀rọ̀ ìbéèrè: 什么 (shénme, kí ni), 哪里 (nǎlǐ, níbo), 什么时候 (shénme shíhòu, nígbà).
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_kp1: Nọmba ati iye owo: 一百 (100), 两百五十 (250). Ninu awọn ile itaja: 这个多少钱? (zhège duōshǎo qián?) — Elo ni eyi? 太贵了 (tài guì le) - O gbowolori pupọ! 便宜一点 (piányi yīdiǎn) — Díẹ̀ din owo jọwọ.
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_kp2: Numbers and prices: 一百 (100), 两百五十 (250). In shops: 这个多少钱? (zhège duōshǎo qián?) — How much is this? 太贵了 (tài guì le) — Too expensive! 便宜一点 (piányí yīdiǎn) — A little cheaper please.
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_kp3: Oúnjẹ àti ètò: 我要一碗米饭 (Wǒ yào yī wǎn mǐfàn) — Mo fe àwo ìrẹsì kan. 我不吃肉 (Wǒ bù chī ròu) — Mi o je eran. 好吃! (Hǎochī!) - Nhu!
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_kp4: Itumọ aṣa: paarọ awọn kaadi iṣowo pẹlu ọwọ meji; ń bá àwọn alàgbà sọ̀rọ̀ lọ́nà ìṣàkóso; pataki ti 面子 (miànzi, 'oju' - rere, iyi); iwa fifunni ebun. Ede ati asa ko le pinya.
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_task: Iṣe-iṣere (kọ tabi ṣe igbasilẹ) ibaraẹnisọrọ ni ile ounjẹ Kannada kan. Pẹlu: ikini oluduro, bibeere ohun ti o dara, pipaṣẹ awọn ounjẹ meji ati ohun mimu (lilo awọn ọrọ iwọn to pe), beere idiyele, ati sisọ o dabọ. Ṣe ifọkansi fun o kere ju awọn paṣipaarọ 10. Ṣe alaye pẹlu Pinyin ati itumọ Gẹẹsi.
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_tp0: Ilana gbolohun ọrọ ati awọn ibeere
learnSch_chinese_language_f2_tp1: Ohun tio wa ati awọn nọmba || Ounje, asa, ati igbesi aye ojoojumọ
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_name: Iyipada oju-ọjọ jẹ ipenija asọye ti akoko wa. Awọn itujade eniyan ti awọn eefin eefin n gbona Earth ni iwọn airotẹlẹ, idalọwọduro awọn ilana oju-ọjọ, awọn bọtini yinyin yo, ati awọn ilolupo eda ati awọn agbegbe eniyan eewu. Lílóye ìmọ̀ sáyẹ́ǹsì — yíyí èròjà carbon, àwọn kókó ọ̀rọ̀, àti àbájáde àbájáde — ṣe pàtàkì fún ọmọ ìlú èyíkéyìí tí ó ní ìsọfúnni.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_desc: Yiyipo erogba: CO₂ n lọ laarin oju-aye, awọn okun, ilẹ (awọn ohun ọgbin nipasẹ photosynthesis), ati awọn ohun alumọni (nipasẹ atẹgun). Awọn epo fosaili sisun n tu erogba ti a fipamọ silẹ fun awọn miliọnu ọdun, ni idalọwọduro iyipo naa.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_kp0: Eefin ipa: oorun Ìtọjú warms Earth; Earth njade awọn itankalẹ infurarẹẹdi; eefin eefin (CO₂, CH₄, N₂O, H₂O vapour) gba o ati ki o tun radiate ooru, imorusi awọn dada. Laisi rẹ, Earth yoo jẹ -18 ° C; pẹlu rẹ (adayeba), 15 ° C; imudara = lewu imorusi.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_kp1: Ipo lọwọlọwọ (2024): CO₂ atmospheric koja 420 ppm (tẹlẹ-iṣẹ: 280 ppm). Iwọn otutu apapọ agbaye ti dide ~1.2°C loke awọn ipele iṣaaju-iṣẹ. Adehun Paris ni ero lati ṣe idinwo igbona si 1.5°C.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_kp2: Awọn aaye itọsi oju-ọjọ: awọn iloro ti o kọja eyiti awọn iyipada di imudara-ara-ẹni. Yo permafrost tu silẹ CH₄; yinyin Arctic ti o nyọ ṣe afihan okun dudu, gbigba ooru diẹ sii; Awọn ewu ipagborun Amazon ni yiyi igbo ojo pada si savanna.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_kp3: Idajọ oju-ọjọ: Awọn orilẹ-ede to sese ndagbasoke ṣe alabapin o kere si itujade ṣugbọn jiya pupọ julọ lati awọn ipa oju-ọjọ (jinde ipele omi okun, ooru nla, ikuna irugbin). Awọn iwọn iṣe ati iṣelu ti iṣe oju-ọjọ ko ṣe iyatọ si imọ-jinlẹ.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_kp4: Fa ati ṣe alaye iyipo erogba, nfihan awọn ṣiṣan adayeba ati idalọwọduro eniyan. Ṣe iṣiro: ti orilẹ-ede kan ba njade 500 Mt CO₂ fun ọdun kan ati pe awọn igi gbin 50 Mt / ọdun lakoko ti o yipada si awọn isọdọtun n fipamọ 100 Mt / ọdun, ọdun melo ni lati de odo net (ti o ro pe ko si awọn iwọn tuntun)? Ṣe ayẹwo awọn iṣe afikun mẹta ti orilẹ-ede le ṣe.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f0_tp0: Awọn data lọwọlọwọ ati Adehun Paris
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_name: Oniruuru-aye-orisirisi igbesi aye lori Earth - jẹ ipilẹ ti awọn eto ilolupo ti ilera ti o pese ounjẹ, omi mimọ, oogun, ati oju-ọjọ iduroṣinṣin. Lọwọlọwọ a n ni iriri iparun ibi-kẹfa, ti o ni ipa nipasẹ iparun ibugbe, idoti, awọn eya ti o nfa, ati iyipada oju-ọjọ. Loye awọn ilolupo ilolupo ṣafihan idi ti gbogbo eya ti o sọnu ṣe pataki.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_desc: Awọn iṣẹ ilolupo: awọn anfani iseda ti n pese laisi idiyele - pollination (pataki fun 75% ti awọn irugbin ounjẹ), mimọ omi, iṣakoso iṣan omi, ibi ipamọ erogba, iṣelọpọ ile, ati aabo eti okun.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_kp0: Ecosystem services: the benefits nature provides free of charge — pollination (essential for 75% of food crops), water purification, flood control, carbon storage, soil formation, and coastal protection.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_kp1: Iparun ibi-kẹfa: awọn eya ti n lọ parun ni awọn akoko 100-1,000 ni kiakia ju oṣuwọn isale adayeba lọ. ~ 1 milionu eya Lọwọlọwọ ewu. Awọn okunfa akọkọ: iyipada lilo ilẹ (pipadanu ibugbe), ilokulo pupọ, idoti, awọn eya ti o nfa, iyipada oju-ọjọ.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_kp2: Awọn eya bọtini: awọn eya ti o ṣe ipa ti o tobi pupọ ni ilolupo ilolupo wọn. Yiyọ wọn kuro ni o fa idabobo ilolupo - fun apẹẹrẹ. wolves ni Yellowstone dari agbọnrin olugbe, eyi ti laaye eweko lati bọsipọ, nyo odo.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_kp3: Biomes: awọn agbegbe ilolupo nla ti a ṣalaye nipasẹ oju-ọjọ ati awọn eweko - igbo igbona (o pọju ipinsiyeleyele), igbo otutu, koriko/savanna, asale (awọn ipo to gaju), tundra (permafrost), okun (biome ti o tobi julọ).
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_kp4: Awọn ilana itọju: awọn agbegbe ti o ni aabo (awọn papa itura ti orilẹ-ede, awọn ifiṣura omi okun), isọdọtun ( mimu-pada sipo awọn eya adayeba ati awọn ilana), itọju ipo iṣaaju (awọn ile-iṣẹ ẹranko, awọn banki irugbin), adehun CITES (awọn iṣakoso iṣowo ni awọn eya ti o wa ninu ewu).
learnSch_environmental_studies_f1_task: Ṣe iwadii ilolupo eda ti o wa ninu ewu (fun apẹẹrẹ awọn okun coral, igbo Amazon, awọn eegun eésan). Fun eto ilolupo eda ti o yan: (a) ṣe apejuwe ipinsiyeleyele rẹ, (b) ṣe alaye awọn irokeke mẹta, (c) ṣe iyeye iye ọrọ-aje ti awọn iṣẹ ilolupo rẹ, (d) ṣe iṣiro awọn ilana itọju mẹta ati imunadoko wọn.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_desc: Iduroṣinṣin tumọ si ipade awọn iwulo ti isisiyi laisi ibajẹ agbara awọn iran iwaju lati pade tiwọn (itumọ Brundtland, 1987). Gbigbe lọ si agbaye alagbero nilo awọn ayipada ninu agbara, ounjẹ, gbigbe, ati lilo - ati pe o kan gbogbo eniyan lati awọn ijọba ati awọn ile-iṣẹ si awọn eniyan kọọkan.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_kp0: Awọn ibi-afẹde Idagbasoke Alagbero (SDGs): Awọn ibi-afẹde 17 ti gbogbo awọn orilẹ-ede ọmọ ẹgbẹ UN gba ni ọdun 2015, ti o fojusi osi, ilera, eto-ẹkọ, agbara mimọ, iṣe afefe, ati ipinsiyeleyele nipasẹ 2030.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_kp1: Agbara isọdọtun: oorun, afẹfẹ, hydro, geothermal, ati agbara ṣiṣan n ṣe ina mọnamọna pẹlu awọn itujade eefin eefin kekere. Awọn idiyele oorun ati afẹfẹ ti lọ silẹ 90%+ lati ọdun 2010 - wọn jẹ awọn orisun agbara ti ko gbowolori ti a kọ tẹlẹ.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_kp2: Eto-ọrọ aje alabapo: dipo gbigbe-ṣe-sọsọ, awọn ohun elo jẹ tunlo, tunṣe, ati tunlo ni awọn iyipo pipade. Dinku egbin, fi awọn orisun pamọ, ati ṣẹda awọn iṣẹ.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_kp3: Awọn eto ounjẹ: awọn iroyin ogbin fun ~ 25% ti awọn itujade eefin eefin agbaye. Idinku jijẹ ẹran (paapaa eran malu), gige egbin ounje, ati yiyi pada si ogbin alagbero (Organic, agroforestry) jẹ awọn lefa pataki.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_kp4: Awọn ọrọ iṣe ẹni kọọkan: awọn ifẹsẹtẹ erogba yatọ lọpọlọpọ. Gbigbe, jijẹ ẹran, ati wiwakọ awọn ọkọ ayọkẹlẹ petirolu jẹ awọn yiyan kọọkan ti o ni ipa ti o ga julọ. Ṣugbọn iyipada eto - eto imulo ijọba, iṣe ile-iṣẹ, awọn amayederun - ni ipa lapapọ ti o tobi pupọ.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_task: Ṣe iṣiro ifẹsẹtẹ erogba oṣooṣu rẹ nipa lilo ẹrọ iṣiro ori ayelujara. Ṣe idanimọ awọn iṣẹ ipa-ipa mẹta rẹ ti o ga julọ. Ṣe iwadii ki o dabaa iyipada ti ara ẹni ati iyipada eto kan (ijọba tabi eto imulo ajọṣepọ) ti yoo dinku ifẹsẹtẹ rẹ. Ni lọwọlọwọ: ifẹsẹtẹ lọwọlọwọ, ifẹsẹtẹ ibi-afẹde, ati aago.
learnSch_environmental_studies_f2_tp2: Awọn ọna ṣiṣe ounjẹ ati ẹni kọọkan vs Itupalẹ gidi
learnUni_mathematics_f5_desc: Itupalẹ gidi jẹ ipilẹ lile ti iṣiro, ṣiṣe awọn abajade nipa awọn opin, itesiwaju, iyatọ, ati isọpọ nipa lilo awọn asọye ε-δ kongẹ. O rọpo ero inu inu pẹlu awọn ariyanjiyan ọgbọn omi-omi - iyipada ipilẹ kan ni idagbasoke mathematiki ti o nilo ni ipele ile-ẹkọ giga.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_kp0: ε-δ limit: lim_{x→a} f(x) = L tumo si fun gbogbo ε>0 wa δ>0 tojepe 0<|x−a|<δ tumo si |f(x) -L|<ε. Eyi n mu aibikita kuro ninu imọran ti 'sunmọ'.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_kp1: Ilana Bolzano-Weierstrass: gbogbo ọna ti o ni opin ni ℝⁿ ni atẹle convergent kan. Heine-Borel: ipin kan ti ℝⁿ jẹ iwapọ ti o ba wa ni pipade ati di opin.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_kp2: Ilana Iye Agbedemeji: ti f ba tẹsiwaju lori [a,b] ati f (a) ati f (b) ni awọn ami idakeji, c ∈ (a,b) wa pẹlu f(c) = 0. Ti fihan ni lile lati pipe ℝ.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_kp3: Ilọsiwaju aṣọ: δ ẹyọkan n ṣiṣẹ fun gbogbo x nigbakanna - ni okun sii ju lilọsiwaju ọgbọn lọ. Gbogbo lemọlemọfún iṣẹ lori iwapọ ṣeto jẹ iṣọkan lemọlemọfún.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_kp4: Riemann vs Lebesgue Integration: Lebesgue integral pan Riemann ká nipa idiwon tosaaju (iwọn yii) ati ki o kapa jina siwaju sii awọn iṣẹ, pẹlu awọn ifilelẹ ti awọn lesese.
learnUni_mathematics_f5_task: Lilo itumọ ε-δ, jẹri pe lim_{x→3} (2x−1) = 5. Lẹhinna lo IVT lati fihan pe x⁵ − x − 1 = 0 ni o kere ju ojutuu gidi kan. Jẹrisi pe f (x) = 1/x kii ṣe ni iṣọkan lori (0,1) ṣugbọn o wa lori [0.5, 2].
learnUni_mathematics_f6_desc: Abstract algebra generalises isiro mosi to áljẹbrà ẹya: awọn ẹgbẹ (isẹ kan), oruka (meji mosi), ati awọn aaye (meji mosi pẹlu inverses). Eyi ṣe isokan mathimatiki aibikita ati ṣe atilẹyin cryptography ode oni (awọn iha elliptic lori awọn aaye ti o lopin) ati fisiksi (awọn ẹgbẹ asymmetry ni fisiksi patiku).
learnUni_mathematics_f6_kp0: Awọn axioms ẹgbẹ: pipade (a★b ∈ G), associativity ((a★b)★c = a★(b★c)), idanimọ (e★a = a), idakeji (a★a⁻¹ = e). Awọn apẹẹrẹ: (ℤ+), (ℚ\{0},×), ẹgbẹ dihedral Dₙ (awọn ami-ami ti n-gon).
learnUni_mathematics_f6_kp1: Ilana Lagrange: ti H ba jẹ ẹgbẹ-ipin ti ẹgbẹ G, lẹhinna |H| pin |G|. Apejuwe: aṣẹ ti eyikeyi eroja pin |G|. Awọn ẹgbẹ-ẹgbẹ deede ngbanilaaye ikole ẹgbẹ quotient G/N.
learnUni_mathematics_f6_kp2: Imọye oruka: (R+,×) nibiti (R+) jẹ ẹgbẹ abeli, × jẹ alabaṣepọ ati pinpin. Integral ibugbe (ko si odo pin). Awọn apẹrẹ ṣe gbogbogbo awọn ẹgbẹ-ẹgbẹ fun awọn oruka. Awọn ibugbe bojumu akọkọ (PIDs): gbogbo apẹrẹ ti ipilẹṣẹ nipasẹ ẹya kan.
learnUni_mathematics_f6_kp3: Awọn aaye: gbogbo awọn eroja ti kii ṣe odo ni o ni ilodisi isodipupo. Awọn apẹẹrẹ: ℚ, ℝ, ℂ, ati awọn aaye ipari 𝔽_p = ℤ/pℤ (p prime). Awọn aaye ipari ṣe atilẹyin fifi ẹnọ kọ nkan AES ati awọn koodu atunṣe aṣiṣe.
learnUni_mathematics_f6_kp4: Ilana Galois: so awọn gbongbo ti awọn iloyepo pọ si imọran ẹgbẹ. Ẹgbẹ Galois ti ilopọ pupọ n gba awọn ami-ami ti awọn gbongbo rẹ. Oniyebiye jẹ ojutu nipasẹ awọn ipilẹṣẹ ti ẹgbẹ Galois rẹ ba jẹ ẹgbẹ ti o yanju - ṣe alaye aiṣedeede ti awọn idogba gbogbogbo≥5.
learnUni_mathematics_f6_task: Jẹrisi pe ℤ₆ labẹ afikun jẹ ẹgbẹ kan. Wa gbogbo awọn ẹgbẹ-ẹgbẹ ki o jẹrisi imọ-jinlẹ Lagrange. Ṣafihan ℤ₂×ℤ₃ ≅ ℤ₆ nipa fifi isomorphism han gbangba. Lẹhinna ṣafihan ℤ₂×ℤ₂ ≇ ℤ₄ nipa wiwa ohun-ini kan ti o ṣe iyatọ wọn.
learnUni_mathematics_f6_tp0: Awọn ẹgbẹ, awọn ẹgbẹ-ẹgbẹ, ati Lagrange || Oruka ati awọn aaye
learnUni_mathematics_f7_name: Itupalẹ eka ṣe iṣiro kakulosi si awọn iṣẹ ti oniyipada eka kan. Awọn iṣẹ Holomorphic (eka-iyatọ) jẹ iyatọ ailopin ati koodu ifitonileti agbaye ni data agbegbe. Imọ-ọrọ isọdi ti Cauchy, iṣiro aloku, ati awọn aworan aworan ibaramu jẹ ki o lagbara kọja fisiksi, imọ-ẹrọ, ati imọ-ẹrọ nọmba.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_desc: Iyatọ eka: f'(z) = lim_{h→0} [f(z+h) -f(z)]/h (h ∈ ℂ). Awọn idogba Cauchy-Riemann: ti f = u+iv jẹ holomorphic lẹhinna ∂u/∂x = ∂v/∂y ati ∂u/∂y = -∂v/∂x.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_kp0: Ilana ti ara Cauchy: fun holomorphic f inu ati lori rọrun titi contour C, ∮_C f (z) dz = 0. Cauchy's fomula: f (z₀) = (1/2πi) ∮_C f(z)/(z−z₀) dz.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_kp1: Taylor ati Laurent jara: awọn iṣẹ holomorphic gbooro bi jara agbara. Laurent jara ngbanilaaye awọn agbara odi - pataki nitosi awọn ẹyọkan ti o ya sọtọ (awọn ọpá, awọn ẹyọkan pataki).
learnUni_mathematics_f7_kp2: Ilana ti o ku: ∮_C f(z) dz = 2πi × Σ Res(f, zₖ) fun gbogbo opa zₖ inu C. Aloku ni opa ti o rọrun z₀: Res = lim_{z→z₀} (z−z₀) f(z). Ti a lo lati ṣe iṣiro awọn akojọpọ gidi nipasẹ yiyan elegbegbe onilàkaye.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_kp3: Awọn aworan atọka ibaramu: awọn iṣẹ holomorphic pẹlu awọn igun itọju itọsẹ ti kii ṣe odo ni agbegbe. Awọn iyipada Möbius maapu awọn iyika/ila si awọn iyika/ila. Ti a lo ninu awọn agbara ito, elekitirotiki, ati aworan aworan.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_kp4: Daju f(z)=z² jẹ holomorphic nipasẹ awọn idogba Cauchy-Riemann. Ṣe iṣiro ∮_{|z|=2} dz/(z²−1) ní lílo ìlànà ìyókù: wá àwọn ọ̀pá, sàyẹ̀wò èyí tí ó wà nínú |z|=2, ṣe ìṣirò àwọn ìyókù, kí o sì fi ìlànà náà sílò. Jẹrisi nipasẹ awọn ida apakan.
learnUni_mathematics_f7_task: Awọn iṣẹ Holomorphic ati awọn idogba C-R
learnUni_mathematics_f7_tp1: Ajẹkù theorem ati awọn ohun elo || Classical Electrodynamics
learnUni_mathematics_f7_tp2: Awọn idogba Maxwell ṣọkan ina, oofa, ati awọn opiki sinu ilana didara kan. Wọn ṣe asọtẹlẹ awọn igbi itanna eletiriki ti nrin ni c, ṣalaye itankalẹ, ati ṣe ipilẹ ti gbogbo imọ-ẹrọ itanna. Loye wọn ni ipele kakulosi fekito jẹ ami iyasọtọ ti ẹkọ fisiksi.
learnUni_physics_f2_name: Awọn idogba Maxwell: ∇·E = ρ/ε₀, ∇·B = 0, ∇×E = -∂B/∂t, ∇×B = μ₀(J + ε₀∂E/∂t). Papọ wọn ṣọkan gbogbo awọn iyalẹnu itanna eleto.
learnUni_physics_f2_desc: Awọn igbi itanna: ni aaye ọfẹ, E ati B ni itẹlọrun ∇²E = μ₀ε₀∂²E/∂t², fifun ni iyara igbi c = 1/√(μ₀ε₀) ≈ 3×10⁸ m/s. Imọlẹ jẹ igbi itanna.
learnUni_physics_f2_kp0: Itọkasi fekito S = (1/μ₀) E×B: itọsọna ati oṣuwọn sisan agbara itanna. Ipa ipanilara: Awọn igbi EM gbe ipa p = U/c.
learnUni_physics_f2_kp1: Awọn ipo aala ni awọn atọkun ohun elo: tangential E ati deede B jẹ ilọsiwaju. Ṣe ipinnu iṣaroye ati isọdọtun (Awọn idogba Fresnel funni ni titobi; Ofin Snell funni ni awọn igun).
learnUni_physics_f2_kp2: Imugboroosi pupọ: jina si pinpin idiyele, awọn aaye jẹ gaba lori nipasẹ awọn ofin idari - monopole (1/r²), dipole (1/r³), quadrupole (1/r⁴). Oscillating dipoles tan EM igbi - ipilẹ ti awọn eriali.
learnUni_physics_f2_kp3: Bibẹrẹ lati awọn idogba Maxwell ni igbale (ρ=0, J=0), yọrisi idogba igbi itanna fun E. Show c = 1/√(μ₀ε₀). Lẹ́yìn náà kọ àwọn pápá náà fún ìgbì ọkọ̀ òfuurufú tí ń tankalẹ̀ sí ìhà z-itọ́kasọ́nà kí o sì fi hàn pé E, B, àti k wà ní ìtòsí ara wọn àti pé |E|/|B| = c.
learnUni_physics_f2_kp4: Multipole expansion: far from a charge distribution, fields are dominated by leading terms — monopole (1/r²), dipole (1/r³), quadrupole (1/r⁴). Oscillating dipoles radiate EM waves — basis of antennas.
learnUni_physics_f2_task: Starting from Maxwell's equations in vacuum (ρ=0, J=0), derive the electromagnetic wave equation for E. Show c = 1/√(μ₀ε₀). Then write the fields for a plane wave propagating in the z-direction and show that E, B, and k are mutually perpendicular and that |E|/|B| = c.
learnUni_physics_f2_tp2: Ìtọjú ati multipoles || Thermodynamics & Iṣiro Mechanics
learnUni_physics_f3_name: Awọn ẹrọ iṣiro ti n gba thermodynamics macroscopic lati ihuwasi iṣiro ti awọn nkan airi airi. Pipinpin Boltzmann, iṣẹ ipin, ati entropy bi log ti microstates so fisiksi atomiki pọ si awọn iyalẹnu igbona lojoojumọ - lati itankalẹ-ara dudu si awọn iyipada alakoso.
learnUni_physics_f3_desc: Boltzmann pinpin: iṣeeṣe ti microstate pẹlu agbara E ni P ∝ e^{-E/k_BT}. Iwọn otutu ti o ga julọ ngbanilaaye iṣẹ ti awọn ipinlẹ agbara ti o ga julọ. Idogba ẹyọkan yii wa labẹ kemistri, astrophysics, ati isedale.
learnUni_physics_f3_kp0: Iṣẹ ipin Z = Σᵢ e^{-βEᵢ} (β=1/k_BT). Agbara ọfẹ F = -k_BT ln Z. Gbogbo awọn iwọn thermodynamic tẹle: ⟨E⟩ = -∂ln Z/∂β, entropy S = -∂F/∂T, titẹ P = -∂F/∂V.
learnUni_physics_f3_kp1: Boltzmann entropy: S = k_B ln Ω (Ω = nọmba awọn microstates). Ofin keji: Ω pọ si lairotẹlẹ → S nigbagbogbo n pọ si ni awọn eto ti o ya sọtọ. Arrow ti akoko farahan lati statistiki.
learnUni_physics_f3_kp2: Awọn iṣiro kuatomu: awọn bosons gbọràn si pinpin Bose-Einstein (awọn patikulu lọpọlọpọ fun ipinlẹ → superfluidity, lasers, Bose-Einstein condensate). Fermions gboran si Fermi-Dirac (ọkan fun ipinlẹ kan → eto elekitironi ti awọn irin, awọn arara funfun, awọn irawọ neutroni).
learnUni_physics_f3_kp3: Awọn iyipada ipele: ni iwọn otutu to ṣe pataki Tc, awọn fo paramita ibere (ibere 1st) tabi dide nigbagbogbo (Ipaṣẹ 2nd). Ising awoṣe ya feromagnetism. Nitosi aaye to ṣe pataki: awọn ofin igbelosoke gbogbo agbaye, gigun ibaramu oniruuru, awọn kilasi agbaye.
learnUni_physics_f3_kp4: Ṣe igbasilẹ iṣẹ ipin fun eto ipele-meji (awọn agbara 0 ati ε). Wa ⟨E⟩, C_V = ∂⟨E⟩/∂T, ati entropy S. Sketch C_V vs. T (Schottky peak). Tumọ tente oke ni ti ara. Waye ifosiwewe Boltzmann lati ṣe iṣiro ida awọn ohun elo ni ipo igbadun ni T = 300 K ti ε = 0.025 eV.
learnUni_physics_f3_tp0: Entropy ati ofin keji || Awọn iṣiro kuatomu ati awọn iyipada alakoso
learnUni_physics_f3_tp2: Awọn ẹrọ mekaniki kuatomu jẹ imọ-jinlẹ ti ara ti a ni idanwo deede, ti o tọ si awọn aaye eleemewa 12 ni awọn asọtẹlẹ QED. O rọpo awọn itọpa kilasika pẹlu awọn iṣẹ igbi ti ndagba labẹ idogba Schrödinger ati ṣe alaye awọn ọta, awọn ohun alumọni, awọn lasers, semiconductors, ati awọn ọlọjẹ MRI. O ti wa ni tun jinna philosophically puzzling.
learnUni_physics_f4_name: Iṣẹ igbi ψ(x,t): |ψ|² jẹ iwuwo iṣeeṣe. Iṣe deede: ∫|ψ|² dx = 1. Itankalẹ akoko: iℏ ∂ψ/∂t = Ĥψ. Awọn ipinlẹ iduro: Ĥψ_n = E_n ψ_n — eigenstates agbara.
learnUni_physics_f4_desc: Kanga onigun mẹrin ailopin: ψ_n = √(2/L) ẹṣẹ(nπx/L), E_n = n²π²ℏ²/(2mL²). Awọn ipele agbara pipọ - ṣe alaye iwoye atomiki. Agbara-ojuami E₁> 0 paapaa ni T=0.
learnUni_physics_f4_kp0: Quantum harmonic oscillator: E_n = (n+½)ℏω, n=0,1,2,... Awọn oniṣẹ igbega/isalẹ â±. Ipinle ilẹ ni iṣẹ igbi Gaussian. Awọn awoṣe molikula vibrations ati aaye quanta.
learnUni_physics_f4_kp1: Atọmu hydrogen: o pọju ti iyipo Coulomb. Awọn ojutu ti a samisi nipasẹ awọn nọmba kuatomu n (agbara), l (ipa angula), m (oofa). Awọn apẹrẹ ti Orbital (s, p, d, f) pinnu isunmọ kemikali.
learnUni_physics_f4_kp2: Quantum harmonic oscillator: E_n = (n+½)ℏω, n=0,1,2,... Raising/lowering operators â±. Ground state has Gaussian wavefunction. Models molecular vibrations and field quanta.
learnUni_physics_f4_kp3: Hydrogen atom: spherically symmetric Coulomb potential. Solutions labelled by quantum numbers n (energy), l (angular momentum), m (magnetic). Orbital shapes (s, p, d, f) determine chemical bonding.
learnUni_physics_f4_kp4: Entanglement ati Bell's theorem: awọn patikulu meji le ni ibamu ni awọn ọna ti ko le ṣe alaye nipasẹ awọn oniyipada ti o farapamọ agbegbe. Awọn aidogba Belii ti ṣẹ ni idanwo - jẹri kii ṣe agbegbe ti awọn ẹrọ kuatomu. Ipilẹ fun kuatomu cryptography.
learnUni_physics_f4_task: Yanju square ailopin 1D daradara: kọ ψ_n ati E_n. Ṣe iṣiro E₁ fun elekitironi ni L = 1 nm kanga. A pese patiku kan ni ψ = (1/√2)(ψ₁ + ψ₂). (a) Ṣe eyi jẹ eigenstate agbara bi? (b) Ṣe iṣiro ⟨E⟩. (c) Ṣapejuwe bii ⟨x⟩ ṣe n waye ni akoko. (d) Ṣe alaye ohun ti o ṣẹlẹ nigbati o ba wọn agbara.
learnUni_physics_f5_desc: Awọn opiti ode oni ṣe itọju ina mejeeji bi igbi itanna (awọn opiti igbi) ati bi awọn fọto (awọn opiti kuatomu). Awọn opiti igbi ṣe alaye kikọlu, diffraction, ati polarization ni pato. Photonics - imọ-ẹrọ ati imọ-ẹrọ ti iran fọton ati iṣakoso - ṣe atilẹyin awọn lasers, awọn okun opiti, awọn sẹẹli oorun, ati awọn imọ-ẹrọ kuatomu ti o dide.
learnUni_physics_f5_kp0: Awọn opiti igbi: kikọlu ati iyapa dide lati ilana Huygens-Fresnel (ojuami oju igbi kọọkan jẹ orisun keji). Pipin meji ti ọdọ n funni ni aye omioto Δy = λL/d.
learnUni_physics_f5_kp1: Fourier optics: lẹnsi kan ṣe iyipada Fourier ninu ọkọ ofurufu idojukọ. Sisẹ aaye - idinamọ awọn igbohunsafẹfẹ aaye kan - jẹ ipilẹ ti sisẹ aworan ati airi.
learnUni_physics_f5_kp2: Fisiksi lesa: ipadasẹhin olugbe waye nipasẹ fifa opitika tabi itanna. Ijadejade itusilẹ ṣe agbejade isomọ, monochromatic, ina itọnisọna. Awọn cavities lesa yan awọn ipo. Ohun elo: abẹ, lidar, opitika tweezers, kooduopo Antivirus.
learnUni_physics_f5_kp3: Awọn okun opitika: iṣaju inu inu lapapọ (igun> igun to ṣe pataki θ_c = arcsin(n₂/n₁)) dẹkun ina ni koko. Awọn okun ipo-ọkan fun awọn ibaraẹnisọrọ gigun-gun; olona-mode fun kukuru ijinna. Attenuation ~ 0.2 dB/km ni 1550 nm.
learnUni_physics_f5_kp4: Kuatomu optics: awọn iṣiro photon (iṣọpọ vs. gbigbona vs. ina ti a fipa), awọn orisun fọto kan, awọn orisii photon ti a dipọ (nipasẹ parametric parametric isale-iyipada). Awọn ohun elo: pinpin bọtini kuatomu (ilana BB84), teliportation quantum.
learnUni_physics_f5_task: Diffraction grating pẹlu awọn laini 500/mm jẹ itanna nipasẹ ina ti λ=600 nm. Wa awọn igun fun m = 1 ati m = 2 bibere diffraction. Ṣe iṣiro agbara ipinnu R = mN fun N = 1000 awọn ila. Lẹhinna ṣe apẹrẹ okun opiti pẹlu mojuto n₁=1.50 ati cladding n₂=1.45: wa igun to ṣe pataki ati iho nọmba NA = √(n₁²−n₂²).
learnUni_physics_f5_tp2: Awọn okun opitika ati kuatomu optics
learnUni_chemistry_f0_desc: Kemistri ti ara lo fisiksi - thermodynamics, kinetics, awọn ẹrọ kuatomu - si awọn eto kemikali. O ṣe alaye idi ti awọn aati ṣe waye (thermodynamics), bawo ni wọn ṣe yara to (kinetics), ati kini o ṣe ipinnu igbekalẹ molikula (kemistri kuatomu). O jẹ ẹhin imọ-jinlẹ ti gbogbo kemistri.
learnUni_chemistry_f0_kp0: Gibbs agbara ọfẹ: ΔG = ΔH - TΔS. ΔG <0: lẹẹkọkan; ΔG> 0: ti kii ṣe lẹẹkọkan; ΔG = 0: iwọntunwọnsi. Ni iwọntunwọnsi: ΔG° = -RT ln K.
learnUni_chemistry_f0_kp1: Kemikali kinetics: oṣuwọn = k[A] ᵐ[B]. Ibere ​​akọkọ: t₁/₂ = ln2/k. Idogba Arrhenius: k = Ae^{-Ea/RT}. Imọye ipo iyipada: oṣuwọn ti pinnu nipasẹ ΔG‡ (agbara Gibbs ti ipo iyipada).
learnUni_chemistry_f0_kp2: Imọ-ọrọ orbital Molecular: awọn orbitals atomic parapo (LCAO) lati ṣe ifunmọ (agbara kekere) ati antibonding (agbara giga) MOs. Ibere ​​iwe adehun = ½ (isopọmọ - awọn elekitironi antibonding).
learnUni_chemistry_f0_kp3: Spectroscopy: UV-Vis (Beer-Lambert: A = εcl, awọn iyipada itanna), IR (awọn gbigbọn molikula - awọn ika ọwọ ẹgbẹ iṣẹ-ṣiṣe), NMR (awọn agbegbe iyipo iparun n funni ni asopọ ati stereochemistry), spec pupọ (ibi-ara molikula ati pipin).
learnUni_chemistry_f0_kp4: Awọn ohun-ini iṣiṣẹpọ (da lori nọmba awọn patikulu solute, kii ṣe idanimọ): igbega aaye ibisi (ΔT_b = K_b m), ibanujẹ aaye didi (ΔT_f = K_f m), titẹ osmotic (Π = MRT). Lo ninu cryoscopy ati osmometry.
learnUni_chemistry_f0_task: Fun idahun N₂ + 3H₂ → 2NH₃ ni 298 K, ΔH ° = -92 kJ/mol ati ΔS ° = -198 J/mol·K. (a) Ṣe iṣiro ΔG ° ati K. (b) Ṣe iṣesi lairotẹlẹ ni 298 K? Ni 600 K? (c) Ṣe itumọ bi iwọn otutu ati titẹ ṣe ni ipa lori ikore ninu ilana Haber. Relate si Le Chatelier ká opo.
learnUni_chemistry_f1_desc: Awọn imọ-ẹrọ kemistri ti ile-ẹkọ giga ti ile-ẹkọ giga awọn ilana ifaseyin ni ipele elekitironi, stereochemistry, igbero iṣelọpọ, ati awọn iyipada ẹgbẹ iṣẹ. Titunto si jẹ pataki fun oogun oogun, imọ-jinlẹ awọn ohun elo, biochemistry, ati isedale kemikali.
learnUni_chemistry_f1_kp0: Ilọfa itọka formalism: awọn ọfa ti o ni kikun ṣe afihan gbigbe elekitironi meji (nucleophile si electrophile). Awọn itọka ti o ni ori idaji ṣe afihan awọn ilana ipilẹṣẹ. Gbogbo itọka gbọdọ bẹrẹ lati orisun elekitironi (bata tabi mnu nikan).
learnUni_chemistry_f1_kp1: Ilana SN2: ikọlu ẹhin-igbesẹ kan ti iṣọkan → iyipada ti iṣeto ni (iyipada Walden). Ayanfẹ: nucleophile ti o lagbara, sobusitireti akọkọ, epo aprotic pola (DMF, DMSO, acetone).
learnUni_chemistry_f1_kp2: Ilana SN1: awọn igbesẹ meji nipasẹ agbedemeji carbocation. Ayanfẹ: sobusitireti ile-iwe giga, epo protic pola (omi, ethanol). Oṣuwọn = k [sobusitireti] nikan. Yoo fun racemisation.
learnUni_chemistry_f1_kp3: Stereochemistry: awọn ile-iṣẹ chiral, enantiomers, diastereomers. Awọn ofin Cahn-Ingold-Prelog (CIP) ṣe ipinnu iṣeto R / S. Iṣẹ-ṣiṣe opitika ni iwọn nipasẹ polarimetry. Thalidomide: R-enantiomer therapeutic, S-enantiomer teratogenic - pataki ti mimọ stereochemical.
learnUni_chemistry_f1_kp4: Itupalẹ retrosynthetic (Corey): Iṣagbepọ ero sẹhin - ṣe idanimọ awọn asopọ (awọn iwe adehun fifọ) lati ṣafihan awọn ohun elo ibẹrẹ ti o wa ni imurasilẹ. Idabobo ilana ẹgbẹ, awọn ibaraẹnisọrọ ẹgbẹ iṣẹ, ati ipasẹ ipinlẹ oxidation jẹ awọn ọgbọn bọtini.
learnUni_chemistry_f1_task: Ṣe imọran ilana pipe pẹlu awọn ọfa iṣupọ fun: (a) SN2 lenu ti (R) -2-bromobutane pẹlu NaOH - ṣe afihan iṣeto ọja, (b) SN1 ti (CH₃) ₃CBr pẹlu omi - ṣe afihan carbocation, racemisation, ati awọn stereoisomers mejeeji ti ọja naa. Ṣe alaye idi ti sobusitireti kanna ko le farada awọn ẹrọ mejeeji ni nigbakannaa.
learnUni_chemistry_f1_tp0: Awọn ilana ifasẹyin ati awọn ọfa iṣupọ
learnUni_chemistry_f2_desc: Kemistri aiṣedeede ni akojọpọ kemistri iṣakoso, organometallics, awọn ohun elo ipinlẹ ti o lagbara, ati kemistri bioinorganic. Awọn irin iyipada pẹlu kemistri d-orbital ọlọrọ wọn wa labẹ catalysis ile-iṣẹ, awọn ohun elo iṣẹ, ati awọn ilana iṣe ti ibi.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_kp0: Awọn eka iṣọpọ: ion aarin irin + ligands (awọn ipilẹ Lewis ti n ṣetọrẹ awọn orisii elekitironi). Ipa Chelate: awọn ligands polydentate (EDTA) dagba awọn eka iduroṣinṣin diẹ sii ju awọn monodentate - anfani thermodynamic lati entropy.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_kp1: Ilana aaye Crystal (CFT): d-orbitals pin ni aaye ligand. Iyapa Octahedral Δ_o yapa t₂g (isalẹ) ati awọn eto e_g (ti o ga julọ). Awọn ligands aaye ti o lagbara (CN⁻, CO) → nla Δ_o → iyipo kekere. Aaye alailagbara (F⁻, H₂O) → kekere Δ_o → iyipo giga.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_kp2: Awọ ati oofa lati CFT: awọn iyipada d-d fa ina ti o han → akiyesi awọ ibaramu. Awọn eka elepo giga jẹ paramagnetic (awọn elekitironi ti a ko so pọ); kekere-omo ere ni o wa diamagnetic.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_kp3: Kemistri Organometallic: Awọn iwe adehun irin-erogba (irin carbonyls M(CO)ₙ, metallocenes, ayase Wilkinson [RhCl(PPh₃)₃] fun hydrogenation). Ofin 18-itanna sọ asọtẹlẹ iduroṣinṣin ti awọn eka organometallic.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_kp4: Kemistri Bioinorganic: Fe ni hemoglobin (iyipada O₂ abuda), awọn iṣupọ Fe-S (gbigbe elekitironi), Zn ninu carbonic anhydrase, Mg ninu chlorophyll (photosynthesis), Cu ni cytochrome c oxidase (mimi), Co ni Vitamin B₁₂.
learnUni_chemistry_f2_task: Ya aworan iyapa octahedral fun [Fe(CN)₆]³⁻ ati [Fe(H₂O)₆]³⁺. Pin awọn elekitironi nipa lilo CFT, pinnu ipo iyipo ati nọmba awọn elekitironi ti a ko so pọ fun ọkọọkan. Ṣe asọtẹlẹ eyiti o gba ina agbara ti o ga julọ ati idi. Ṣe iṣiro ipo ifoyina ti Fe ni eka kọọkan ki o ṣe idanimọ awọn ligands bi aaye ti o lagbara tabi alailagbara nipa lilo jara spectrochemical.
learnUni_chemistry_f3_desc: Kemistri atupale n pese awọn irinṣẹ lati ṣe idanimọ awọn nkan ati wiwọn awọn ifọkansi wọn ni awọn matiri idiju. Awọn ilana itupalẹ ode oni - HPLC, GC-MS, NMR, gbigba atomiki - jẹ pataki kọja awọn oogun, ibojuwo ayika, aabo ounjẹ, awọn oniwadi, ati awọn iwadii ile-iwosan.
learnUni_chemistry_f3_kp0: Itupalẹ Titrimetric: ipilẹ-acid, complexometric (EDTA), redox, ati awọn titration ojoriro. Wiwa ipari-ojuami: awọn afihan, awọn mita pH, conductimetry, potentiometry. Awọn solusan boṣewa, awọn iṣedede akọkọ, ati awọn titọ-pada.
learnUni_chemistry_f3_kp1: Chromatography: ipele iduro da duro awọn paati ni iyatọ. GC (awọn atupale iyipada, wiwa gbona), HPLC (ti kii ṣe iyipada, UV / fluorescence / wiwa MS), IC (paṣipaarọ ion), SFC (omi ti o ga julọ). Ipinnu R = 2(t₂-t₁)/(w₁+w₂).
learnUni_chemistry_f3_kp2: Mass spectrometry: elekitironi ionisation (EI) ṣe agbejade awọn cations radical ti o jẹ abuku ni ihuwasi. MS ti o ga-giga funni ni agbekalẹ molikula gangan. LC-MS/MS pese yiyan fun eka ti ibi matrices.
learnUni_chemistry_f3_kp3: NMR sipekitirosikopi: ¹H NMR: iyipada kemikali (δ, ppm) tọkasi ayika, isọpọ (J, Hz) ṣe afihan Asopọmọra H nitosi, iṣọpọ n funni ni ipin ti awọn iru H. ¹³C NMR ati awọn ilana 2D (COSY, HMBC, NOESY) pinnu eto 3D ni kikun.
learnUni_chemistry_f3_kp4: Afọwọsi ọna: aropin wiwa (LOD), opin iwọn (LOQ), linearity (R²), išedede (% imularada), konge (RSD%), yiyan (ko si kikọlu), agbara (atunse kọja awọn ile-iṣẹ). Ti beere fun ifisilẹ ilana (FDA, EMA).
learnUni_chemistry_f3_task: Apapọ Organic ti a ko mọ fihan: MW = 122 nipasẹ MS; IR: gbooro OH na 3200–3500, carbonyl 1680 cm⁻¹; ¹H NMR: δ 7.8 (d, 2H), 7.5 (d, 2H), 3.9 (s, 3H). Ṣe imọran eto kan. Da kọọkan spectroscopic akiyesi. Lẹhinna ṣapejuwe bi o ṣe le fọwọsi ọna HPLC kan lati ṣe iwọn agbo-ara yii ni tabulẹti elegbogi kan.
learnUni_chemistry_f3_tp1: Mass spectrometry ati NMR || Afọwọsi ọna
learnUni_chemistry_f4_desc: Biokemisitiri ṣe iwadii awọn ilana kemikali ti igbesi aye - catalysis enzyme, awọn ipa ọna iṣelọpọ, ẹda DNA, ati ifihan sẹẹli. O ṣe afara kemistri ati oogun: oye awọn kinetics enzymu jẹ ki apẹrẹ oogun; oye ti iṣelọpọ agbara ṣafihan awọn ibi-afẹde fun atọju àtọgbẹ, akàn, ati isanraju; Biokemistri DNA ṣe atilẹyin ṣiṣatunṣe jiini CRISPR.
learnUni_chemistry_f4_kp0: Awọn kinetics enzymu: Michaelis-Menten idogba v = Vmax [S]/(Km+[S]). Km: ifọkansi sobusitireti ni iyara-idaji-o pọju - ṣe afihan isunmọ sobusitireti henensiamu. Vmax: o pọju oṣuwọn ni saturating sobusitireti. Laini nipasẹ Idite Lineweaver-Burk (1/v vs. 1/ [S]).
learnUni_chemistry_f4_kp1: Idinku Enzyme: ifigagbaga (oludaniloju sopọ aaye ti nṣiṣe lọwọ, mu ki o han gbangba km, Vmax ko yipada); ti kii-idije (inhibitor sopọ ni ibomiiran, dinku Vmax, km ko yipada); irreversible (covalent - aspirin acetylates COX patapata).
learnUni_chemistry_f4_kp2: Metabolism: catabolism (glukosi → 2 pyruvate nipasẹ glycolysis, 2 ATP; Krebs ọmọ 2 ATP; phosphorylation oxidative ~ 32 ATP nipasẹ gradient proton kọja awo inu mitochondrial inu). Lapapọ ≈36 ATP fun glukosi.
learnUni_chemistry_f4_kp3: Biokemisitiri DNA: Helix meji diduro nipasẹ isọdọkan ipilẹ Watson-Crick (A: T, G: C) ati akopọ ipilẹ (π-π awọn ibaraẹnisọrọ). Konsafetifu idapada DNA: DNA polymerase ṣe afikun 5'→ 3', nilo alakoko (RNA). Oṣuwọn aṣiṣe ~ 1 ni 10⁹ lẹhin kika.
learnUni_chemistry_f4_kp4: Ilana amuaradagba ati kika: akọkọ (atẹle amino acid) → atẹle (α-helix: H-bonds i to i +4; β-sheet: parallel or anti-parallel strands) → ile-iwe giga (agbo 3D, iṣubu hydrophobic) → quaternary (ọpọlọpọ awọn ipin). Chaperones ṣe iranlọwọ kika; ṣiṣatunṣe fa awọn arun (Alzheimer, Parkinson, awọn arun prion).
learnUni_chemistry_f4_task: Enzymu kan ni km = 2 mM ati Vmax = 60 μmol/min. (a) Ṣe iṣiro v ni [S] = 1, 2, 6 mM. (b) Fa Michaelis-Menten ati Lineweaver-Burk awọn igbero fun awọn mejeeji ti ko ni idinamọ ati ifigagbaga awọn ipinlẹ idinamọ (inhibitor ilọpo meji gbangba Km). (c) Apẹrẹ oogun: dabaa bawo ni imọ nipa geometry aaye ti nṣiṣe lọwọ enzymu ṣe le ṣe itọsọna apẹrẹ ti oludena afọwọṣe ipinlẹ-ipopopada.
learnUni_biology_f2_desc: Imọ-ẹkọ ile-ẹkọ giga kan awọn awoṣe pipo si awọn agbara olugbe, awọn ibaraenisepo eya, ati iṣẹ ilolupo. Ẹkọ nipa isedale itọju nlo imọ-jinlẹ ilolupo - awọn olugbe ti o le yanju ti o kere ju, apẹrẹ ifipamọ, ilolupo ọdẹ - lati daabobo ipinsiyeleyele ni agbaye ti o ngba iyipada ayika ni iyara.
learnUni_biology_f2_kp0: Awọn awoṣe olugbe: idagbasoke logistic dN/dt = rN(1-N/K) nibiti r jẹ iwọn-iwọn inu ti ilosoke ati K ti n gbe agbara. Ikore alagbero ti o pọju (MSY) ikore ni N = K/2 nibiti dN/dt ti pọju.
learnUni_biology_f2_kp1: Lotka-Volterra aperanje-ọdẹ awoṣe: dN/dt = rN-aNP (ohun ọdẹ); dP/dt = baNP-mP (apanirun). Awọn eniyan n yipada ni ọna cyclically - ti ṣe afihan nipasẹ data hare-lynx. Itupalẹ iduroṣinṣin nipasẹ awọn eigenvalues ​​ti Jacobian.
learnUni_biology_f2_kp2: Biogeography Island (MacArthur & Wilson): S_eq lati iwọntunwọnsi ti iṣiwa (idinku pẹlu S) ati iparun (npo pẹlu S) awọn oṣuwọn. Tobi, awọn erekusu ti o sunmọ ni ọlọrọ eya ti o ga julọ → ariyanjiyan SLOSS ni apẹrẹ ifipamọ.
learnUni_biology_f2_kp3: Ilana Metapopulation (Levins): nẹtiwọọki ti awọn olugbe agbegbe ti o ni asopọ nipasẹ pipinka. Ida ti tẹdo abulẹ p evolves: dp/dt = cp (1-p) - ep. Ibugbe alemo to ṣe pataki ni isalẹ eyiti iparun agbaye jẹ eyiti ko ṣeeṣe.
learnUni_biology_f2_kp4: Itoju Jinomics: awọn irinṣẹ Jiini olugbe (FST, iwọn olugbe ti o munadoko Ne, olusọdipúpọ inbreeding F) ṣe idanimọ awọn olugbe iyatọ ti jiini, wiwọn ṣiṣan jiini, ati ṣe iwadii ibanujẹ inbreeding ni awọn eto ibisi igbekun.
learnUni_biology_f2_task: Olugbe ti 200 wolves (K=1000, r=0.3/yr) ti wa ni ikore lododun. (a) Ṣe iṣiro oṣuwọn idagbasoke olugbe ni N=200 ati ni MSY. (b) Ikore ọdọọdun wo ni o dọgba oṣuwọn idagba ni MSY? (c) Olugbe keji ni erekusu adugbo ni Ne=15 - awọn ewu wo ni eyi dojukọ, ati pe awọn iṣe itọju wo ni o yẹ?
learnUni_biology_f2_tp2: Igbesiaye itan-aye erekusu ati awọn genomics itoju
learnUni_biology_f3_desc: Ẹkọ nipa isedale sẹẹli ni ipele ile-ẹkọ giga ṣe iwadii iyipada ifihan agbara, ọna sẹẹli, epigenetics, ati awọn ilana molikula ti arun. isedale molikula ode oni – PCR, gene cloning, RNA-seq, CRISPR — pese awọn irinṣẹ lati ka, kọ, ati satunkọ awọn genomes. Awọn imọ-ẹrọ wọnyi n yi oogun pada, ogbin, ati imọ-jinlẹ ipilẹ.
learnUni_biology_f3_kp0: Ilana ọmọ sẹẹli: awọn cyclins ati CDKs (kinases ti o gbẹkẹle cyclin) wakọ awọn iyipada iyipo sẹẹli. Awọn inhibitors CDK (p21, p27) ṣiṣẹ bi awọn idaduro. Rb tumor suppressor sequesters E2F transcription ifosiwewe titi phosphorylated nipasẹ Cyclin D-CDK4/6.
learnUni_biology_f3_kp1: Awọn ipa ọna gbigbe ifihan agbara: RTK (igbasilẹ tyrosine kinase) imuṣiṣẹ → RAS/MAPK kasikedi → ifosiwewe phosphorylation transcription → awọn iyipada ikosile pupọ. PI3K/Akt/mTOR ipa ọna: idagbasoke ati iwalaaye. Awọn mejeeji jẹ iyipada nigbagbogbo ninu akàn.
learnUni_biology_f3_kp2: Epigenetics: awọn ayipada arole ninu ikosile pupọ laisi iyipada ọkọọkan DNA. Awọn iyipada Histone (acetylation - lọwọ; methylation - ti o gbẹkẹle ọrọ-ọrọ), DNA methylation (CpG methylation silences genes), atunṣe chromatin. Epigenetic reprogramming ni embryogenesis ati akàn.
learnUni_biology_f3_kp3: RNA isedale: splicing (spliceosomes yọ awọn introns), yiyan splicing (jiini kan → ọpọ awọn ọlọjẹ - ~ 95% ti awọn Jiini eniyan ti wa ni yiyan spliced), ti kii-ifaminsi RNA (miRNA silences mRNA, lncRNA ṣe ilana chromatin), ribozymes.
learnUni_biology_f3_kp4: CRISPR-Cas9: itọsọna RNA ṣe itọsọna Cas9 si ọna ibi-afẹde (tókàn si ilana PAM). Cas9 cleaves mejeeji strands. Tunṣe nipasẹ NHEJ (aṣiṣe-prone → knockout) tabi HDR (awoṣe → atunkọ gangan). Awọn ohun elo: itọju ailera pupọ, ogbin, iwadii ipilẹ, awọn iwadii aisan.
learnUni_biology_f3_task: Awọn sẹẹli alakan kan ni: (1) iyipada RAS ti nṣiṣe lọwọ, (2) apilẹṣẹ Rb ti paarẹ, (3) iyipada p53. Wa awọn abajade molikula ti iyipada kọọkan nipasẹ ọna sẹẹli ati awọn ipa ọna ifihan. Ṣe idanimọ: iru ibi ayẹwo wo ni o kuna fun ọkọọkan, kini awọn abajade jẹ fun isunmọ sẹẹli, ati awọn ilana itọju ailera meji ti o fojusi awọn abawọn wọnyi.
learnUni_biology_f4_name: Neuroscience || Neuroscience afara molikula isedale, fisioloji, ati oroinuokan lati se alaye bi awọn ọpọlọ ni ipilẹṣẹ iwa. Lati awọn ikanni ion si awọn iyika nkankikan si aiji, o jẹ ọkan ninu eka julọ ati awọn aala moriwu ni isedale. Awọn arun ti iṣan ni ipa lori 1 ni awọn eniyan 6 ni kariaye - agbọye wọn nilo imọ jinlẹ ti eto ọpọlọ ati iṣẹ.
learnUni_biology_f4_desc: Agbara iṣe: ilokuro ẹnu-ọna ṣi awọn ikanni Na⁺ foliteji-gated (depolarisation depolarisation to +40 mV) → inactivation of Na⁺ channels + šiši ti awọn ikanni K⁺ (repolarisation) → hyperpolarisation (akoko refractory). Gbogbo-tabi-ohunkohun, propagates lai decrement pẹlú axon.
learnUni_biology_f4_kp0: Gbigbe Synapti: Ca²⁺ influx nfa idapọ vesicle mediated SNARE → itusilẹ neurotransmitter → abuda olugba olugba postsynapti. Awọn olugba Ionotropic (AMPA, GABA_A): ṣiṣan ion yara. Awọn olugba Metabotropic (mGluR, β-adrenergic): awọn kasikedi G-amuaradagba lọra.
learnUni_biology_f4_kp1: Plasticity Synaptic: LTP (agbara igba pipẹ) - aṣawari lasan olugba NMDA (nilo mejeeji abuda glutamate ATI depolarisation postsynaptic) → Fi sii olugba AMPA → alekun agbara synapti. Ipilẹ molikula ti ẹkọ ati iranti.
learnUni_biology_f4_kp2: Awọn iyika nkankikan: excitatory (glutamatergic) ati inhibitory (GABAergic) awọn neuronu dagba awọn iyika loorekoore. Iwontunws.funfun E/I: idalọwọduro nfa warapa (imuraju pupọ) tabi akuniloorun (idinamọ apọju). Oscillations (theta, gamma) ṣe koodu alaye ati muuṣiṣẹpọ awọn agbegbe ọpọlọ.
learnUni_biology_f4_kp3: Awọn ọna aarun ti iṣan: Alzheimer's (amyloid-β plaques disrupt synaptic gbigbe; tau hyperphosphorylation destabilises microtubules → neuronal death), Parkinson's (pipadanu neuron dopaminergic ni substantia nigra; α-synuclein Lewy body), Huntington's (polyglutaminestriction in hunting proteingeneggre).
learnUni_biology_f4_kp4: Neurological disease mechanisms: Alzheimer's (amyloid-β plaques disrupt synaptic transmission; tau hyperphosphorylation destabilises microtubules → neuronal death), Parkinson's (dopaminergic neuron loss in substantia nigra; α-synuclein Lewy bodies), Huntington's (polyglutamine expansion in huntingtin → toxic protein aggregation, striatal neurodegeneration).
learnUni_biology_f4_task: O ṣe igbasilẹ lati inu neuron hippocampal kan. Imudara igbohunsafẹfẹ giga ti neuron presynaptic fa LTP. Apejuwe igbese-nipasẹ-igbese awọn iṣẹlẹ molikula: NMDA receptor ibere ise, Ca²⁺ ifihan agbara, CaMKII ibere ise, AMPA phosphorylation olugba ati fi sii, ati ki o gun-igba awọn ayipada igbekale. Lẹhinna ṣalaye idi ti idinamọ awọn olugba NMDA ṣe idiwọ dida LTP.
learnUni_biology_f4_tp0: Awọn agbara iṣe ati gbigbe synaptiki
learnUni_biology_f4_tp1: Plasticity Synapti ati LTP || Awọn iyika nkankikan ati arun iṣan
learnUni_biology_f5_name: Imuniloji jẹ iwadi ti awọn ọna aabo ti ara. Eto eto ajẹsara n ṣe iyatọ fun ara ẹni lati ti kii ṣe ti ara ẹni, run awọn pathogens ati awọn sẹẹli alakan, ati ṣẹda iranti ajẹsara. Dysregulation nfa awọn arun autoimmune, aleji, ati aipe ajẹsara. Awọn itọju ajẹsara ode oni - awọn inhibitors checkpoint, awọn sẹẹli CAR-T, awọn ajesara mRNA - n yi oogun pada.
learnUni_biology_f5_desc: Ajẹsara innate: awọn olugba idanimọ apẹẹrẹ (PRRs, fun apẹẹrẹ Toll-like receptors) ṣe awari awọn ilana molikula ti o ni nkan ṣe pẹlu pathogen (PAMPs). Mu NF-κB ṣiṣẹ → awọn cytokines iredodo (IL-6, TNF-a, IL-1β). Pari kasikedi opsonises ati lyses pathogens.
learnUni_biology_f5_kp0: Ajẹsara adaṣe: awọn sẹẹli ti n ṣafihan antigen (awọn sẹẹli dendritic, macrophages) ilana antigens ati peptides wa lori MHC I (si CD8⁺ cytotoxic T awọn sẹẹli) tabi MHC II (si awọn sẹẹli T oluranlọwọ CD4⁺). Yiyan oniye ati imugboroja ti antijeni-pato lymphocytes.
learnUni_biology_f5_kp1: Imuṣiṣẹpọ sẹẹli B ati awọn apo-ara: Imudara T-ti o gbẹkẹle nilo awọn sẹẹli T oluranlọwọ (CD40L-CD40 ibaraenisepo + awọn cytokines). Idahun ile-iṣẹ Germinal: hypermutation somatic + affinity maturation + iyipada kilasi (IgM → IgG, IgA, IgE). Awọn sẹẹli B iranti duro fun awọn ọdun mẹwa.
learnUni_biology_f5_kp2: Ifarada ajẹsara ati ajẹsara: ifarada aarin - awọn sẹẹli autoreactive T paarẹ ninu thymus (aṣayan odi). Ifarada agbeegbe - awọn sẹẹli T ilana (Tregs) dinku awọn sẹẹli autoreactive. Ikuna: lupus erythematosus eto-ara, arthritis rheumatoid, àtọgbẹ iru 1.
learnUni_biology_f5_kp3: Ajẹsara ajẹsara: PD-1/PD-L1 awọn inhibitors checkpoint block evasion ajẹsara tumo → T cell reactivation (pembrolizumab, nivolumab — Nobel Prize 2018). CAR-T cell ailera: ẹlẹrọ alaisan T ẹyin pẹlu chimeric antijeni receptor ìfọkànsí antijeni tumo - ìgbésẹ esi ni B cell lukimia.
learnUni_biology_f5_kp4: Alaisan kan ṣafihan pẹlu awọn akoran kokoro-arun ti nwaye ati awọn ipele immunoglobulin kekere pupọ. Ẹjẹ agbeegbe fihan awọn sẹẹli B ti ko si ṣugbọn awọn sẹẹli T deede. Ṣe iwadii ajẹsara ajẹsara (agmmaglobulinemia ti o ni asopọ X - iyipada BTK). Ṣe alaye ipilẹ molikula: bawo ni BTK ṣe n ṣe ifihan deede lakoko idagbasoke sẹẹli B, kini o jẹ aṣiṣe, ati bii itọju ailera immunoglobulin (IVIG) iṣan ṣe n ṣiṣẹ.
learnUni_biology_f5_tp0: Ajẹsara adaṣe ati awọn sẹẹli B
learnUni_computer_science_f2_name: Awọn alugoridimu ati awọn ẹya data jẹ ipilẹ imọ-jinlẹ ti imọ-ẹrọ kọnputa. Eto data ti o tọ jẹ ki algorithm kan daradara; ti ko tọ si mu ki o impractical. Itupalẹ Big-O, awọn algoridimu ayaworan, ati siseto agbara jẹ awọn irinṣẹ ipilẹ gbogbo ẹlẹrọ sọfitiwia gbọdọ ni oye.
learnUni_computer_science_f2_desc: Big-O: O(1) ibakan, O(log n) wiwa alakomeji, O(n) scan linear, O(n log n) parapo too, O(n²) too bubble too, O(2ⁿ) exponential. Ω (ọran ti o dara julọ), Θ (odidi wiwọ). Amortized onínọmbà fun ìmúdàgba orun.
learnUni_computer_science_f2_kp0: mojuto ẹya: orun (O (1) wiwọle), ti sopọ mọ akojọ (O (1) ori fi sii), hash tabili (apapọ O (1) gbogbo ops), BST (O (log n) iwontunwonsi), òkiti (O (log n) fi sii / jade), gbiyanju (okun prefix mosi).
learnUni_computer_science_f2_kp1: Awọn algoridimu aworan: BFS (ọna ti o kuru ju, O (V + E)), DFS (iṣawari ọmọ, iru topological), Dijkstra (ọna ti o kuru ju, O ((V + E) log V)), Bellman-Ford (awọn òṣuwọn odi, O (VE)), Floyd-Warshall (gbogbo awọn orisii, O (V³)).
learnUni_computer_science_f2_kp2: Graph algorithms: BFS (shortest path unweighted, O(V+E)), DFS (cycle detection, topological sort), Dijkstra (shortest path weighted, O((V+E)log V)), Bellman-Ford (negative weights, O(VE)), Floyd-Warshall (all pairs, O(V³)).
learnUni_computer_science_f2_kp3: Yiyi siseto: ti aipe substructure + agbekọja subprobles. Memoisation (oke-isalẹ) vs. tabulation (isalẹ-soke). Awọn iṣoro Ayebaye: 0/1 Knapsack, LCS, Ijinna Ṣatunkọ, Ilọpo Pq Matrix, Iyipada owo.
learnUni_computer_science_f2_kp4: NP-pipe: P (polynomial-akoko solvable), NP (polynomial-akoko verifiable). Awọn iṣoro NP-pipe (SAT, TSP, Clique) - ko si algorithm oni-iye ti a mọ. Ilana Cook-Levin: SAT jẹ pipe-NP. Idinku mule NP-lile.
learnUni_computer_science_f2_task: Ṣe imuse algorithm Dijkstra (pseudocode pẹlu isinyi ayo) lori iyaworan 6-ipade. Ṣiṣe awọn ti o igbese-nipasẹ-Igbese, fifi awọn ijinna tabili ati ayo ipo isinyi ni kọọkan aṣetunṣe. Ṣe afihan idiju akoko O ((V+E) log V). Lẹhinna ṣalaye: ti aworan naa ba ni awọn egbegbe odi, kilode ti Dijkstra kuna, ati bawo ni Bellman-Ford ṣe mu wọn?
learnUni_computer_science_f2_tp2: Ìmúdàgba siseto ati NP-ipari || Awọn ọna ṣiṣe
learnUni_computer_science_f3_name: Awọn ọna ṣiṣe jẹ Layer sọfitiwia laarin ohun elo ati ohun elo - awọn ilana iṣakoso, iranti, ibi ipamọ, ati aabo. Agbọye inu inu OS jẹ ki o kọ daradara, koodu igbakanna, loye iṣẹ ṣiṣe eto, ati ṣe apẹrẹ awọn ọna ṣiṣe pinpin to ni aabo.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_desc: Ilana la okun: ilana kan ni aaye adirẹsi tirẹ ati awọn orisun; awọn okun pin aaye adirẹsi ilana. Yiyipada ọrọ-ọrọ: OS fipamọ/ṣe atunṣe ipo Sipiyu (awọn iforukọsilẹ, PC, itọka akopọ). Iṣeto: FCFS, SJF, Robin yika, ayo, Multilevel isinyi.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_kp0: Awọn eewu ibaraenisọrọ: awọn ipo ere-ije, titiipa (Awọn ipo Coffman: iyasoto laarin ara ẹni, idaduro-ati-duro, ko si iṣaju, idaduro ipin), ebi, titiipa. Amuṣiṣẹpọ: mutex, semaphore, atẹle (awọn oniyipada ipo), awọn titiipa kika-kikọ.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_kp1: Iṣakoso iranti: paging — pin aaye adirẹsi foju foju si awọn oju-iwe iwọn ti o wa titi ti a ya aworan si awọn fireemu ti ara nipasẹ tabili oju-iwe. TLB ṣafipamọ awọn itumọ aipẹ. Awọn algoridimu rirọpo oju-iwe: FIFO, LRU, Aago (anfani keji). Thrashing nigbati ṣiṣẹ ṣeto> Ramu.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_kp2: Awọn ọna faili: VFS (Eto Faili Foju) Layer fun gbigbe. Inodes: metadata faili + awọn itọka dina data. Akosile (ext4, NTFS) fun aitasera jamba. B-igi lo ninu HFS +, NTFS fun titọka liana. Awọn ipele RAID 0,1,5,6 - iṣẹ-ṣiṣe ati awọn iṣowo-pada-pada.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_kp3: Aabo faaji: oruka Idaabobo (olumulo mode vs. ekuro mode, syscalls bi dari aala), agbara-orisun wiwọle Iṣakoso, dandan wiwọle Iṣakoso (SELinux / AppArmor), hypervisors (iru 1 igboro irin: VMware ESXi, Xen; iru 2 ti gbalejo: VirtualBox). Awọn apoti (Docker) lo awọn akojọpọ ati awọn aaye orukọ - kii ṣe awọn VM otitọ.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_kp4: Awọn ilana mẹta pin awọn orisun R1 ati R2. P1: di R1, nilo R2. P2: di R2, nilo R1. P3: nilo mejeeji. (a) Fa aworan ipin awọn orisun ati rii titiipa. (b) Ṣafihan ipo ailewu kan nipa lilo Algorithm Bank Bank: Max=[R1:2,R2:1], [R1:1,R2:2], [R1:2,R2:2]; Wa=[R1:1,R2:1]. Wa ọkọọkan ipaniyan ailewu kan. (c) Ṣe imọran ilana kan lati ṣe idiwọ titiipa yii.
learnUni_computer_science_f3_tp1: Awọn ọna ṣiṣe faili ati aabo OS
learnUni_computer_science_f4_name: Imọ-ẹrọ sọfitiwia kan awọn ọna eleto si kikọ igbẹkẹle, itọju, sọfitiwia ti iwọn. Awọn iṣe ode oni - Agile, DevOps, awọn iṣẹ microservices, CI/CD - ti yi pada bi a ti ṣe jiṣẹ sọfitiwia. Awọn ilana imọ-ẹrọ mojuto - awọn ibeere, faaji, idanwo, ati aabo - jẹ pataki laibikita ilana.
learnUni_computer_science_f4_desc: Agile (Scrum, XP, Kanban): aṣetunṣe 2-ọsẹ sprints, awọn iduro ojoojumọ, awọn ifẹhinti sprint, olutọju ẹhin. DevOps: idagbasoke ati awọn iṣẹ ṣiṣe; CI/CD pipelines (GitLab CI, Jenkins, GitHub Actions) adaṣe adaṣe, idanwo, ransogun lori gbogbo ifaramo.
learnUni_computer_science_f4_kp0: Agile (Scrum, XP, Kanban): iterative 2-week sprints, daily standups, sprint retrospectives, backlog grooming. DevOps: development and operations integrated; CI/CD pipelines (GitLab CI, Jenkins, GitHub Actions) automate build, test, deploy on every commit.
learnUni_computer_science_f4_kp1: Awọn ilana faaji sọfitiwia: Layer (UI → ọgbọn iṣowo → iwọle data), awọn iṣẹ microservices (awọn iṣẹ iyasọtọ ti ominira pẹlu awọn apoti isura infomesonu tirẹ, ibasọrọ nipasẹ REST/gRPC/fifiranṣẹ), ṣiṣe-iṣẹlẹ (awọn iṣẹ fesi si awọn iṣẹlẹ — Kafka, RabbitMQ), CQRS + Iṣẹlẹ Sourcing.
learnUni_computer_science_f4_kp2: Awọn ilana apẹrẹ (GoF): Ṣiṣẹda (Singleton, Factory, Akole, Afọwọṣe), Ilana (Adapter, Decorator, Facade, Proxy), Iwa (Oluwoye, Ilana, Aṣẹ, Ọna Awoṣe, Atunse). Mọ igba lati lo - maṣe ṣe ẹrọ-ẹrọ ju.
learnUni_computer_science_f4_kp3: Ilana idanwo: ẹyọkan (yara, sọtọ - awọn igbẹkẹle ẹlẹgàn), isọpọ (awọn paati lọpọlọpọ), adehun (ibaramu API), eto (ipari-si-opin), gbigba (ifọwọsi itan olumulo). TDD: pupa-alawọ ewe-refactor. Idanwo iyipada jẹri didara idanwo.
learnUni_computer_science_f4_kp4: Aabo ni imọ-ẹrọ sọfitiwia (OWASP Top 10): abẹrẹ (SQL, pipaṣẹ), ijẹrisi fifọ, XSS, awọn itọkasi ohun taara ti ko ni aabo, aiṣedeede aabo. Awoṣe Irokeke (STRIDE), atunyẹwo koodu to ni aabo, ọlọjẹ ailagbara igbẹkẹle (Snyk, Dependabot).
learnUni_computer_science_f4_task: Ṣe apẹrẹ ohun elo pinpin gigun: (a) Kọ awọn itan olumulo 5 pẹlu awọn ibeere gbigba. (b) Fa aworan C4 faaji (ọrọ, eiyan, awọn ipele paati). (c) Ṣe idanimọ awọn ilana apẹrẹ 3 ti a lo ati ṣe idalare. (d) Kọ awọn idanwo ẹyọkan (pseudocode) fun iṣẹ 'ṣiṣiro owo-owo' ibora: owo idiyele ipilẹ, idiyele abẹlẹ, owo idiyele ti o kere ju, ati awọn ọran eti (ijinna odo, awọn igbewọle odi). (e) Ṣe idanimọ awọn ewu aabo OWASP 3 ati awọn idinku.
learnUni_computer_science_f5_name: Ẹkọ ẹrọ & AI || Ẹkọ ẹrọ (ML) ngbanilaaye awọn eto lati kọ ẹkọ lati data. Ẹkọ ti o jinlẹ - awọn nẹtiwọọki nkankikan pẹlu ọpọlọpọ awọn fẹlẹfẹlẹ — ti ṣe awọn aṣeyọri ninu iran, ede, ati awọn ere. Imọye ẹkọ ML (iyatọ-iyatọ, iwọn VC, isọdọtun) ati adaṣe (PyTorch, tuning hyperparameter, imuṣiṣẹ) jẹ agbara pataki ni imọ-ẹrọ kọnputa.
learnUni_computer_science_f5_desc: Ẹkọ ti a ṣe abojuto: dinku L(θ) pipadanu lori data ikẹkọ nipasẹ isunmọ gradient θ ← θ - α∇L. Sitokasitik gradient ayalu (SGD), Adam optimiser. Ilana: L2 (idibajẹ iwuwo, awọn iwuwo idinku), L1 (sparsity), dropout (laileto zeroes neurons nigba ikẹkọ).
learnUni_computer_science_f5_kp0: Iṣatunṣe nẹtiwọọki nkankikan: ti sopọ ni kikun (ipon), convolutional (CNN — pinpin iwuwo, aibikita itumọ - apẹrẹ fun awọn aworan), loorekoore (RNN, LSTM, GRU — data lẹsẹsẹ), ẹrọ akiyesi (Ayiyipada — akiyesi ara ẹni, O (n²) idiju, ṣugbọn parallelisable).
learnUni_computer_science_f5_kp1: Iṣowo-iyatọ-iyatọ: aṣiṣe ikẹkọ ≈ abosi²; aṣiṣe idanwo - aṣiṣe ikẹkọ ≈ iyatọ. Labẹ ibamu: irẹjẹ giga (awoṣe rọrun ju). Ni ibamu ju: iyatọ giga (awoṣe ṣe iranti data ikẹkọ). Iṣatunṣe, data diẹ sii, ati awọn awoṣe ti o rọrun ba sọrọ ni ibamu ju.
learnUni_computer_science_f5_kp2: Igbelewọn kọja išedede: fun awọn kilasi aiṣedeede — konge (TP/TP+FP), iranti (TP/TP+FN), F1 = 2PR/(P+R), AUC-ROC (agbegbe labẹ olugba ti n ṣiṣẹ ti tẹ ihuwasi). k-agbo agbelebu-afọwọsi n funni ni iṣiro gbogbogbo logan.
learnUni_computer_science_f5_kp3: Awọn awoṣe ipilẹ ati AI ti o ni iduro: awọn awoṣe ede nla (GPT, BERT) ti kọkọ tẹlẹ lori data ti o tobi, aifwy daradara fun awọn iṣẹ ṣiṣe kan pato. Awọn iṣojuuwọn, ojuṣaaju, ati ilokulo jẹ awọn eewu to ṣe pataki. Ofin EU AI (2024) ṣe ipinlẹ awọn eto AI nipasẹ eewu ati gbe awọn ibeere fun awọn ohun elo eewu giga.
learnUni_computer_science_f5_kp4: O kọ classifier itara (awọn atunwo rere/odi). Ipese ikẹkọ: 97%; afọwọsi išedede: 68%. (a) Ṣe ayẹwo iṣoro naa. (b) Akojọ 4 imuposi lati fix o. (c) Eto data rẹ jẹ rere 90% - ṣe iṣiro deede, konge, iranti, ati F1 ti o ba pin ohun gbogbo bi rere. Kini idi ti F1 jẹ metiriki to dara julọ? (d) Fa awọn igun-ipe iranti pipe fun awọn awoṣe meji ki o ṣe alaye eyiti iwọ yoo yan fun iṣẹ ṣiṣe ayẹwo iṣoogun kan.
learnUni_computer_science_f5_tp1: Awọn metiriki igbelewọn ati lodidi AI
learnUni_economics_f1_desc: Microeconomics ṣe itupalẹ ṣiṣe ipinnu nipasẹ awọn ile, awọn ile-iṣẹ, ati awọn ọja. Olumulo ati ilana imuduro, awọn ẹya ọja lati idije pipe si anikanjọpọn, awọn ita gbangba, ati ilana ere pese ohun elo irinṣẹ itupalẹ fun oye awọn idiyele, awọn abajade ọja, ati awọn ipa iranlọwọ ti eto imulo.
learnUni_economics_f1_kp0: Ilana onibara: IwUlO ga julọ koko ọrọ si ihamọ isuna. Ni aipe: MU_x/P_x = MU_y/P_y (IwUlO alabagbepo fun iwon kan). Awọn iha aibikita + laini isuna → ipo ojulowo MRS = ipin idiyele.
learnUni_economics_f1_kp1: Firm yii: èrè maximization ibi ti MR = MC. Idije pipe: P = MR = MC ni iwọntunwọnsi igba pipẹ, èrè eto-aje odo. Ṣiṣe kukuru: tiipa ti P <min(AVC).
learnUni_economics_f1_kp2: Awọn ẹya ọja: anikanjọpọn (MR <P, pipadanu iwuwo = pipadanu iranlọwọ, anikanjọpọn adayeba ti a ṣe ilana nipasẹ fila idiyele tabi iye owo-plus); oligopoly (Ẹjọ - idije opoiye, Bertrand - idije idiyele → idiyele idiyele alapin).
learnUni_economics_f1_kp3: Awọn ọja ita ati awọn ẹru ilu: ita ita odi → iṣelọpọ apọju (ori Pigouvian = awọn atunṣe MEC). Ita ti o dara → iṣelọpọ (awọn atunṣe iranlọwọ). Awọn ọja ti gbogbo eniyan: ti kii ṣe iyasọtọ + ti kii ṣe orogun → iṣoro ẹlẹṣin ọfẹ → ipese nipasẹ ọja.
learnUni_economics_f1_kp4: Imọran ere: Nash iwontun-wonsi (ko si iyapa ere ti ara ẹni). Atayanyan elewon: ilana ti o ni agbara nyorisi abajade Pareto-alaini. Awọn ere ti o tun ṣe: ifowosowopo alagbero nipasẹ awọn ọgbọn okunfa ti o ba jẹ pe ipin ẹdinwo ga to. Imọran titaja: idiyele akọkọ (idu ni isalẹ iye), idiyele keji/Vickrey (ilana ti o ga julọ lati ṣe idiyele idiyele otitọ).
learnUni_economics_f1_task: Awọn ọkọ ofurufu meji ti njijadu lori ipa ọna. Kọọkan le ṣeto Ga tabi Low owo. Matrix isanwo (èrè £m): {H,H}=(10,10), {H,L}=(2,15), {L,H}=(15,2), {L,L}=(5,5). (a) Wa Nash iwọntunwọnsi. (b) Ṣe o dara julọ bi Pareto? (c) Ti o ba ti awọn ere ti wa ni tun titilai, nigba ti ifowosowopo le wa ni idaduro (yori majemu lori eni ifosiwewe δ)? (d) Bawo ni ofin idije ṣe n wo isọdọkan idiyele ọkọ ofurufu?
learnUni_economics_f1_tp2: Awọn ita ita ati imọran ere
learnUni_economics_f2_desc: Econometrics n pese awọn irinṣẹ iṣiro lati ṣe idanwo awọn imọ-ọrọ eto-ọrọ ati ṣiro awọn ibatan idi lati data akiyesi. Ipadabọ OLS, awọn oniyipada ohun elo, ati awọn ọna data nronu jẹ awọn ẹṣin iṣẹ. 'Iyika Iyika' ti ode oni n tẹnu mọ idanimọ lile ti awọn ipa idi ni lilo awọn adanwo adayeba.
learnUni_economics_f2_kp0: OLS: gbe Σεᵢ² lati fi siro β̂ = (X'X)⁻¹X'y. Gauss-Markov: OLS jẹ BLUE labẹ ko si endogeneity, isokan, ko si multicollinearity pipe. Àìṣojúsàájú: E[β̂] = β. Iduroṣinṣin: β̂ →_p β bi n → ∞.
learnUni_economics_f2_kp1: Endogeneity: E[ε|X] ≠ 0 nitori ojuṣaaju oniyipada ti a yọkuro, idipada yipo, tabi aṣiṣe wiwọn → OLS abosi ati aisedede. Ojutu IV: wa irinse Z ni ibamu pẹlu X (ibaramu: Cov(Z,X) ≠ 0) ṣugbọn kii ṣe pẹlu ε (iyasoto: Cov(Z,ε) = 0).
learnUni_economics_f2_kp2: Data nronu: Yᵢₜ = α + βXᵢₜ + μᵢ + εᵢₜ. Awọn ipa ti o wa titi (laarin oniṣiro): yọkuro akoko-ayipada aibikita orisirisi μᵢ. Awọn ipa laileto: daradara diẹ sii ti μᵢ ko ba ni ibatan pẹlu X (idanwo: Hausman). Iyatọ akọkọ: Δyᵢₜ = βΔxᵢₜ + Δεᵢₜ.
learnUni_economics_f2_kp3: Iyatọ-ni-iyatọ (DiD): ṣe afiwe itọju ati awọn ẹgbẹ iṣakoso ṣaaju / lẹhin iyipada eto imulo. β_DiD = (Ȳ_{itọju, ifiweranṣẹ} - Ȳ_{itọju, ṣaju}) - (Ȳ_{iṣakoso, ifiweranṣẹ} - Ȳ_{iṣakoso, ṣaju}). Idaniloju bọtini: awọn aṣa ti o jọra (itọju ti ko si, awọn ẹgbẹ mejeeji yoo ti wa ni aami kanna).
learnUni_economics_f2_kp4: Idaduro ipadasẹhin (RD): itọju ti wa ni sọtọ ti o da lori boya oniyipada ti nṣiṣẹ kọja iloro kan. Ṣe afiwe awọn abajade ti o kan loke ati ni isalẹ gige - laileto agbegbe. Sharp RD: gbogbo rekoja ala. Iruju RD: nikan diẹ ninu - lo bi irinse.
learnUni_economics_f2_task: O fẹ lati ṣe iṣiro ipa idi ti ẹkọ ile-ẹkọ giga lori awọn dukia. OLS n fun β̂ = 0.08 (8% Ere-owo oya fun ọdun kan ti ẹkọ). (a) Kí nìdí tí OLS fi lè jẹ́ ojúsàájú? (b) Dabaa ohun elo kan - sọ idi ti o fi ni itẹlọrun ibaramu ati awọn ihamọ iyasoto. (c) Ṣapejuwe ilana DiD kan nipa lilo idanwo adayeba (fun apẹẹrẹ iyipada owo ileiwe) pẹlu arosinu awọn aṣa ti o jọra. (d) Tumọ apẹrẹ ifasilẹyin kan ni ayika iloro yiyan yiyan sikolashipu kan.
learnUni_economics_f3_desc: Awọn ọrọ-aje ihuwasi ṣe ṣafikun awọn oye inu ọkan sinu itupalẹ eto-ọrọ aje. Awọn eniyan kii ṣe onipin ni pipe - wọn jẹ ikorira-pipadanu, ojuṣaaju lọwọlọwọ, ti o ni ipa nipasẹ sisọ ati awọn ilana awujọ. Awọn iyapa wọnyi jẹ asọtẹlẹ ati eto, ti n muu ṣe apẹrẹ eto imulo to dara julọ nipasẹ awọn nudges ati faaji yiyan.
learnUni_economics_f3_kp0: Ilana ifojusọna (Kahneman & Tversky, 1979): eniyan ṣe iṣiro awọn abajade ti o ni ibatan si aaye itọkasi kan. Iṣẹ iye: concave fun awọn anfani (fifẹ eewu), convex fun awọn adanu (wiwa eewu), steeper fun awọn adanu ju awọn anfani (λ ≈ 2 — olùsọdipúpọ aversion pipadanu).
learnUni_economics_f3_kp1: Iṣeeṣe àdánù: eniyan apọju iwọn kekere iṣeeṣe (salaye lotteries ati insurance) ati underweight ti o tobi iṣeeṣe. Akopọ afojusọna yii kapa yellow lotteries.
learnUni_economics_f3_kp2: Iyatọ lọwọlọwọ: quasi-hyperbolic discounting U = u₀ + βΣδᵗuₜ pẹlu β <1. Ṣe ipilẹṣẹ aiṣedeede akoko - awọn ero ti a ṣe ni bayi kii yoo tẹle. Ṣalaye jijẹ ju, labẹ fifipamọ, isọkuro. Sophisticates mọ ti won ba abosi; naives don't — o yatọ si imulo lojo.
learnUni_economics_f3_kp3: Ẹkọ nudge (Thaler & Sunstein, 2008): yiyan faaji ṣe apẹrẹ awọn ipinnu laisi ihamọ ominira. Awọn ofin aipe (iforukọsilẹ laifọwọyi ifẹhinti), awọn ifiranṣẹ iwuwasi awujọ ('ọpọlọpọ awọn idile sanwo ni akoko'), ati irọrun dinku awọn idena si ihuwasi iwunilori.
learnUni_economics_f3_kp4: Awọn ọrọ-aje esiperimenta ati awọn RCTs: awọn adanwo idanwo laabu ni awọn eto iṣakoso. Awọn adanwo aaye (RCTs) awọn ilowosi idanwo ni iwọn. Randomistas (Banerjee, Duflo - Nobel 2019) ṣe iyipada eto-ọrọ idagbasoke idagbasoke nipasẹ idanwo lile ni awọn idasi kan pato.
learnUni_economics_f3_task: Awoṣe ẹni kọọkan ti o ni ojuṣaaju (β = 0.7, δ = 0.95) pinnu boya lati ṣe adaṣe loni (iye owo c = awọn ohun elo 5) fun anfani iwaju (awọn ohun elo B = 10 ti o gba ni ọsẹ to nbọ). (a) Ǹjẹ́ ẹnì kọ̀ọ̀kan máa ń wéwèé láti ṣe eré ìmárale ní ọjọ́ Sunday? (b) Nígbà tí Monday bá dé, ṣé wọ́n máa ń ṣe eré ìmárale? (c) Ṣe alaye aiṣedeede akoko. (d) Ṣe apẹrẹ ohun elo ifaramo kan lati ṣe iranlọwọ fun wọn, ki o ṣe afiwe rẹ si nudge ijiya owo.
learnUni_economics_f4_desc: Awọn eto-ọrọ idagbasoke idagbasoke ṣe iwadi awọn idi ti osi ati awọn eto imulo ti o ṣe agbega aisiki. Awọn ọrọ-aje idagbasoke ode oni ti gbe lati awọn imọ-jinlẹ nla si ẹri ti o lagbara lori awọn ilowosi kan pato - lilo awọn RCT, awọn adanwo adayeba, ati data nla. Aaye naa ṣe pẹlu idagbasoke, awọn ile-iṣẹ, ilera, eto-ẹkọ, ati aidogba.
learnUni_economics_f4_kp0: Awoṣe idagbasoke solow: Y = AK^α L^{1-α}. Ipo ti o duro: idoko-owo = idinku; Oṣuwọn ifowopamọ ati idagbasoke olugbe pinnu ipin K/L. Dinku awọn ipadabọ → isọdọkan ipo. Ajẹkù A (apapọ ifosiwewe ifosiwewe) n ṣe idagbasoke idagbasoke gigun-ṣugbọn o jẹ ajeji ni Solow.
learnUni_economics_f4_kp1: Idagbasoke ailopin (Romer 1990): imọ K̃ wọ inu iṣelọpọ laisi idinku awọn ipadabọ. Ẹka R&D ṣe agbejade awọn imọran tuntun. Imudaniloju imọ (ti kii ṣe orogun, iyasọtọ apakan) → aibikita ti imotuntun laisi aabo IP tabi awọn ifunni R&D.
learnUni_economics_f4_kp2: Awọn ile-iṣẹ ati idagbasoke (Acemoglu & Robinson): awọn ile-iṣẹ akojọpọ (awọn ẹtọ ohun-ini, ofin ofin, awọn ọja ifigagbaga) ṣe idagbasoke idagbasoke. Awọn ile-iṣẹ ti o yọkuro (ojogun ijọba amunisin — awọn ile-igbiyanju olugbe ti a ṣe apẹrẹ awọn ile-iṣẹ amunisin) dẹkun awọn orilẹ-ede ni osi. Itan ọrọ - itẹramọṣẹ.
learnUni_economics_f4_kp3: Awọn RCT ni idagbasoke: Duflo & Banerjee (Abdul Latif Jameel Poverty Action Lab, J-PAL) lo awọn RCT lati ṣe iṣiro awọn ilowosi kan pato - deworming, microcredit, awọn gbigbe owo ni majemu, awọn nudges ajile. Awọn abajade nigbagbogbo iyalẹnu - yii laisi awọn ṣinalọ data.
learnUni_economics_f4_kp4: Awọn ẹgẹ osi ati awọn CCTs: awọn ẹgẹ osi dide lati awọn idiyele ti o wa titi ti idoko-owo (ẹkọ, ilera, ajile) ti awọn idile ti o ni owo kekere ko le ni anfani, idilọwọ awọn anfani iṣelọpọ. Awọn gbigbe owo ni majemu (Mexico's Oportunidades, Brazil's Bolsa Família) n pese ilodi si owo-wiwọle lori wiwa ile-iwe ati itọju ilera - fifọ pakute pẹlu awọn ipa gigun-gigun.
learnUni_economics_f4_task: Ṣe afiwe South Korea ati Nigeria: awọn mejeeji ni awọn ipele ti owo oya ti o jọra (~$300 GDP/capita) ni ọdun 1960. Ni 2023 South Korea ni ~$33,000, Nigeria ~$2,100. Lilo (a) Awoṣe Solow - kini awọn ifowopamọ ati awọn iyatọ olu eniyan ṣe alaye iyatọ? (b) awoṣe Romer - bawo ni agbara ĭdàsĭlẹ ṣe pataki? (c) Acemoglu & Robinson - ṣe afiwe itan ileto ati awọn itọpa igbekalẹ. Pari pẹlu iṣeduro eto imulo ti o da lori ẹri kan fun Nigeria, n tọka RCT ti o yẹ.
learnUni_economics_f4_tp0: Solow ati endogenous idagbasoke awọn awoṣe
learnUni_economics_f4_tp1: Awọn ile-iṣẹ ati idagbasoke || Awọn RCTs, CCTs, ati awọn ẹgẹ osi
learnUni_economics_f4_tp2: t'olofin & Public Law || Ofin t’olofin n ṣalaye ibatan laarin ipinlẹ ati awọn eniyan kọọkan, ati laarin awọn ẹka ijọba. Ofin ti gbogbo eniyan n ṣe akoso lilo agbara ilu. Loye awọn ilana t’olofin - ipinya awọn agbara, ofin ofin, awọn ẹtọ ipilẹ - jẹ ipilẹ si gbogbo ikẹkọ ofin ati ọmọ ilu tiwantiwa.
learnUni_law_f0_name: Orileede naa: le jẹ codified (AMẸRIKA, Jẹmánì, Faranse - iwe kikọ ẹyọkan) tabi ti ko ni koodu (UK — ofin ofin, ofin apapọ, ati awọn apejọ). Logalomomoise ti awọn ofin: awọn ilana t’olofin bori lori ofin lasan.
learnUni_law_f0_desc: Iyapa ti awọn agbara (Montesquieu): isofin (Parliament/Congress), adari (ijoba/Aare), idajo (ejo). Awọn sọwedowo ati awọn iwọntunwọnsi ṣe idiwọ ifọkansi ti agbara. Atunwo idajọ: awọn kootu le kọlu awọn ofin ti ko ni ibamu pẹlu ofin.
learnUni_law_f0_kp0: Ilana ofin (Dicey): ko si ẹniti o wa loke ofin; ijiya nikan fun irufin ofin mimọ; dogba wiwọle si awọn ejo. Ni iṣe: ominira ti ile-ẹjọ, idinamọ ti idaduro lainidii (habeas corpus), ibamu ti iṣe ti ilu.
learnUni_law_f0_kp1: Awọn ẹtọ pataki: Adehun European lori Awọn ẹtọ Eda Eniyan (Awọn Abala 2–14: ẹtọ si igbesi aye, idinamọ ijiya, idajọ ododo, ikọkọ, ominira ọrọ sisọ, idinamọ iyasoto). Petele la inaro ohun elo ti awọn ẹtọ.
learnUni_law_f0_kp2: Ilana t'olofin EU: aṣẹ ti ofin EU (Costa v. ENEL, 1964), ipa taara (Van Gend en Loos, 1963), ilana isunmọ, oniranlọwọ. Post-Brexit: UK ko si labẹ ofin EU mọ.
learnUni_law_f0_kp3: Ṣe itupalẹ ipo t’olofin ti adajọ olominira ni ijọba tiwantiwa. Lilo awọn apẹẹrẹ lati awọn eto ofin oriṣiriṣi mẹta (UK, USA, Germany), ṣe afiwe: bawo ni ominira ti idajọ ṣe ni aabo, ipari ti atunyẹwo idajọ ti ofin, ati ọran kan nibiti awọn kootu ti kọlu tabi ni opin igbese alase. Ṣe ayẹwo boya atunyẹwo idajọ ni ibamu pẹlu ẹtọ tiwantiwa.
learnUni_law_f0_task: Ilana ofin ati awọn ẹtọ ipilẹ
learnUni_law_f0_tp2: Ofin adehun n ṣe akoso awọn adehun adehun ti ofin. Ó máa ń pinnu ìgbà tí wọ́n dá àdéhùn kan sílẹ̀, ohun tí wọ́n gbọ́dọ̀ ṣe, kí ló máa ń ṣẹlẹ̀ tí wọn ò bá ṣẹ̀ṣẹ̀ dé, àti àwọn àtúnṣe wo ló wà. Ofin adehun ṣe atilẹyin iṣowo, iṣẹ, ati ọpọlọpọ awọn ibatan ofin laarin awọn ẹgbẹ aladani.
learnUni_law_f1_name: Awọn eroja ti adehun ti o wulo: ipese (imọran pato lati wa ni adehun lori gbigba), gbigba (aiṣedeede, ti o ni ibamu si ipese - ofin 'aworan digi'), imọran (nkankan ti iye ti a ṣe paarọ - ero ti o ti kọja ko ni imọran), aniyan lati ṣẹda awọn ibatan ofin.
learnUni_law_f1_desc: Awọn ofin ti iwe adehun: awọn ofin ti o ṣalaye (ti a sọ ni gbangba), awọn ofin ti a sọ (ti a sọ nipasẹ ofin - Ofin Tita ọja; tabi nipasẹ awọn kootu — idanwo ṣiṣe iṣowo). Awọn ipo (irufin gba ifopinsi + awọn bibajẹ), awọn atilẹyin ọja (irufin gba awọn bibajẹ nikan), awọn ofin aibikita (atunṣe da lori awọn abajade irufin).
learnUni_law_f1_kp0: Vitiating ifosiwewe: misrepresentation (eke gbólóhùn ti o daju inducing a guide → rescission + bibajẹ), duress (alaifin titẹ → voidable), ipa ti ko tọ (anfani ti ko tọ → voidable), asise (alabaṣepọ / ọkan pataki aṣiṣe → ofo tabi voidable).
learnUni_law_f1_kp1: Pipa ati awọn atunṣe: irufin ifojusọna (kiko lati ṣe ṣaaju iṣẹ nitori → ẹgbẹ alaiṣẹ le gba ati bẹbẹ lẹsẹkẹsẹ). Awọn atunṣe: awọn bibajẹ (akọkọ - fi ẹgbẹ alaiṣẹ si ipo bi ẹnipe a ṣe adehun), iṣẹ kan pato (equitable - fi agbara mu iṣẹ ṣiṣe, funni ni ibi ti awọn bibajẹ ko to), aṣẹ, kuatomu meruit.
learnUni_law_f1_kp2: Vitiating factors: misrepresentation (false statement of fact inducing a contract → rescission + damages), duress (illegitimate pressure → voidable), undue influence (unfair advantage taken → voidable), mistake (mutual/unilateral fundamental mistake → void or voidable).
learnUni_law_f1_kp3: Breach and remedies: anticipatory breach (refusal to perform before performance due → innocent party may accept and sue immediately). Remedies: damages (primary — puts innocent party in position as if contract performed), specific performance (equitable — compels performance, granted where damages inadequate), injunction, quantum meruit.
learnUni_law_f1_kp4: Awọn gbolohun idasile: gbọdọ wa ni idapo (akiyesi, ibuwọlu, tabi ilana ṣiṣe); itumọ ti o muna (contra proferentem - ambiguity lodi si ẹgbẹ ti o gbẹkẹle gbolohun); koko ọrọ si UCTA 1977 ati CRA 2015 (awọn gbolohun ọrọ ti ko ni imọran ti ko ni agbara ni awọn adehun onibara).
learnUni_law_f1_task: Akọle kan sọ £50,000 lati tun ile kan ṣe. Onile gba. Lakoko iṣẹ, olupilẹṣẹ ṣe awari awọn iṣoro igbekalẹ airotẹlẹ ati beere £ 70,000 diẹ sii. Onile fowo si adehun titun labẹ titẹ. Ni ipari, onile kọ lati san afikun £ 20,000 naa. Imọran: (a) Ṣe iwe adehun atilẹba wulo? (b) Ǹjẹ́ ìyàtọ̀ náà ṣeé ṣe? (c) Àwọn àtúnṣe wo ni ẹni tó kọ́ ilé náà ní? (d) Ìgbèjà wo ni onílé lè gbé dìde?
learnUni_law_f1_tp1: Awọn ofin ati awọn okunfa vitiating
learnUni_law_f1_tp2: O ṣẹ ati awọn atunṣe || Ofin odaran
learnUni_law_f2_name: Ofin iwa ọdaran n ṣalaye iwa ti ijọba ti ka leewọ ati pese fun ijiya ti awọn ẹlẹṣẹ. Ó ń dáàbò bo ẹnì kọ̀ọ̀kan àti àwùjọ lọ́wọ́ ìpalára, ó máa ń ṣèdíwọ́ fún ìwà àìtọ́, ó sì ń sọ̀rọ̀ ìdálẹ́bi ìwà rere lápapọ̀. Loye ofin ọdaràn nilo agbara ti actus reus, mens rea, awọn igbeja, ati awọn ipilẹ ti layabiliti ọdaràn.
learnUni_law_f2_desc: Awọn eroja ti ilufin: actus reus (igbese ti o jẹbi - pẹlu iṣe atinuwa, imukuro nibiti ojuse wa, abajade, awọn ayidayida) ati awọn ọkunrin rea (ọkan ẹbi — aniyan, aibikita, tabi aibikita). Ilana lasan: AR ati MR gbọdọ ṣe deede ni akoko.
learnUni_law_f2_kp0: Awọn ipele ti awọn ọkunrin rea: aniyan taara (idi ni lati mu abajade wa), aniyan oblique (abajade ti o fẹrẹ jẹ abajade kan, ti a ti rii tẹlẹ bi iru - R v Woolin), aibikita ara ẹni (Cunningham - gbigba eewu mimọ), aibikita ohun (iyapa nla lati boṣewa eniyan ti o ni oye).
learnUni_law_f2_kp1: Ipaniyan: ipaniyan (ipaniyan ti ko tọ + aniyan lati pa tabi fa GBH — gbolohun ọrọ igbesi aye dandan); ipaniyan atinuwa (ipaniyan dinku nipasẹ isonu ti iṣakoso tabi ojuse ti o dinku); ipaniyan lainidii (iwa aitọ tabi aibikita nla - ko si iku MR).
learnUni_law_f2_kp2: Awọn aabo: idaabobo ara ẹni (agbara ti o yẹ lati kọ irokeke ti ko tọ - ti o ni imọran ṣugbọn kii ṣe idajọ pipe); ifohunsi (ifilelẹ lọ lori ohun ti o le wa ni gba lati - R v Brown); ọti mimu (ọti atinuwa ko si aabo si idi kan pato, aabo apa kan si idi ipilẹ); were (M'Naghten ofin — abawọn ti idi lati arun ti okan → ko jẹbi nipa idi ti aṣiwere).
learnUni_law_f2_kp3: Awọn ẹṣẹ inchoate ati ikopa: igbiyanju (diẹ sii ju iṣe igbaradi nikan pẹlu idi); rikisi (adehun lati ṣe ẹṣẹ); iwuri / iranlowo (Serious Crime Ìṣirò 2007). Ile-iṣẹ apapọ: alabaṣe ninu iṣẹ ṣiṣe ẹgbẹ jẹ oniduro ti wọn ba rii tẹlẹ iṣeeṣe ti oludari ile-iwe yoo ṣe ẹṣẹ pẹlu MR ti o nilo.
learnUni_law_f2_kp4: D ati V ni ija. D punches V pinnu lati fa ipalara nla. V, aimọ si D, ni ipo timole ti o ṣọwọn ('eggshell skull'). V ku. Imọran D lori layabiliti ọdaràn: (a) Kini ipaniyan ipaniyan? (b) Ṣe D ni MR fun ipaniyan? (c) Ṣe ofin timole tinrin kan si ofin ọdaràn? (d) Ṣe eyikeyi aabo apa kan wa bi? Kini abajade ti o ṣeeṣe?
learnUni_law_f2_task: Actus reus ati awọn ọkunrin rea || Ipaniyan
learnUni_law_f2_tp0: Awọn aabo ati awọn ẹṣẹ inchoate
learnUni_law_f2_tp2: Ofin agbaye n ṣakoso awọn ibatan laarin awọn ipinlẹ ati, ni ilọsiwaju, awọn eniyan kọọkan ati awọn ajọ agbaye. Ko dabi ofin inu ile, ko ni aṣẹ imuṣiṣẹ aarin kan - ibamu da lori ifọkansi, igbẹsan, ati titẹ agbaye. Ofin agbaye ni wiwa awọn adehun, lilo agbara, ọba-alaṣẹ, ati awọn ẹtọ eniyan.
learnUni_law_f3_name: Awọn orisun ti ofin agbaye (Art. 38 ICJ Statute): awọn adehun (abuda lori awọn ẹgbẹ - pacta sunt servanda - Vienna Convention 1969), ofin agbaye ti aṣa (iwa ipinle ti o ni ibamu + opinio juris - abuda lori gbogbo awọn ipinlẹ), awọn ilana ofin gbogbogbo, ati awọn ipinnu idajọ / awọn iwe-kikọ iwe-ẹkọ (awọn orisun orisun).
learnUni_law_f3_desc: Ijọba ijọba: Ilana ti awọn ipinlẹ ni aṣẹ ti o ga julọ laarin agbegbe wọn ati pe wọn dọgba labẹ ofin agbaye. Ti kii ṣe idasi: ojuse lati ma ṣe dabaru ninu awọn ọran inu ti awọn ipinlẹ miiran - ti o bajẹ nipasẹ Ẹkọ Ojuse lati Daabobo (R2P).
learnUni_law_f3_kp0: Sources of international law (Art. 38 ICJ Statute): treaties (binding on parties — pacta sunt servanda — Vienna Convention 1969), customary international law (consistent state practice + opinio juris — binding on all states), general principles of law, and judicial decisions/scholarly writings (subsidiary sources).
learnUni_law_f3_kp1: State sovereignty: the principle that states have supreme authority within their territory and are equal under international law. Non-intervention: duty not to interfere in the internal affairs of other states — undermined by the Responsibility to Protect (R2P) doctrine.
learnUni_law_f3_kp2: Lilo agbara: Abala 2(4) UN Charter ni idinamọ irokeke tabi lilo ipa si eyikeyi ipinlẹ. Awọn imukuro: aabo ara ẹni (Abala 51 - gbọdọ jẹ pataki ati iwọn, royin si Igbimọ Aabo) ati aṣẹ Igbimọ Aabo (Abala VII - irokeke ewu si alaafia, irufin alaafia, iṣe ti ibinu).
learnUni_law_f3_kp3: Ofin ọdaràn kariaye: awọn ile-ẹjọ Nuremberg ti ṣeto ojuse ọdaràn olukuluku labẹ ofin agbaye. Ilana Rome (2002) ṣẹda ICC - aṣẹ lori ipaeyarun, awọn iwa-ipa si eda eniyan, awọn odaran ogun, ati ibinu. 'Tẹle awọn aṣẹ' kii ṣe aabo pipe.
learnUni_law_f3_kp4: Ofin ti okun (UNCLOS 1982): okun agbegbe (12 nautical miles — kikun nupojipetọ), iyasoto aje agbegbe (200 nm — ọba awọn oluşewadi awọn ẹtọ), ga okun (kọja orilẹ-ẹjọ — ominira ti lilọ). Ipinnu ijiyan: Ile-ẹjọ International fun Ofin ti Okun (ITLOS).
learnUni_law_f3_task: Ipinle A yabo si Ipinle B, ti o sọ aabo ara ẹni lẹhin ikọlu cyber kan ti a sọ si awọn iṣẹ oye ti B. Itupalẹ: (a) Ṣe ikọlu ori ayelujara jẹ ikọlu ologun labẹ Abala 51? (b) Ǹjẹ́ ìdáhùn A ṣe pọndandan tó sì bá a mu wẹ́kú? (c) Ipa wo ni Igbimọ Aabo UN le ṣe? (d) Njẹ awọn oludari ti Ipinle A le koju ẹjọ ICC bi? Kini gbọdọ jẹ ẹri? Tọkasi awọn ipese adehun ti o yẹ ati awọn ọran agbaye.
learnUni_law_f3_tp0: Awọn orisun ati awọn koko-ọrọ ti ofin agbaye
learnUni_law_f3_tp2: International odaran ofin ati UNCLOS || Awọn ọna Ofin & Idajọ
learnUni_law_f4_name: Awọn ọna ofin jẹ awọn ọgbọn ti ironu ofin: awọn ọran kika, awọn ilana itumọ, kikọ awọn ariyanjiyan, ati kikọ ni ofin. Idajọ (ilana ofin / imoye ti ofin) ṣe ayẹwo iseda, awọn orisun, ati awọn idi ti ofin funrararẹ - bibeere boya ofin ati iwa jẹ lọtọ, kini o jẹ ki ofin jẹ ẹtọ, ati bi awọn onidajọ ṣe yẹ ki o pinnu awọn ọran lile.
learnUni_law_f4_desc: Idi ofin idi: ratio decisionndi (awọn ofin opo lori eyi ti a nla ti wa ni pinnu — abuda on kekere ejo labẹ stare decisis), obiter dicta (isẹlẹ awọn ifiyesi — persuasive nikan). Iyatọ (fidipinpin ilana iṣaaju), imukuro (ile-ẹjọ giga tako ẹjọ iṣaaju), ati ilọkuro (Ile-ẹjọ giga lọ kuro ni iṣaaju tirẹ).
learnUni_law_f4_kp0: Itumọ ti ofin: ofin gangan (fi ọrọ lasan lo), ofin goolu (yago fun awọn abajade ti ko tọ), ofin ibi (kini ibi ti Ile asofin n wa lati ṣe arowoto - Ọran Heydon). Ona erongba ode oni (kini idi ti ile asofin?). ECHR s.3 HRA 1998: ofin gbọdọ wa ni ibamu pẹlu awọn ẹtọ Adehun bi o ti ṣee ṣe.
learnUni_law_f4_kp1: Ireti ti ofin (Austin, Hart): ofin jẹ otitọ awujọ - awọn ofin to wulo ti a ṣẹda nipasẹ awọn ilana ti a mọ, laibikita akoonu ihuwasi. Hart 'ofin ti idanimọ' ṣe idanimọ ofin to wulo. Iwe ẹkọ iyapa ofin / iwa.
learnUni_law_f4_kp2: Ilana ofin adayeba: ofin gbọdọ ni ibamu si awọn ilana iwa - ofin aiṣododo kii ṣe ofin otitọ (lex iniusta non est lex - Aquinas, Fuller's inner morality of law). Awọn ofin Nazi ti a lo nipasẹ awọn ile-ẹjọ - ariyanjiyan lẹhin ogun lori boya positivism ti ofin ti mu ibi ṣiṣẹ.
learnUni_law_f4_kp3: Ronald Dworkin's 'ofin bi iyege': ofin ko ni awọn ofin nikan ṣugbọn awọn ilana (ẹtọ si ibakcdun ati ọwọ dogba). Awọn onidajọ gbọdọ wa 'idahun ọtun' ẹyọkan ti o baamu awọn ipinnu ti o kọja ati iwa iṣelu. Awọn ọran lile: awọn ilana, kii ṣe awọn ofin nikan, awọn ipinnu itọsọna. Lodi ti Hart ká positivism.
learnUni_law_f4_kp4: Ofin kan sọ pe 'ko si awọn ọkọ ni ọgba iṣere'. Ṣe imọran boya ọkọọkan ninu iwọnyi jẹ eewọ: (a) keke, (b) ọkọ ayọkẹlẹ ohun-iṣere ọmọde, (c) ọkọ alaisan ti n dahun si pajawiri, (d) ojò iranti ogun. Waye gbogbo awọn ofin atọwọdọwọ mẹta ti itumọ ofin. Lẹhinna, ni lilo positivism Hart ati ofin Dworkin gẹgẹbi iduroṣinṣin, ṣe alaye bi onimọ-jinlẹ kọọkan yoo ṣe sunmọ “penumbra ti aidaniloju” ninu ofin naa.
learnUni_law_f4_tp2: Anatomi eniyan || Anatomi jẹ iwadi ti ọna ti ara eniyan - awọn ara rẹ, awọn ara, ati awọn ọna ṣiṣe. Imọye kikun ti anatomi jẹ ipilẹ ti ko ni rọpo ti oogun ile-iwosan: o ko le ṣe iwadii tabi tọju ohun ti o ko le foju ri. Anatomi iṣoogun ṣepọ anatomi nla, histology, oyun, ati anatomi redio.
learnUni_medicine_f0_desc: Anatomy is the study of the structure of the human body — its organs, tissues, and systems. A thorough knowledge of anatomy is the irreplaceable foundation of clinical medicine: you cannot diagnose or treat what you cannot visualise. Medical anatomy integrates gross anatomy, histology, embryology, and radiological anatomy.
learnUni_medicine_f0_kp0: Awọn ọrọ ti anatomical: awọn ọkọ ofurufu (sagittal, coronal, transverse), awọn itọnisọna (agbedemeji / ita, ti o ga julọ / isalẹ, iwaju / ẹhin, isunmọ / distal), awọn agbegbe, ati awọn iṣipopada (iyipada / itẹsiwaju, ifasilẹ / ifasilẹ, yiyi, pronation / supination).
learnUni_medicine_f0_kp1: Anatomi eto inu ọkan ati ẹjẹ: ọkan wa ni mediastinum. Apa ọtun (ẹjẹ iṣọn-ara ti eto) → sanṣan ẹdọforo. Apa osi (atẹgun) → eto eto. Awọn iṣọn iṣọn-alọ ọkan: osi iwaju sọkalẹ (LAD), circumflex osi (LCx), iṣọn-alọ ọkan ti o tọ (RCA). LAD infarct = 'oluṣe opo'.
learnUni_medicine_f0_kp2: Eto iṣan: 206 egungun ninu egungun agbalagba. Awọn isẹpo: fibrous (sutures), cartilaginous (symphysis pubis), synovial (julọ awọn isẹpo gbigbe - ibadi, orokun, ejika). Brachial plexus (C5-T1) n ṣakoso apa oke - awọn egbo gbongbo nafu ara n gbe awọn ilana aipe kan pato.
learnUni_medicine_f0_kp3: Inu viscera: peritoneum (awọn laini parietal ogiri inu, awọn ara ti o ni wiwa visceral). Awọn ara retroperitoneal (SADPUCKER): awọn keekeke ti suprarenal, aorta, duodenum (2nd-4th), pancreas, ureters, colon (igoke / sọkalẹ), awọn kidinrin, esophagus, rectum.
learnUni_medicine_f0_kp4: Neuroanatomy: 12 cranial nerve (I Olfactory, II Optic, III Oculomotor, IV Trochlear, V Trigeminal, VI Abducens, VII Facial, VIII Vestibulocochlear, IX Glossopharyngeal, X Vagus, XI Accessory, XII Hypoglossal). Okun ọpa ẹhin pari ni L1-L2 - lumbar puncture ni L3-L4.
learnUni_medicine_f0_task: Alaisan kan ṣafihan pẹlu ailera ni apa ọtun wọn, isonu ti ifarabalẹ pinprick ni ika kekere ati iwaju agbedemeji, ati sisọnu awọn iṣan ọwọ. Ṣe agbegbe ọgbẹ naa ni anatomiki: (a) kini nafu ara wo ni o kan? (b) Nibo ni egbo naa wa - ni brachial plexus tabi nafu ti a npè ni? (c) Kí ló ṣeé ṣe kó fà á? (d) Ilana anatomical wo ni a fisinuirindigbindigbin? Ṣafikun aworan atọka ti plexus ti o yẹ.
learnUni_medicine_f0_tp0: Awọn ọkọ ofurufu anatomical ati imọ-ọrọ
learnUni_medicine_f0_tp1: Ẹ̀jẹ̀ àti ẹ̀jẹ̀ inú ẹ̀jẹ̀ àti ti iṣan
learnUni_medicine_f1_desc: Fisioloji ṣe alaye bi awọn eto ara ṣe n ṣiṣẹ - bawo ni ọkan ṣe n fa ẹjẹ silẹ, bawo ni awọn kidinrin ṣe ṣe àlẹmọ ati ṣe ilana awọn elekitiroti, bii ẹdọforo ṣe paarọ awọn gaasi, ati bii awọn homonu ṣe ipoidojuko awọn ara ti o jina. O so anatomi (igbekalẹ) si oogun iwosan (aifọwọyi). Fisioloji jẹ ipilẹ mechanistic ti iwadii aisan.
learnUni_medicine_f1_kp0: Ẹkọ-ara ọkan ọkan: Ilana Frank-Starling - iwọn didun ọpọlọ pọ si pẹlu iwọn iwọn diastolic ti o pọ si (iṣaaju) - ọkan na siwaju siwaju → agbara nla. Iṣẹjade ọkan ọkan = Iwọn ọkan × iwọn didun ọpọlọ. Itumọ titẹ iṣan ara = iṣẹjade ọkan ọkan × lapapọ resistance agbeegbe.
learnUni_medicine_f1_kp1: Fisioloji ti atẹgun: iwọn didun tidal (500 milimita ni isinmi), agbara pataki, aaye ti o ku (~ 150 milimita - awọn ọna atẹgun ti ko ni ipa ninu paṣipaarọ gaasi). Fentilesonu-perfusion (V/Q) ibaamu: bojumu V/Q = 1. Aiṣedeede fa hypoxaemia (kekere O₂). Hypercapnia (CO₂ giga) jẹ iwuri wakọ atẹgun akọkọ.
